subject: 11 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75257231/444103637/857475129?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmYwY2IxZi1hNjliLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LytYxU706FQM9rY7Lf_oXMVo_1OHkt-38WjMN69dSoo=)
---
**This week marked the 11th anniversary of Sandy Hook. That day, we saw one of the most horrific shootings in America as a gunman walked into Sandy Hook Elementary and killed 26 people, among them 20 first graders no older than 7 years old.**

Our children shouldn’t be afraid to go to school, and parents shouldn’t wonder as they drop off their children if that’s the last time they’ll see them.

In Congress, I’m fighting day in and day out for gun violence prevention — and not a day goes by where I won’t call out my NRA-backed Republican colleagues for ignoring the rise of gun violence in our country.

body:
Republicans are counting on us to fail

| Peter, it’s Ritchie. I’ll make this quick: There are three things you need to know before we wrap up 2023 and log off for the holidays.

**1.** I grew up in public housing, raised by a single mother who made minimum wage. I don’t have fancy degrees or connections, but I do bring one thing to Congress that many members don’t have: _Lived experience._

**2.** With our campaign being funded by grassroots supporters like you, I am _only_ beholden to the people of this nation -- which means I get to _wholeheartedly_ focus on this nation.

**3.** Tonight is our final mid-month deadline before our FEC deadline, and we aren’t on track to hit our $15,000 goal.

Republicans are counting on us to fail, Peter. name: Tom Suozzi (Special Election Alert)
subject: Why this special election is important to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
this is our first step to retaking the House [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_4_suozzi?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_4_suozzi?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hi there, it's Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in the special election to replace George Santos.
I wanted to tell you a bit more about why this race is so important to me.
My father was born in Italy, and like so many, his family came in search of the American Dream. He found it in New York, and I’m so grateful he did. He and my mother, who was born in Queens, taught my brothers and sister and I to work hard and to work for our community. He inspired my public service as Mayor of Glen Cove, Nassau County Executive, and U.S. Representative.
But increasingly, the American Dream is out of reach for so many. The cost of living is way too high, people don’t feel safe on the streets, and our leaders are too busy with arguments and petty politics to solve problems like climate change or our broken immigration system.
And to make matters worse, George Santos represented NY-03 for 11 months, in which he did nothing other than distract and divide us until he was finally expelled.
Now, there’s a special election in NY-03 on February 13, and I’m humbly asking for your support. This race is a toss-up, so grassroots support really matters. We need to bring sanity back to our government so we can rebuild the American Dream. Can I count on you to pitch in now?
Donate now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_4_suozzi?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Tom Suozzi and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:

Thank you,
Tom Suozzi

You might know it as lying.

Fellow American, right now, it seems to me like a popular thing in Washington, D.C., is to tell people you will do one thing and then do another. Growing up, my mother would call that fibbing.

You might know it as lying. Others might even refer to it as hogwash. Baloney. Poppycock.

Frankly, I can't stand it. I'm not always the most brilliant guy in the room or the best-looking, but I pride myself on being honest and never giving you the runaround.

If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up.

Right now, we're in an all-out brawl against the Socialist Left for common sense in our country.

I'm happy to be on the front lines every single day.

Fighting to keep your family safe by securing our Southern Border.

Fighting to keep money in your wallet by helping straighten out the economy.

Fighting for your values every day from the Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist workers.

All that I ask from you is to have my back.

Anything that you can spare today below to help me hit a **CRITICAL NOVEMBER FUNDRAISING DEADLINE** will go miles to help me.

I'm counting on you like you can always count on me to shoot it straight. | [**HELP ME SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=451b1e5742a6405c87d579ef3dd3d0a7&_e=2rl9sXhcMzYZCHxtAq53PAQemkLcn5V-J2hrXAlqVY-nfQAMpUJhdLcalLzKgjJQjxvNOQ0P6EktWgFrUVpCAvbX7UQKOYsU5SlzFNASvyW9S_JJHEBElVtKFyvWr16gqEcGpoo7l0JMRNhRbSeWn51uZJew8BaSAjxwfechZV--E1SHoTLHAPmP7fLWz-15SHkyAb91l2MJouh7dW5pHteykkeRA5Y9bY_h_bCgnJ1YyG4Pjko3eyeXmdVkzbf8dRVBHrJGhD5DsQ-i-zRu7Rq-BX6drx6OWZ1zwhwhTg1EuGZn1wuh_lAFWzKGg7U7OWCf5N12Ordei00YI2Epp6SOK-6W01EDVdQ3WWPC6z6CqhxkMMXHKZwix6aLPTnROaXGc-W2MzeamnNASXwfeg%3D%3D)

name: Jess
subject: Finally news for US!
body:

## Congress Passes Record Defense Bill
The House and Senate approved a record-high [$886 billion defense policy bill](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStis-w6nNbNp1_Gre2AZylAXveI0QVfb8aXZjBxtED-v1Sv7pNp2dzpkFbHEBkeerQKnxZuSycn8P-NdHnf89AERrJ5pUSnfTEDrCBnG532yDtbhSMa8dS8mK3L3wn11-Ag66D7mEqiqNRgS3lIgeXkNodGGlk6aEVK4Vc3cfHGtIXQpWmTin2vvjWtC31I1N1BX6cGOoFm7mN1gFqGNQZtJhPADx2kqLE_g-2RzjYDYp2OJzy_HmBFR_d4hd_b0uKcHYMIqWPVN09HkP874PDjpq_Dd3zNz-9Y0f_ifNEy8Fk), up 3% from last year. It includes a 5.2% pay raise for troops, the biggest pay boost in decades. The bill passed in the Senate 87-13 and the House 310-118, despite concerns from some GOP members that the bill keeps intact Pentagon "social-engineering" policies, such as abortion access. Rep. Mike Rogers, chairman of the House Armed Services Committee, said he was "disappointed" the House didn't get all it wanted but that the bill was ["a good compromise."](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStivoxQJxst9ayJ-t8iSbbHEedk7BwLvpKBWW_47cg6IgB6RVI-3ycTmipbHgo5SjQv35B0G_IOOnp-fV_eCEswzOz0VTnfgsM9DbUWyS5-mbhmXPs8RLmrL6ZDuh0XQ7dPmdxmaZJG4n6H2OHrhyW8B-HuuuaRj2rr9Otq1s-gcYMJEd0QQSQAjXeDddNtZsUCNKod9xcoywP83USredtJOUVTR684kL9HDgt_HJzEEhV18Yx6jR8_UW-XK48-GGFNg%3D%3D)
## Wisconsin Trades Diversity for Cash
The Wisconsin Board of Regents reversed itself and [approved a state GOP deal](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStisyYp9OEUA3-HkwcoQ22hFK2GjxWCETuJKVh-q8t1X-mvS247Y_e6MSO6OImBqqP2f7LHYxCgrlJHde61d70G8Hja8eMPfVjo-q-1PxzEIu7SayEw_FHZY8uzJCpyaDhx92zJZOA9tzCnotd3kHzGC318_6xyB2jWcqUzER0zdp4QbYb9wHiIlEVFYBdyxjBt-FYiizQCkyeDGk__qGHMNJkGdONbuDrAh4O3TVCrs991thIIEpGcndPqlyXxCvql-pX0DiRkeIlcj2okgkIBvyr4bZD4SfWuEvUeUvLSrsS) for $800 million in university funding in exchange for freezing new hires of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) officers. Additionally, 43 existing DEI jobs will be reclassified to new positions, and campuses will have to eliminate statements supporting "diversity" on student applications. The state legislature refused to approve the $800 million budget increase for pay raises and capitol improvements without the DEI deal. The Board of Regents initially turned it down but [reversed the decision](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStivFe6_HAyMUPbuueblblNDIkpXabiV5jh3gqRN3etAeH1IZx-Y6AZmm7EvyJ72LUKiNpn-KWGkcWnCS8M4-c0Prj0vkY-1pOj2slxPeIz_2DFP77VRjTacPTIXr_99lEF4SHdy5DQe2YCNjOf5YQNNX6v06mqpAn2hjYlbobCCHDoQGruLsXm1IlPu9hkEZlWbE37jKzYfKO8sVM5DdibrbykjV7M3dMs3SI2lHLTRJSwblqVfyRTfLuSYreSUrdE9qqMs9P5_JQp81-0tAK9_DgemIH1E0TkjYKViJ1pzWENJVqKjKg2VP3yr82m5YDX7QQZRGvGUx7IYDjXdAelXA%3D) in a surprise vote Wednesday.
## Mickey Mouse Losing Copyright Protection
After 95 years, the original version of Mickey Mouse is finally losing copyright protection and [entering the public domain](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStij3A9u-xeuyYm9L-CYCnOYu9TUq7AG7Xg3BFZX0ROh35W65zD9VZy9W_ditkCMxNu14bqvu4QhDsAAubmTMD_Gh3jl6NhD1EVXsAJc6sSZPBygDUqJ5Wv8skHMey90039t4hbXcKW_ORPQD0EUA6fcviwmqVNXFxW7gff-AhoC7zLRNhE50H1kewR8PUBr8-f4kiR1atPhe4ee0LFTRL60yTcCauJyWKaU9gk1rVF-8oWRGFw1Zwku49Qg8HwU4SwVq_noL3yNihZ9PE8b_OgADILkK9w2MMnImAW6bcZmGV), where anyone can use the character as long as it doesn't appear to come from Disney. Mickey's first appearance was in the primitive 1928 cartoon ["Steamboat Willie,"](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStiuyLUc9nluXFmO1qzWe7esOUboXoKYfglx9QqAcp-aSvYgfo5KjDfOjHctY8IO-vxOwcJBbacjzgas6bLvPLTpNxu9cWBSVDwn1D3wezwM9WP9ENu3HzqIOTqmlSt35LJGgc7sfi0auoWA-Bg_ba_XQn6lUi5-lA-utHK9jgGTMQGxzqHOewyboS7sIdMHgUtSixKrrz2PHvBbwGbGLXiGY%3D) and that's the only version that's entering the public domain -- the sweet, hapless Mickey from the 1930s on is still protected. Another character that recently entered the public domain is Winnie the Pooh. He and Piglet were immediately reimagined as bloodthirsty villains in the slasher film ["Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey."](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8cbb6301b4e046a787a6ca6a56721887&_e=XBMu9uSC1q7ZpHPxWYStigIQZGPQIdyoFChW0fik76tWcmqfI63yijcTUHqjaQGzAUzNvmXIensLnH7jP8oY4qFy2BmyJzqkO6GxPodvlDc7NFb8eToWULaglrtU_VnbCrrFDsa87Xe8o1BusgQJKno-2iQYHauClx7tGdsMKclgZcMyv1xtIUmXTdTDhr2SWkw7u-1cGQwI-n1d4_sWX5D9pHmw1DH2a9bnroM2xXI5XHp0Rpv2QPZ2OeBNcf5b)

clean_body: Have you heard about The Flyover? The House and Senate approved a record-high $886 billion defense policy bill, up 3% from last year. It includes a 5.2% pay raise for troops, the biggest pay boost in decades. | | | Hey Friend, Have you heard about The Flyover? Unlike many news sources out there that put their own spin on every news story, they just deliver the facts and let us draw our own conclusions! It’s easy to read and only takes a couple of minutes to get caught up on all the news for the day. But the best part is that this newsletter is 100% FREE! Check out the newsletter I got from them today below, if you don’t believe me. Trust me you don’t want to put this off. ! It’s time to break free from the biased news that has infected our world. \-- Jess | | | FRIDAY, DECEMBER 15, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1791, Virginia ratified the Bill of Rights, the 10th of 14 states to do so, enough to formally enact them as the first ten amendments to the new U.S. Constitution. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . | Congress Passes Record Defense Bill The House and Senate approved a record-high , up 3% from last year. It includes a 5.2% pay raise for troops, the biggest pay boost in decades. The bill passed in the Senate 87-13 and the House 310-118, despite concerns from some GOP members that the bill keeps intact Pentagon "social-engineering" policies, such as abortion access. Rep. Mike Rogers, chairman of the House Armed Services Committee, said he was "disappointed" the House didn't get all it wanted but that the bill was Wisconsin Trades Diversity for Cash The Wisconsin Board of Regents reversed itself and for $800 million in university funding in exchange for freezing new hires of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) officers. Additionally, 43 existing DEI jobs will be reclassified to new positions, and campuses will have to eliminate statements supporting "diversity" on student applications. The state legislature refused to approve the $800 million budget increase for pay raises and capitol improvements without the DEI deal. The Board of Regents initially turned it down but in a surprise vote Wednesday. Mickey Mouse Losing Copyright Protection After 95 years, the original version of Mickey Mouse is finally losing copyright protection and , where anyone can use the character as long as it doesn't appear to come from Disney. Mickey's first appearance was in the primitive 1928 cartoon and that's the only version that's entering the public domain -- the sweet, hapless Mickey from the 1930s on is still protected. Another character that recently entered the public domain is Winnie the Pooh. He and Piglet were immediately reimagined as bloodthirsty villains in the slasher film Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | ➤ The Senate canceled its recess next week and will stay in session to try and forge a deal on border control and funding for Ukraine. The House will be in recess. () ➤****A top Hamas leader has called for attacks on America and Britain in retaliation for the war in Gaza. The FBI has issued warnings of potential terrorist attacks in the U.S. () ➤****Only 25% of Michigan Democrats say they're enthusiastic about President Biden as their presidential nominee, according to a new AP-NORC poll. For the state GOP, 45% say they're enthusiastic about Donald Trump as the nominee. () ➤ Two men were indicted in Montana for killing 3,600 birds, including bald and golden eagles, for feathers and other parts to sell on the black market, a federal crime. () | ➤ The Milwaukee Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo set a franchise record by scoring 64 points in a game against the Indiana Pacers, but a ruckus broke out afterward over who would get to keep the game ball. () ➤The SEC released its 2024 football schedule on Wednesday, offering the first look at how the competition will shape up now that it's expanded to a 16-team league that includes Oklahoma and Texas. () ➤ The University of Colorado is creating a new elective to study how Deion Sanders handles his celebrity on top of coaching the UC football team. () ➤ GM is laying off nearly a quarter of employees working on its self-driving Cruise business after firing nine of the division's executives. The robo-taxis are under investigation after a vehicle dragged a woman 20 feet. () ➤The top-ranked Google search word for what things cost this year was "eggs" across all 50 states. It's the first year that the same item has topped price-check searches in each state. () | ➤ Russian President Vladimir Putin came face to face with an AI-generated "deepfake" version of himself during his annual press conference. Fake Putin asked Real Putin his thoughts on artificial intelligence. () ➤ New 3D images of the human tongue reveal that every person's tongue has a unique pattern of taste buds and texture, distinct enough that scientists could identify each person by their tongue. () ➤ Scientists discovered the first known stream of stars stretching between galaxies while searching for dark matter. The gigantic "stellar stream" is ten times longer than the Milky Way. () ➤An Oklahoma man strung his house with Christmas lights and then saw that the homes of his neighbors, many of them elderly, remained in darkness. So he got their permission to light up every house on the street. () ****➤ A mailman saved a toddler who escaped his daycare center and wandered toward a busy street. The postman scooped him up and called the police. "I was just in the right place at the right time, " he said. () | ➤First Lady Jill Biden posted a polarizing White House Christmas video that drew cheers and jeers from millions for its elaborately dressed dancers performing their interpretation of "The Nutcracker." name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: $5 to help us stay on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And five reasons why it matters.
#
Peter — before we ask you to chip in $5 or more toward our goal of raising 1,500 individual donations before midnight tonight, **here are five reasons why your support for Lucas Kunce _right now_ is so critical:**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40194?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO)**
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. And now, the newest reporting from _Morning Consult_ shows that Hawley remains the most unpopular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024 — with approval numbers even worse than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida!
2. **National Republicans are already targeting our race.** These insiders know that if they don’t step in to make Josh Hawley look strong, there’s a real chance they could lose this Senate seat. So from launching desperate attacks about Lucas to funding a new GOP Super PAC with millions of dollars, they’re already hard at work to keep this seat under their thumb.
3. **After major wins for red-state Democrats and abortion rights in Kentucky and Ohio, we have an opportunity to make Missouri next.** Over the last three election cycles, Missouri voters have broken with politicians like Hawley to reject anti-union “Right-to-Work,” raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid, and legalize weed. So in 2024, we really can defeat Josh Hawley and take this Senate seat back for everyday people.
4. **Our movement can harness that grassroots energy.** From outraising Hawley’s campaign to earning support from dozens of statewide and union locals across Missouri, Lucas is proving that our election-winning message and sheer people-power will be a real force to be reckoned with.
5. **Multiple recent polls show Lucas Kunce in a _statistical tie_ with Josh Hawley.** After working hard to hold Hawley accountable this year, Lucas has already made this a margin-of-error race.

**Now, we’ve got to keep this momentum going.** Our last major FEC fundraising deadline of 2023 is just weeks away, so staying on track with our goals is the surest way we’ll be able to keep reaching voters with Lucas’ message, flip this Senate seat, and take back power for everyday people next year.
**[So Peter, will you add $5 (or more!) toward our goal of raising 1,500 individual donations before midnight TONIGHT? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or shady mega-donors in this race — this movement is built by working people, for working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40194?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40195?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40195?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40195?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40195?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40195?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40195?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40194?refcode=em20231215-4395&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4395%2E614464%2Emev6yO)

Thanks for all your help,
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

subject: one more thing tonight

body:
I'll keep this quick
| | |

Hi, Peter – it's been a long day, so I'll keep this quick.
Here's the deal: **Our critical mid-month deadline is at midnight tonight, and right now, we're just 8% short of our $50,000 goal.**

body:

But trust us when we say this campaign is made up of folks like you -- grassroots supporters who want to continue building on the progress we’ve made, and who chip in what they can, when they can because they believe in a better future for our country. **If you are able to swing it, we’d love for today to be the day you make your first donation to reelect Joe and Kamala. clean_body: Trust us when we say this campaign is made up of folks like you. | | | Peter -- We know it can be tough around the holidays and we know you might not always have it in your budget to give to the campaign. We understand. But trust us when we say this campaign is made up of folks like you -- grassroots supporters who want to continue building on the progress we’ve made, and who chip in what they can, when they can because they believe in a better future for our country. If you are able to swing it, we’d love for today to be the day you make your first donation to reelect Joe and Kamala. You can use the link below to give: This race is only going to get tougher as time goes on. In fact, Joe and Kamala are already facing attacks from extreme MAGA Republicans threatening to take away our fundamental freedoms. But when you donate to this campaign, you are helping us scale up our organizing work in critical states across the country, continue assembling a talented team from coast to coast, and make sure Joe and Kamala's message reaches voters in every corner of the country. It means a lot to Joe and Kamala to know you’re standing with them and showing our opponents that we can and will keep fighting for everyday Americans in 2024 and beyond. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for staying in this fight with us -- we’re so grateful to have you on our team. Team Biden-Harris

**As a former Green Beret, asking for help definitely is not my strong suit.**

Usually, I’m a firm believer that if you want something done right, you have to take the initiative to do it yourself.

_But right now, I have nowhere else to turn._

**We have to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight to meet our mid-month deadline by TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT, and I’m counting on my most dependable patriots. **

clean_body: | | | As a former Green Beret, asking for help definitely is not my strong suit. Usually, I’m a firm believer that if you want something done right, you have to take the initiative to do it yourself. But right now, I have nowhere else to turn. We have to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight to meet our mid-month deadline by TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT, and I’m counting on my most dependable patriots. This goal is CRITICAL to chase the Left OUT of Florida and maintain control over our state. - In Service, Col. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Obama Chef Death Shocking Discovery
body:
FBI Lied About Spying on Catholics!?

[INSIDE JW]

RECORDS SHOW TOP FBI LAWYERS REVIEWED CONTROVERSIAL TARGETING OF
TRADITIONAL CATHOLICS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30912&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL3VuY292ZXJlZC1vYmFtYS1jaGVmLWRlYXRoLXNlY3JldHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7d217f1383cc3fc58b1b4f248c718d790c822966dcee74c72d9d8c6624a7d912]
More evidence that the FBI can’t be trusted.

We received 98 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30902&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZmJpLWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS1wcm9kLTItMDExNjYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a4ac4f58ed9d5167486825bac2e59e22d19e12f6e96294a36f6e2ff597286bf4]
of heavily redacted documents from the Federal Bureau of Investigation
(FBI) showing that the agency’s Office of General Counsel reviewed
the controversial targeting
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=29412&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudW5jb3ZlcmRjLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAyLzA4L3RoZS1mYmktZG91Ymxlcy1kb3duLW9uLWNocmlzdGlhbnMtYW5kLXdoaXRlLXN1cHJlbWFjeS1pbi0yMDIzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5b55fd3ba4f5a51ec8eed8c58bf3e0e1e40d244c3fec48c216fead1e5e93536f]
of the Catholics by the Richmond field office of the FBI.

FBI Director Christopher Wray had told
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30903&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9taWtlam9obnNvbi5ob3VzZS5nb3YvbmV3cy9kb2N1bWVudHNpbmdsZS5hc3B4P0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9MTMzNCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=23d76bde0613b7cc659adaa21a1c20659082ea5bf17798a466c79d9effecb4c6]
congressmen that the memo was “a single product by a single field
office,” but the records we uncovered show
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30904&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZmJpLWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS1wcm9kLTItMDExNjYtcGctMTUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4eb30db8b72875e7d9337315d0d1946ac048526bf9a595abea55475e32a44a43]
that it was “Reviewed by: OGC/CDC [Office of General Counsel/Chief
Deputy Counsel].” The records also indicate coordination with
officials from Portland and Milwaukee.

These documents disprove the FBI’s narrative that the spy operation
against Catholics and churches was limited to one field office. In
fact, the operation seems to have been approved by top lawyers in the
FBI. These documents should trigger a criminal inquiry into this Biden
FBI scandal.

We obtained the records in response to an April 2023 FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=29425&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFyZ2V0aW5nLWNhdGhvbGljcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=dcae6befaed54a4ca0ba6fa2685813ed2e43b071fe2999312e282a7d6621d48c]
filed with
CatholicVote
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30710&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jYXRob2xpY3ZvdGUub3JnLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=000ce31f88797e3e3da09547d16b4723707d5b9f69590b80c24e5494cc06f37e]
Civic Action against the FBI
and the Department of Justice after they failed to respond to March
2023 requests for records about the FBI intelligence memo targeting
“radical traditionalist” Catholics (_CatholicVote Civic Action and
Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Federal Bureau of Investigations and
Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=29411&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS12LWRvai1mYmktY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMTY2L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=34fe9444455bcd88cdccb4f73cf32067e6e88dc3bffeead5df06603302bb49f9
_(No. 1:23-cv-01166)).

In February 2023, an FBI intelligence document was leaked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=29412&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudW5jb3ZlcmRjLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAyLzA4L3RoZS1mYmktZG91Ymxlcy1kb3duLW9uLWNocmlzdGlhbnMtYW5kLXdoaXRlLXN1cHJlbWFjeS1pbi0yMDIzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5b55fd3ba4f5a51ec8eed8c58bf3e0e1e40d244c3fec48c216fead1e5e93536f]
that showed the FBI targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional
beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues. The _Catholic News
Agency_ reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=29413&F=T&&hash=7a6e969aa0f731762885e38cb90d17da5299a15468f6af845ed39d2f26ca8669
“The leaked document has been condemned by several federal and state
officials, as well as clergy, including Bishop Barry Knestout
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=29414&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2F0aG9saWNuZXdzYWdlbmN5LmNvbS9uZXdzLzI1MzYzMi9yaWNobW9uZC1iaXNob3AtY29uZGVtbnMtZmJpcy1sZWFrZWQtbWVtbz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3e65f525fcf87a7050f107ba99e5f5bf435ca188f24a7263098fcc033fb3d2e4]
of the Diocese of Richmond, who recently called the memo a ‘threat
to religious liberty.’”

The records include a January 23, 2023, document
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30905&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZmJpLWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS1wcm9kLTItMDExNjYtcGdzLTEwLTE1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3d542dec2edd8a51afe0f423754da5123279138afd73c799fda5df1b035441c4]
labeled “Domain Perspective – Threat Target/Facilitation Platform,
FBI Richmond” that has a section titled “Interest of Racially or
Ethnically Motivated Violent Extremists in Radical-Traditionalist
Catholic Ideology Almost Certainly Presents New Mitigation
Opportunities:”

> EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
>
> FBI Richmond assesses the increasingly observed interest of racially
> or ethnically motivated violent extremists (RMVEs) in
> radical-traditionalist Catholic (RTC) ideology almost certainly
> presents opportunities for threat mitigation through the exploration
> of new avenues for tripwire and source development. FBI Richmond
> makes this assessment with high confidence [redacted]

> INCREASINGLY OBSERVED INTEREST OF RMVES IN RTC IDEOLOGY ALMOST
> CERTAINLY PRESENTS NEW OPPORTUNITIES FOR THREAT MITIGATION
>
> FBI Richmond assesses the increasingly observed interest of RMVEs
> [Racially or ethnically motivated violent extremists] in RTC
> [Radical-Traditionalist Catholic] ideology almost certainly presents
> new opportunities for threat mitigation through the exploration of
> new avenues for tripwire and source development. This assessment is
> based on [redacted]
>
> REVIEWED BY: OGC/CDC [Office of General Counsel/Chief Deputy
> Counsel]
>
> COORDINATED WITH: SA [Special Agent] [redacted] (FBI Portland) and
> IA [Intelligence Agent] [redacted] (FBI Milwaukee)
>
> WARNINGS AND CAVEATS
>
> Potential criminality exhibited by certain members of a group
> referenced herein does not negate nor is it a comment on the
> constitutional rights of the group itself or its members to exercise
> their rights under the First Amendment to the U.S. Constitution. The
> FBI does not investigate, collect, or maintain information on U.S.
> persons solely for the purpose of monitoring activities protected by
> the First Amendment.
>
> FBI Richmond prepared this Domain Perspective. Please direct
> comments and queries to the FBI Richmond Intelligence Program ...
The House received a similar
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30906&F=T&&hash=04cec691ffdb1e8a3edd0e3908f2f84e67299e8dd09d25051b188fb595b612b8]
but not identical record.

In the same email chain
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30907&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZmJpLWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS1wcm9kLTItMDExNjYtcGctMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b0cf076547687bb35db3f91280e7e2bb2d83dc9257b15fe949beb4974df2f563],
Michael Machtinger of the Counterterrorism Division (CTD) emails
colleagues Kellie Hardiman and Robert Wells, on February 8: “I spoke
at length with our RMVE SMEs [Racially/Ethnically Motivated Violent
Extremist Subject Matter Experts] and we provided this response to
[redacted] et al to help craft the OPA [Office of Public Affairs]
language.”

On the same email chain
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30908&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZmJpLWNhdGhvbGljdm90ZS1wcm9kLTItMDExNjYtcGdzLTI0LTI1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=79e22c02a3c2a4297e37cf5c851dc55e85ef8d8225e698227317b9a3318c9376]
that day Ugoretz writes to multiple colleagues:

> For the background of ALCON [All Concerned], this product type, a
> Domain Perspective, is an FBI product intended to highlight how a
> shift or new development related to an environmental variable (EV)
> may affect threats or mitigation in a particular domain. [Redacted]
>
> The Field Office's IPC is the final approver [redacted].
On February 9, Ugoretz emails

this flagrantly anti-Catholic program by the FBI was widespread, fully

SECRET SERVICE RECORDS DISCLOSE AGENCY BOATS INOPERABLE FOR OBAMA CHEF
DROWNING EMERGENCY

Slowly the troubling details of the drowning death of the Obamas’
chef are coming out.

Judicial Watch received 31 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30893&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLW9iYW1hLWNoZWYtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMzE5NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=28a65830ffa9758eb76beef2551ea9c7640d61381c8485e38d112dbbe71a92f3]
of records from the Department of Homeland Security that show the
identity of the companion of Obama’s chef Tafari Campbell as a woman
named “Ms. Taylor,” who reported that “[Campbell] fell in the
water and struggled for a couple of seconds before giving up and
sinking underwater.”

The records also show that the Secret Service could not get the first
two boats they tried to use to search for Campbell to function and had
to use the groundskeeper’s boat. Also, at least one, and possibly
multiple, agents from the Secret Service’s Little Rock, Ark., office
were involved in the search for Campbell’s body.

And we learned that when Obama arrived at the scene the search was
paused because he wanted to talk with an unidentified person.

We obtained the records thanks to an October 25, 2023, FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30578&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3Vlcy1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1hdWRpby12aXN1YWwtcmVjb3JkaW5ncy1yZWxhdGVkLWRlYXRoLW9iYW1hcy1jaGVmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8a85d66a50fb05133dc993a22cc5d5c0396c5bf5843b48f28d8ae8883c80a113]
against the United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) after
it failed to respond to an August request for Secret Service video
recordings and other records relating to the death of the Obamas’
personal chef, Tafari Campbell, in July 2023 in the Edgartown Great
Pond behind the Obamas’ estate on Martha’s Vineyard (_Judicial
Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30557&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLXRhZmFyaS1jYW1wYmVsbC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxOTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c5cb12a8762a626b7ee425fadf3b43787a122eeaf1cc217b9d6ca233450c070f
_(No. 1:23-cv-03194)).

The records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30895&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLW9iYW1hLWNoZWYtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMzE5NC1wZ3MtNS02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=cebb0809a18828164112eb263126a3d6100c9fcec4bd831ee8771e800eee0f45]
include a July 24 report from a Secret Service agent whose name is
redacted that reveals the interview details – including the name –
of Campbell’s paddle boarding companion: “Ms. Taylor stated that
Mr. Campbell was not wearing a life jacket and had no personal
flotation devices aboard the paddleboard at the time of the
incident.”

A separate report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30896&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLW9iYW1hLWNoZWYtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMzE5NC1wZ3MtMTQtMTcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2a57eb9e4b00b9c0e7b7ffe72f4e533e0dafc8fc6cb8fba4d5c7bc6643fcd06e]
notes how Campbell’s companion “collapsed on the ground and stated
that Tafari had drowned. She stated that he fell in the water and
struggled for a couple of seconds before giving up and sinking
underwater.” The agent continued, describing how a supervisory agent
and another agent “attempted to start one of the boats but had
difficulties lowering the motor. I headed down with [redacted] but
told her to continue down and yelled to SA [redacted] and SSA
[redacted] that I would run to get the keys for our USSS boat. I
sprinted to the CP [Command Post], grabbed the keys and sprinted back
towards the boats. A similar issue occurred with the motor on the
second boat. We jumped into a third boat belonging to the
groundskeeper and it worked without issue.”

The same report notes former President Obama came to the incident
scene and the search was paused so President Obama could speak to the
eyewitness:

> We continued our search with flashlights. Shortly thereafter we were
> called to Wilson’s Landing as FPOTUS Obama was there and the local
> Fire Department in conjunction with Massachusetts Police Department
> and other local agencies were setting up an Incident Command Post.
> He had wanted to talk with [redacted]. The first EMS/Police response
> we saw may have occurred within an hour. I recall seeing a small PD
> or Fire boat scanning the shoreline just after it was getting
> dark.
It is disturbing that Secret Service boats did not work for this
emergency situation. This new information perhaps explains why the
Secret Service is still hiding video related to the tragic drowning.

In October, we received 40 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30518&F=T&&hash=64edba3eaf117ff3d49eec1ec22a3ae40fe652bcd9956253a53a27dbd5901944]
of records from the Massachusetts State Police that indicate the
presence of Barack Obama for a witness interview in the death
investigation. The records, which are heavily redacted, indicate
Barack Obama arrived at the emergency response scene via motorcade. A
short time later, a cold, wet woman, who was a witness, arrived. The
next morning, the eyewitness was interviewed in the Obama residence,
seemingly with Barack Obama again present. The records also detail the
existence of a Secret Service video of Campbell and his paddleboarding
companion entering the water, and the Secret Service emergency
response in the immediate aftermath of the drowning. The State Police
records show they concluded “no foul play” in Campbell’s
“accidental” death.

In August 2023, we released records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30125&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb2JhbWFzLXBlcnNvbmFsLWNoZWYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=46c3520a6577674aba817b6f00fcd91ab5d77fde2c0228da780d1ffebef96596]
from the
Edgarton, Mass., Police Department that show the Secret Service
reported Campbell missing and that the body was found using sonar. The
records also detail that clothing was found separate from the body and
that he was not wearing a life vest.

Our lawsuit in Federal court for more information continues and I will
be sure to update you here as events warrant!

BORDER PATROL: MIGRANTS KNOW THEY WILL BE RELEASED, FUELING
IMMIGRATION CRISIS

The Biden administration has largely stopped the enforcement of our
laws against illegal immigration, and those coming know it, as our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30901&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW1taWdyYXRpb24tY3Jpc2lzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c7257c7ced4ea150dce0a10d8f9e1026375b899b9d621f741098101186c045ab].

> The Biden administration impedes Border Patrol agents from
> fulfilling their duty of securing the southwest border by
> prohibiting consequences for most individuals crossing into the
> United States illegally and instead practicing a mass release policy
> that encourages more illegal immigration. In fact, the expectation
> of “prompt release into the interior
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30913&F=T&&hash=d333e3785e25f0cafe6d68857982b19a05e7c6127e38828bdfd1f8eed6b18a0e
> has helped craft the nation’s historic border crisis, according to
> scathing material provided to a congressional panel by Border Patrol
> sector chiefs. In Arizona’s Yuma Sector alone, about 70% of
> illegal immigrants apprehended since Biden became president have
> been released inside the U.S. “There needs to be a consequence to
> the illegal activity, otherwise it won’t stop,” San Diego Sector
> Border Patrol Chief Aaron Heitke told
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30914&F=T&&hash=7f693cbc5b172764f1032cbad6d132195630af9f6974d531b100e1334632c961]
> members of the House Committee on Homeland Security. “And when you
> look at a population that’s coming, the only real consequence that
> we have is to send them back to their home country.”
>
> But that has not occurred under the Biden administration, the San
> Diego Sector chief as well as his counterparts along the Mexican
> border confirm. Lack of meaningful consequences for unlawful entry
> has created perverse incentives to enter the U.S. illegally, the
> Homeland Security committee found after extensive interviews with
> eight Border Patrol sector chiefs. Unprecedented numbers of illegal
> aliens have been released, including more than 1.6 million under
> some form of parole despite the Immigration and Nationality Act
> (INA) limiting parole to a “case by case” and “temporary”
> basis. The Border Patrol has also released over 1.2 million illegal
> immigrants with a Notice to Appear (NTA) on their own recognizance
> for hearings that are often years away and Customs and Border
> Protection’s (CBP) Office of Field Operations (OFO) has issued
> over half a million NTAs since February 2021. Also, for a brief
> period in 2021, at least 104,000 illegal aliens were released in the
> country with a Notice to Report (NTR) to an Immigration and Customs
> Enforcement (ICE) office within 60 days.
>
> Additionally, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), created
> after 9/11 to prevent another terrorist attack, frees inside the
> U.S. the overwhelming majority of illegal immigrants who use the CBP
> One App, including those from “hostile nations
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30560&F=T&&hash=2140c4c8446f2901ba4ea34a7550643c4de7b63fdb48fa1dfa1810f465173f72
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66202&L=30915&F=T&&hash=148cb393c506791aa8122a5505b21844035648e25b8b0c859c9a300e26b64774
> congressional panel found that 95.8% (278,431) of all inadmissible
> aliens who scheduled appointments through the app between Jan. 12 an
> Sept. 30, 2023 were ultimately issued an NTA and released into the
> U.S. on parole. This includes individuals from “countries of
> concern,” including Russia, China, Yemen, Lebanon, Afghanistan,
> Iraq, Iran, Pakistan, and Egypt. Nearly all the Russian, Afghan,
> Chinese and Iranian nationals who made CBP One appointments were
> released in the U.S., according to the records. Most of the Latin
> Americans were also freed into the country, including illegal
> immigrants from Mexico, Honduras, Guatemala, and Venezuela. Another
> recently created program to welcome migrants into the U.S. has
> granted 269,744 Cubans Haitians, Nicaraguans, and Venezuelans mass
> parole at ports of entry nationwide and ICE’s non-detained docket
> has grown by nearly two million while CBP has recorded 1.7 million
> known “gotaways” since Biden became commander-in-chief.
>
> Because the migrant population knows the U.S. will more than likely
> release illegal border crossers in the country, big groups are
> giving themselves up to federal agents, Border Patrol officials say.
>
> “They’re giving up because they believe they’re going to stay
> in the United States,” said Chief Border Patrol Agent John Modlin
> of Arizona’s Tucson Sector. “If not, they would be, like
> everyone else in Tucson, dressed head to toe in camouflage, running
> as fast as they could, staying up in the mountains or in the valleys
> to avoid detection by our system.” The Yuma, Arizona deputy chief,
> Dustin Caudle, confirmed that “the belief that they are going to
> be released with no consequence is certainly something that many
> migrants tell our agents.” The chief of California’s El Centro
> Sector, Gegory Bovino, told lawmakers that providing a consequence
> to someone that illegally enters the country “has a great effect
> on migration routes and those who seek to come across the border.”
> The chief of the Rio Grande Valley Sector in Texas, Gloria Chavez,
> said “when there’s not a consequence, we continue to see some of
> these surges that we—that we’re experiencing here recently.”
>
> The Biden policies have proven to be devastating. Fiscal year 2023,
> which ended in September, was a record-breaker for illegal
> immigration with a ghastly 2.48 million migrants, surpassing what
> was previously a historical high of 2.38 million in 2022. The last
> month of the fiscal year (September), federal agents encountered a
> whopping 269,735 illegal aliens constituting an all-time high for a
> single month and a substantial increase over August when CBP
> encountered 232,963 migrants. The Tucson Sector saw an unprecedented
> 109% spike in illegal immigrants during the last month of the fiscal
> year compared to August and a total 48% increase for 2023, from
> 251,984 last year to 373,625. The El Paso crossing in Texas had a
> 39% boost in illegal immigration compared to last year with 427,471
> crossings compared to 307,844 in 2022. Texas sectors located south
> of El Paso also saw large numbers of illegal immigrants, with Del
> Rio recording 393,226 and Rio Grande Valley 338,337. California got
> bombarded as well with a 31% hike in illegal aliens in San Diego and
> a 30% rise in El Centro. If there are no repercussions for violators
> the numbers will just keep growing.

Until next week,

clean_body: FBI Lied About Spying on Catholics!? [INSIDE JW] RECORDS SHOW TOP FBI LAWYERS REVIEWED CONTROVERSIAL TARGETING OF TRADITIONAL CATHOLICS [] More evidence that the FBI can’t be trusted. We received 98 pages [] of heavily redacted documents from the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) showing that the agency’s Office of General Counsel reviewed the controversial targeting [] of the Catholics by the Richmond field office of the FBI. FBI Director Christopher Wray had told [] congressmen that the memo was “a single product by a single field office,” but the records we uncovered show [] that it was “Reviewed by: OGC/CDC [Office of General Counsel/Chief Deputy Counsel].” The records also indicate coordination with officials from Portland and Milwaukee. These documents disprove the FBI’s narrative that the spy operation against Catholics and churches was limited to one field office. In fact, the operation seems to have been approved by top lawyers in the FBI. These documents should trigger a criminal inquiry into this Biden FBI scandal. We obtained the records in response to an April 2023 FOIA lawsuit [] filed with CatholicVote [] Civic Action against the FBI and the Department of Justice after they failed to respond to March 2023 requests for records about the FBI intelligence memo targeting “radical traditionalist” Catholics (CatholicVote Civic Action and Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Federal Bureau of Investigations and Department of Justice [ (No. 1:23-cv-01166)). In February 2023, an FBI intelligence document was leaked [] that showed the FBI targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues. The Catholic News Agency reported [ “The leaked document has been condemned by several federal and state officials, as well as clergy, including Bishop Barry Knestout [] of the Diocese of Richmond, who recently called the memo a ‘threat to religious liberty.’” The records include a January 23, 2023, document [] labeled “Domain Perspective – Threat Target/Facilitation Platform, FBI Richmond” that has a section titled “Interest of Racially or Ethnically Motivated Violent Extremists in Radical-Traditionalist Catholic Ideology Almost Certainly Presents New Mitigation Opportunities:” EXECUTIVE SUMMARY FBI Richmond assesses the increasingly observed interest of racially or ethnically motivated violent extremists (RMVEs) in radical-traditionalist Catholic (RTC) ideology almost certainly presents opportunities for threat mitigation through the exploration of new avenues for tripwire and source development. FBI Richmond makes this assessment with high confidence [redacted] INCREASINGLY OBSERVED INTEREST OF RMVES IN RTC IDEOLOGY ALMOST CERTAINLY PRESENTS NEW OPPORTUNITIES FOR THREAT MITIGATION FBI Richmond assesses the increasingly observed interest of RMVEs [Racially or ethnically motivated violent extremists] in RTC [Radical-Traditionalist Catholic] ideology almost certainly presents new opportunities for threat mitigation through the exploration of new avenues for tripwire and source development. This assessment is based on [redacted] REVIEWED BY: OGC/CDC [Office of General Counsel/Chief Deputy Counsel] COORDINATED WITH: SA [Special Agent] [redacted] (FBI Portland) and IA [Intelligence Agent] [redacted] (FBI Milwaukee) WARNINGS AND CAVEATS Potential criminality exhibited by certain members of a group referenced herein does not negate nor is it a comment on the constitutional rights of the group itself or its members to exercise their rights under the First Amendment to the U.S. Constitution. The FBI does not investigate, collect, or maintain information on U.S. persons solely for the purpose of monitoring activities protected by the First Amendment. FBI Richmond prepared this Domain Perspective. Please direct comments and queries to the FBI Richmond Intelligence Program ... The House received a similar [] but not identical record. In the same email chain [], Michael Machtinger of the Counterterrorism Division (CTD) emails colleagues Kellie Hardiman and Robert Wells, on February 8: “I spoke at length with our RMVE SMEs [Racially/Ethnically Motivated Violent Extremist Subject Matter Experts] and we provided this response to [redacted] et al to help craft the OPA [Office of Public Affairs] language.” On the same email chain [] that day Ugoretz writes to multiple colleagues: For the background of ALCON [All Concerned], this product type, a Domain Perspective, is an FBI product intended to highlight how a shift or new development related to an environmental variable (EV) may affect threats or mitigation in a particular domain. [Redacted] The Field Office's IPC is the final approver [redacted]. On February 9, Ugoretz emails [] multiple colleagues: Good morning, We understand there is discussion of recalling this Domain Perspective. DI [Directorate of Intelligence] conducted a preliminary review of the product’s analytic tradecraft to help inform that decision, with the following key takeaways: [redacted] A separate email chain [] that has been declassified indicates an attachment, “ATAComplicatedQuestions,” which refers to an Annual Threat Assessment. On February 16, a person whose name is redacted emails General Counsel Jason Jones and others: [Assistant Director] Dunham asked that we circulate the attached draft “Complicated Questions” document for the Director's upcoming testimony for your review. As you will see, the draft reflects feedback received from various divisions/stakeholders to date, and certain topics continue to evolve. [Office of Congressional Affairs] is hoping to have this draft finalized by COB Tuesday, February 21. The attachment itself is not included in the production of records. “Since last February, we have worked to expose this unconstitutional targeting of faithful Catholics by the FBI,” said former Congressman Tim Huelskamp, Senior Advisor to CatholicVote, “and the results are stunning, unprecedented, and should concern all Americas. Contrary to statements under oath by Director Wray and Attorney General Garland, this flagrantly anti-Catholic program by the FBI was widespread, fully supported by senior officials, authorized undercover agents to infiltrate Catholic parishes, attempted to influence elections, and may be ongoing. Meanwhile, the Biden administration has stood idly by as Catholic churches have been attacked more than 200 times since May of 2022.” We previously uncovered [] records from the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) showing top officials rushing to craft a public response to the leaked FBI intelligence memo that revealed its targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on church issues. SECRET SERVICE RECORDS DISCLOSE AGENCY BOATS INOPERABLE FOR OBAMA CHEF DROWNING EMERGENCY Slowly the troubling details of the drowning death of the Obamas’ chef are coming out. Judicial Watch received 31 pages [] of records from the Department of Homeland Security that show the identity of the companion of Obama’s chef Tafari Campbell as a woman named “Ms. Taylor,” who reported that “[Campbell] fell in the water and struggled for a couple of seconds before giving up and sinking underwater.” The records also show that the Secret Service could not get the first two boats they tried to use to search for Campbell to function and had to use the groundskeeper’s boat. Also, at least one, and possibly multiple, agents from the Secret Service’s Little Rock, Ark., office were involved in the search for Campbell’s body. And we learned that when Obama arrived at the scene the search was paused because he wanted to talk with an unidentified person. We obtained the records thanks to an October 25, 2023, FOIA lawsuit [] against the United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) after it failed to respond to an August request for Secret Service video recordings and other records relating to the death of the Obamas’ personal chef, Tafari Campbell, in July 2023 in the Edgartown Great Pond behind the Obamas’ estate on Martha’s Vineyard (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:23-cv-03194)). The records [] include a July 24 report from a Secret Service agent whose name is redacted that reveals the interview details – including the name – of Campbell’s paddle boarding companion: “Ms. Taylor stated that Mr. Campbell was not wearing a life jacket and had no personal flotation devices aboard the paddleboard at the time of the incident.” A separate report [] notes how Campbell’s companion “collapsed on the ground and stated that Tafari had drowned. She stated that he fell in the water and struggled for a couple of seconds before giving up and sinking underwater.” The agent continued, describing how a supervisory agent and another agent “attempted to start one of the boats but had difficulties lowering the motor. I headed down with [redacted] but told her to continue down and yelled to SA [redacted] and SSA [redacted] that I would run to get the keys for our USSS boat. I sprinted to the CP [Command Post], grabbed the keys and sprinted back towards the boats. A similar issue occurred with the motor on the second boat. We jumped into a third boat belonging to the groundskeeper and it worked without issue.” The same report notes former President Obama came to the incident scene and the search was paused so President Obama could speak to the eyewitness: We continued our search with flashlights. Shortly thereafter we were called to Wilson’s Landing as FPOTUS Obama was there and the local Fire Department in conjunction with Massachusetts Police Department and other local agencies were setting up an Incident Command Post. He had wanted to talk with [redacted]. The first EMS/Police response we saw may have occurred within an hour. I recall seeing a small PD or Fire boat scanning the shoreline just after it was getting dark. It is disturbing that Secret Service boats did not work for this emergency situation. This new information perhaps explains why the Secret Service is still hiding video related to the tragic drowning. In October, we received 40 pages [] of records from the Massachusetts State Police that indicate the presence of Barack Obama for a witness interview in the death investigation. The records, which are heavily redacted, indicate Barack Obama arrived at the emergency response scene via motorcade. A short time later, a cold, wet woman, who was a witness, arrived. The next morning, the eyewitness was interviewed in the Obama residence, seemingly with Barack Obama again present. The records also detail the existence of a Secret Service video of Campbell and his paddleboarding companion entering the water, and the Secret Service emergency response in the immediate aftermath of the drowning. The State Police records show they concluded “no foul play” in Campbell’s “accidental” death. In August 2023, we released records [] from the Edgarton, Mass., Police Department that show the Secret Service reported Campbell missing and that the body was found using sonar. The records also detail that clothing was found separate from the body and that he was not wearing a life vest. Our lawsuit in Federal court for more information continues and I will be sure to update you here as events warrant! BORDER PATROL: MIGRANTS KNOW THEY WILL BE RELEASED, FUELING IMMIGRATION CRISIS The Biden administration has largely stopped the enforcement of our laws against illegal immigration, and those coming know it, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. The Biden administration impedes Border Patrol agents from fulfilling their duty of securing the southwest border by prohibiting consequences for most individuals crossing into the United States illegally and instead practicing a mass release policy that encourages more illegal immigration. In fact, the expectation of “prompt release into the interior [ has helped craft the nation’s historic border crisis, according to scathing material provided to a congressional panel by Border Patrol sector chiefs. In Arizona’s Yuma Sector alone, about 70% of illegal immigrants apprehended since Biden became president have been released inside the U.S. “There needs to be a consequence to the illegal activity, otherwise it won’t stop,” San Diego Sector Border Patrol Chief Aaron Heitke told [] members of the House Committee on Homeland Security. “And when you look at a population that’s coming, the only real consequence that we have is to send them back to their home country.” But that has not occurred under the Biden administration, the San Diego Sector chief as well as his counterparts along the Mexican border confirm. Lack of meaningful consequences for unlawful entry has created perverse incentives to enter the U.S. illegally, the Homeland Security committee found after extensive interviews with eight Border Patrol sector chiefs. Unprecedented numbers of illegal aliens have been released, including more than 1.6 million under some form of parole despite the Immigration and Nationality Act (INA) limiting parole to a “case by case” and “temporary” basis. The Border Patrol has also released over 1.2 million illegal immigrants with a Notice to Appear (NTA) on their own recognizance for hearings that are often years away and Customs and Border Protection’s (CBP) Office of Field Operations (OFO) has issued over half a million NTAs since February 2021. Also, for a brief period in 2021, at least 104,000 illegal aliens were released in the country with a Notice to Report (NTR) to an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) office within 60 days. Additionally, the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), created after 9/11 to prevent another terrorist attack, frees inside the U.S. the overwhelming majority of illegal immigrants who use the CBP One App, including those from “hostile nations [ [ congressional panel found that 95.8% (278,431) of all inadmissible aliens who scheduled appointments through the app between Jan. 12 an Sept. 30, 2023 were ultimately issued an NTA and released into the U.S. on parole. This includes individuals from “countries of concern,” including Russia, China, Yemen, Lebanon, Afghanistan, Iraq, Iran, Pakistan, and Egypt. Nearly all the Russian, Afghan, Chinese and Iranian nationals who made CBP One appointments were released in the U.S., according to the records. Most of the Latin Americans were also freed into the country, including illegal immigrants from Mexico, Honduras, Guatemala, and Venezuela. Another recently created program to welcome migrants into the U.S. has granted 269,744 Cubans Haitians, Nicaraguans, and Venezuelans mass parole at ports of entry nationwide and ICE’s non-detained docket has grown by nearly two million while CBP has recorded 1.7 million known “gotaways” since Biden became commander-in-chief. Because the migrant population knows the U.S. will more than likely release illegal border crossers in the country, big groups are giving themselves up to federal agents, Border Patrol officials say. “They’re giving up because they believe they’re going to stay in the United States,” said Chief Border Patrol Agent John Modlin of Arizona’s Tucson Sector. “If not, they would be, like everyone else in Tucson, dressed head to toe in camouflage, running as fast as they could, staying up in the mountains or in the valleys to avoid detection by our system.” The Yuma, Arizona deputy chief, Dustin Caudle, confirmed that “the belief that they are going to be released with no consequence is certainly something that many migrants tell our agents.” The chief of California’s El Centro Sector, Gegory Bovino, told lawmakers that providing a consequence to someone that illegally enters the country “has a great effect on migration routes and those who seek to come across the border.” The chief of the Rio Grande Valley Sector in Texas, Gloria Chavez, said “when there’s not a consequence, we continue to see some of these surges that we—that we’re experiencing here recently.” The Biden policies have proven to be devastating. Fiscal year 2023, which ended in September, was a record-breaker for illegal immigration with a ghastly 2.48 million migrants, surpassing what was previously a historical high of 2.38 million in 2022. The last month of the fiscal year (September), federal agents encountered a whopping 269,735 illegal aliens constituting an all-time high for a single month and a substantial increase over August when CBP encountered 232,963 migrants. The Tucson Sector saw an unprecedented 109% spike in illegal immigrants during the last month of the fiscal year compared to August and a total 48% increase for 2023, from 251,984 last year to 373,625. The El Paso crossing in Texas had a 39% boost in illegal immigration compared to last year with 427,471 crossings compared to 307,844 in 2022. Texas sectors located south of El Paso also saw large numbers of illegal immigrants, with Del Rio recording 393,226 and Rio Grande Valley 338,337. California got bombarded as well with a 31% hike in illegal aliens in San Diego and a 30% rise in El Centro. If there are no repercussions for violators the numbers will just keep growing. Hi Fellow American, it’s Speaker Mike Johnson and I had to email you with these two urgent updates...

1. Democrats are BEATING US at fundraising... they’ve brought in more than $44 million this cycle, and that number is climbing every single day.

2. Our razor-thin majority is SHRINKING, making it easier for Nancy Pelosi to retake the House and granting Democrats FULL control in Washington.

I know times are tough right now, but I’m incredibly concerned about the state of our country... and if we don’t see a surge in donations before the year is up, we’ll be giving Democrats the momentum they need to beat us BIG in 2024. [**So, I’m humbly asking for your gift of any amount you can spare in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b16d0e572804b8ab68196b0c71a2b4f&_e=cXwSEI3n80j7JTxAXSsAlQ1Jc9mkJFraf8DpHLnyP2cjUGBwMjZ1R7OcCCpyTof9-mtCtp0Ydc5sIiOrCoq7IcyaiolBPHSBs2Z6pZA7jHLV3AJsdNZwX6WQg-1XTYJEMtVKcaP1RmMRGLw0XAyG-sEk9gIJ1GY8kV5XuILcvAKURgVBcMXv5Hg6g90iczUDTxIU25bOd_GuVwpCkHevu8LNblu4AH36aMgLHvk4ErSNQlfkN62CqMtguVHqBGdkLvZqGhFI5d6qV4k6Y4CGVyobF_nTS-rYaQ3LKtxUBHQ3IucWWlZ7a0O07HGej3ON5qMIJ9BTgZ61EUbpU_DA442kH3MRE5ZQnyykPz22C9PZHIU1Cte2ThZ7StW_N9YOZybr5ytfvLiUgc0Fu1Bk7IaVvn6njxDiR5_XnLbmMbY%3D)

[** STEP UP IMMEDIATELY **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b16d0e572804b8ab68196b0c71a2b4f&_e=cXwSEI3n80j7JTxAXSsAlQ1Jc9mkJFraf8DpHLnyP2cjUGBwMjZ1R7OcCCpyTof9-mtCtp0Ydc5sIiOrCoq7IcyaiolBPHSBs2Z6pZA7jHLV3AJsdNZwX6WQg-1XTYJEMtVKcaP1RmMRGLw0XAyG-sEk9gIJ1GY8kV5XuILcvAKURgVBcMXv5Hg6g90iczUDTxIU25bOd_GuVwpCkHevu8LNblu4AH36aMgLHvk4ErSNQlfkN62CqMtguVHqBGdkLvZqGhFI5d6qV4k6Y4CGV3Bkud0neWB21FiRw4GeAp2KL2Pe2jivUv05Cu4stz_tHnVVdZ1zWnbgOLr1LputFF7VFd2HYP29LyU4EXD2TtjQ0CW-1_pCJNZpenoOmgCeaKpNst_8zo40MD_TuME8LfPBbfPui03F09-lXcrhLQg%3D)
You already know how bad things are, Fellow American. But imagine the state of our country next year if Democrats control all three branches of government. _**They’ll have unlimited power to ram through their radical, woke agenda.**_

**Just think... OPEN borders, UNSECURED elections, Government hand-outs for ALL (including non-Americans), corruption run AMUCK, violent CRIME in our streets, woke politics in our schools... _the list goes on and ON._**

[**Which is why I’m looking for every conservative across the country to step up and FIGHT back against the Democratic fundraising surge and ensure we have the resources to GROW the majority.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b16d0e572804b8ab68196b0c71a2b4f&_e=cXwSEI3n80j7JTxAXSsAlQ1Jc9mkJFraf8DpHLnyP2cjUGBwMjZ1R7OcCCpyTof9-mtCtp0Ydc5sIiOrCoq7IcyaiolBPHSBs2Z6pZA7jHLV3AJsdNZwX6WQg-1XTYJEMtVKcaP1RmMRGLw0XAyG-sEk9gIJ1GY8kV5XuILcvAKURgVBcMXv5Hg6g90iczUDTxIU25bOd_GuVwpCkHevu8LNblu4AH36aMgLHvk4ErSNQlfkN62CqMtguVHqBGdkLvZqGhFI5d6qV4k6Y4CGV-cslByTVExeFAJeLolZqInB_mBSGmY56gKy8rchI-mo11P_OBbQoi8uTiq6NmpMjbVR5ggB81WsplHfaMsH62egqkdaRMK2YE2tjHDTY2Z5uQxvDW38gSc4sDL6X2P_2UBEZND-EFIi0lSitZGSBC8%3D)

I hope I can rely on you.

In service,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b16d0e572804b8ab68196b0c71a2b4f&_e=cXwSEI3n80j7JTxAXSsAlbJoV4QwC5ImaTQ-vArhKT2EXGIa8Gve7RbT94lxiowxI8QROIlADTVcBT0HSHR7om6qxnpmxra55MAIGwxvV_w62dARmsKOeOlmM8BVpw856mSqAgZaWENgnprm2ugob2p_PK25tf9IXWUD-tDvx0ft8q92Zs5OFtSMMasqBXVYIxfJFJ1OdEyQIS1icKfvsBUPc9svxMUj430MAqieyawB9ZtC3Jzv1Zho1qU4bCmib3g1O192du00bq9zB4QigRY4ReTvZUJKKlyiowntacvSjux0DmhpyijA1sqiXJ_tN_J4BiFZxAcWr6TN9BKA0AWztVh4mPK4LRPNeA_RKQCaR9HuYd4TDb-UDi3wI_mMb6jVyNA3Bl7gGnMO-_rNZEnYUL76G8PhMTN2nf31XVAjDyDXJVFcAZdjZTMWg4g4nYsmvAGT5cLPz5zgLQuqabX49NvTF9Mimcw25UgTa8du2Izdkfy_qgUIvycym6dTf-wonBya8aWwZahJTCTVHDwQuwgqV1-53j9W3H3hJ0TjQATaxGoN77dv_EjCvfimL3xf2J2kYwOhPJqzj_O0mw%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**

clean_body: The Democrat judge in my SHAM TRIAL just said... | | | | | Patriot, The Democrat judge in my sham “corporate death penalty” trial in New York has made crystal clear that he could care less about evidence – especially evidence that PROVES my innocence! In fact, before my attorneys even had the opportunity to present the mountain of evidence and testimony, this judge had already presumed me guilty of “fraud.” But now, after demonstrating my INNOCENCE in court – and that this is nothing more than another one of the Left’s vicious witch hunts – my attorneys have requested a directed verdict to wrap up this trial IMMEDIATELY and CLEAR me of these phony charges. But what did this judge (who’s donated to Democrats, I might add!) have to say before even reading the motion?... “There's no way I’m going to grant that.” This is a slap in the face of true justice! When you enter the courtroom PRESUMED GUILTY – and are still presumed guilty after PROVING YOUR INNOCENCE – then we’re no longer living in America, Patriot. We might as well be living in Maoist China or Stalinist Russia, for that matter! And under Crooked Joe’s regime , that’s exactly what we’ve got. A sitting president and ruling party who have weaponized our justice system to try and destroy their leading opponent and the ONE and ONLY MAN who can defeat them in 2024. But, as I’ve said time and again, they can attack me all they want, strip me of my constitutional rights, threaten me with life in prison, force me to take a mugshot, and seek the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, but there’s ONE THING they will NEVER get away with... ...Robbing YOU of your country! Because WE will NEVER ,EVER SURRENDER to their tyranny! With YOU at my side, we will counter their lies, attacks, and vicious witch hunts at every turn. We will prevail just as we always have. And come November 5, 2024, we will receive the ultimate vindication – and the ultimate prize: an America made GREAT AGAIN! If you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t donate at this time. I only wanted to update you on this grave injustice of a “trial.” Thank you, Donald J. You see, these fundraising emails are the only way grassroots-funded campaigns like ours can compete with the Super PACs.
I know they can get annoying – especially if you’re hearing from a lot of campaigns. So if you need to unsubscribe, I understand. clean_body: I really hate sending emails like this. But I made the decision not to take contributions from corporate PACs, and we cannot afford to let Lauren Boebert out-spend us again. Especially not when we lost by just 546 votes last time. Hello, I really hate sending emails asking for money. But I made the decision not to take contributions from corporate PACs, and we cannot afford to let Lauren Boebert out-spend us again. Especially not when we lost by just 546 votes in 2022. You see, these fundraising emails are the only way grassroots-funded campaigns like ours can compete with the Super PACs. I know they can get annoying – especially if you’re hearing from a lot of campaigns. So if you need to unsubscribe, I understand. = We’re facing our final mid-month fundraising deadline of the year at midnight tonight, and we’re still just $14,338 short of our $250,000 goal. Lauren Boebert knows she is in trouble. That’s why her extreme Washington allies have already started attacking me. All of the political pundits got this race wrong last time. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight said we would lose by over 45,000 votes. But this time, they’re all saying we can win. This is a "toss-up" race. We cannot afford to miss this goal – not if we want to send Boebert packing. But I am relying entirely on grassroots donors like you, so I need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am, as always, eternally grateful to have your support, With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Hi Peter — I know it’s getting late, so I’ll keep this short. subject: As a key member of this grassroots team, here’s how you stack up to the 21,066 Biden supporters in Pennsylvania:

body:
We’ve received a number of individual donations so far -- including contributions from your state. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. | | |
---

clean_body: We’ve received a number of individual donations so far -- including contributions from your state. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. | | | In the past few months since we've launched this campaign we've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- including contributions from 21,066 folks in Pennsylvania. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you, Peter. Our records show that you haven’t chipped in to the Biden-Harris reelection campaign yet -- and we’re relying on this team to double down today. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | December is one of the most important fundraising deadlines of the presidential election -- the final FEC deadline before the on-year. Our opponents will use what we report to the FEC to measure the strength of our campaign and this grassroots team. It may not seem like $1 can make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one will be, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already chipped in their $1. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Thank you for your support, Kyle Kyle Middleton Director of Email and SMS

name: Adam Schiff
subject: He won’t go quietly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Unfortunately for Trump, I’m not stopping now, and I never will. No matter what he throws at me. It’s empowering to know I have you by my side through it all.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4770%2E5257348%2EkL71Re)
Hey Derek,
It’s Adam. I wanted to send you a quick message: **Our final mid-month fundraising deadline of the year is just a few short hours away.**
All year long, you’ve helped our campaign respond to the relentless attacks MAGA Republicans and their media allies hurled my way while building what will be the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California. When Donald Trump launched baseless attacks against me and his allies censured me for doing my constitutional duty, you stood by my side. I am honored that nearly a quarter-million of you have chosen to financially support our campaign.
We all know Donald Trump isn’t going to allow the legal process in his multiple criminal cases to play out quietly — _especially_ as the Republican presidential nominee.
He will attempt to place himself above the rule of law, becoming even more emboldened to attack anyone who has played an important role in holding him accountable.
Unfortunately for Trump, I’m not stopping now, and I never will. No matter what he throws at me. It’s empowering to know I have you by my side through it all, Derek.
**[Will you add a donation of $3 or more to help us finish this year — and our final FEC quarter before this primary election — in the strongest possible way? # Iowa Update on Zoom with Ryan Binkley this Monday!
On January 15, the Iowa Caucus will be the first presidential primary of 2024. Iowa plays a pivotal role in election year politics, and can change the course of the primary race, literally overnight!

Ryan and the Binkley 2024 team will be on Zoom this Monday, December 18, to discuss the Caucus and how you can be involved. The meeting starts at 7pm CT / 8pm ET.
