name: Trump News HQ
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2p5d8t70romvfkpjg4c3kvo3iqgmv0ls91thaf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth60o75clh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0cm3r1hj5v9k601c35bligfs87cbtivnitdqpq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth60o75clh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztjdaoe7gfu036ig3c4amkod9b058qj9q8l1dn8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth60o75clh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjf46s7l65pv1tjk5c8i4n4jqa6jbmak2qsl23e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth60o75clh2bs)
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3roinmgnkmgaa4hcd1919jgvnsso3uihaghmg40_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob0sjh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmfhfoqfnmsq4kegdli45f8hi6908m7tp7lk0vk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob0sjh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z27in3t942luna1gmkti8vjr0vmh0rq4vc4no6h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob0sjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zseqnre19le0r1a28m85r6b61ou6dd0hl75fqpa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob0sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9i6eoj4sjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbtkkema0uasqopr8ohbfkhfe5me56gaam3rpds0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob0sjh2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgo07f4ga80dlcd88rsdl59veuhj4uob0sitc2ng_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c9jm4ob1c3ie49fg)

# Study: This Could Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhvehm5hbjtu291cl7snqai2382ql0jq8ukf61cg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors who serve your area, free!_
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z145r0sur1r680cullpstedpkeucajdel5s1tv3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs)
---
| With a volatile stock market, potential recession alerts and high inflation, investors are (understandably) looking to safeguard their assets.

The move to consider? Professional financial advice. Investment firm Charles Schwab analyzed its customers' account data, and the research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have [saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhh85u0e1buaicp2en001km3rai4h33ido174o7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs).1

**Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?**
Analysts at Schwab dug into the data from its customers' Personal Choice Retirement Accounts® (PCRAs), self-directed brokerage accounts offered within employer sponsored retirement plans.

Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022:
* Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438
* Non-advised participants: $236,2061

Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders.

**Why Work With a Financial Advisor**
[Working with a financial advisor](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhvk4ph1lvp8u1dr8u9rpasbsvmd5qkt4kkq2g68_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs) could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress.

While the idea of seeking professional advice may seem like an unnecessary expense, the cost of not working with a financial advisor could be far greater. Want to know more about fees and potential value of working with an advisor? [Read more here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z107k51g71jn7jqjhqma3j0juq6j3a5cvka7vsi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs)

**How to Find a Vetted Financial Advisor Who Serves Your Area**
With thousands of options available, SmartAsset’s [no-cost tool](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl14f0msnrjbudtbjf2rlg273ku6l2vp424gbb48_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area. Advisors are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest. It’s never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9d3kdmb6fspe7p7h1lcelnppkvoompp633r3fgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob1c5h2bs)
---
|

| This article contains links to SmartAsset's financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor).

This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest.

SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset's services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user's account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments.

We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors.

SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances.

Investment firm Charles Schwab analyzed its customers' account data, and the research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings? Analysts at Schwab dug into the data from its customers' Personal Choice Retirement Accounts® (PCRAs), self-directed brokerage accounts offered within employer sponsored retirement plans. Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022: Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438 Non-advised participants: $236,2061 Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders. Why Work With a Financial Advisor could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress. While the idea of seeking professional advice may seem like an unnecessary expense, the cost of not working with a financial advisor could be far greater. Want to know more about fees and potential value of working with an advisor? How to Find a Vetted Financial Advisor Who Serves Your Area With thousands of options available, SmartAsset’s simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area. Advisors are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest. It’s never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement. | | Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool Get retirement ready. ---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znmse6pnspctb5v7o0v7iudhuj088indcc9dq9e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62ob6clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdehe30vnrt91f9qbett1edpmrbfcqpn427fi0eg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62pb5c9h2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpt4u3luscbla4irdi32d42si30ioua6c1mcre7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62pb5c9h2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlsgvpo1b5q8708trs24q7iv83k9393g0ts104e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62pb5c9h2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znh5fkn4locd5qhlgdqec7hpfb4mhghqam35aj20_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62pb5c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6j68f5duntu0ftiuaoj4ft8rk5qr0bnlulenu0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64p37cpg60oh1k8gn48n24hjm0oj7c9gmapb2c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdlvfnvfal8di705s40pn4u6pds5i9psg8fdf3j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth62pb5c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb9vjeor9k3gmdn4218ot27c5r8ebvp831l9dm9g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c9jm4ob5clh649fg)

name: Team Mike Soboleski 2024
subject: UPDATE: Mike is at the Trump primary hearing
body:
watch the livestream here
No images? [Click here](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xjhulit-ddldgdkhd-d/) **IMPORTANT UPDATE** Peter,We wanted to give you an important update on the effort to remove President Trump from the Maine primary ballot.**Three Trump****attorneys**** and Mike are currently in the room right now defending President Trump!**Mike has filed a Letter of Invention to speak on behalf of the Maine people. You can watch the livestream by clicking on the YouTube link below. [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhulit-ddldgdkhd-r/) **WATCH THE LIVESTREAM HERE**[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvBkgW893g8](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhulit-ddldgdkhd-y/)More than 2,000 Maine Republican voters have signed his nominating petitions, and his name should appear on the ballot - in accordance with Maine laws.To obstruct President Trump's access to our Presidential Ballot is to blatantly disenfranchise the voters who signed his petitions and to disenfranchise all Mainers who may CHOOSE to vote for Donald Trump, or to vote for someone else.That's what's at stake here - the constitutional right of Maine Republicans to make **THEIR OWN CHOICE** as to who will represent our Party next November.Stay Safe,Team Mike Soboleski 2024 \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Mike Soboleski**
Date: Thu, Dec 14, 2023
Subject: Trump must be on Maine's primary ballot Peter,Here's to the latest edition of my _** "We the People"**_ update!Changing our country starts with listening to the people. **PRESIDENT TRUMP MUST BE ON MAINE'S PRIMARY BALLOT** Right now, bureaucrats and special interest groups are trying to keep President Trump off the Maine's primary ballot.**I won 't stand for it.**President Donald J. Trump qualified for the Maine 2024 Primary Ballot by collecting the required signatures. **_Many of you reading this update signed his nominating petition._** I wholeheartedly support President Trump, and I will vote for him in the March 2024 Primary.Any effort to prevent a Republican presidential candidate, who has gathered the necessary signatures, from appearing on the ballot is just wrong.This is just another attempt to censor Republicans like what's been happening for too long.I will be attending the 10 AM hearing tomorrow at the Maine State Capitol in Augusta, where I will speak out and defend President Trump. I'm in this race for long haul all the way to victory in the Republican primary!Stay Safe, Representative Mike Soboleski
Republican Candidate for Congress- CD-2 [CHECK OUT MY CAMPAIGN WEBSITE](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhulit-ddldgdkhd-i/) | | **Mike Soboleski for Congress** PO Box 603Augusta, ME 04332 **Mike Soboleski** is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country is going in the wrong direction. [Preferences](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/y-xjhulit-150DA8AB-ddldgdkhd-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xjhulit-ddldgdkhd-u/)
---

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37843%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qty5Msve1dKovRredTH%2fqg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37844%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VZ9sp%2bItvKKFJhZn89LR4w&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37955%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pKpCdIRaybs%2bpaiddDOm%2bw&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37956%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=06BHpV%2bYSNA2470zt5mAyA&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

### _Friday, December 15, 2023_
Tommy Devito has taken over New York and New Jersey. The transfer portal is absolutely out of control in college football. A white alligator was born in Florida and James might know who the father is. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/hsnfcwllcdszddplzssgvzmdjczhwjjdqwgpjqsbsvbswf_wsnsswwvwlvjbdnflnvdsff.html)

### _Wednesday, December 13, 2023_
The Congress is getting ready to adjourn for Christmas with a pile left on the plate. I discuss today the issues that are unresolved and why leadership is desperately needed! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/phcvmlrrmgybggkrbyyshbdgwmbclwwgqlskwqyjyhjych_wsnsswwvwlvjbdnflnvdsff.html)

### _Monday, December 11, 2023_
Senator Ron Johnson has been on the forefront of a lot of battles in D.C., he joins the program to discuss topics like Ukraine, our boarders, and the issues facing the house and senate. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/zrsfslggscbkccqgkbbtrkdcvskwlvvcmltqvmbpbrpbwp_wsnsswwvwlvjbdnflnvdsff.html)

name: American Update
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687840%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0o60qFtONCEQZjVFNJd91w&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687841%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AlyCaoTa2YUIhSH9msXYYQ&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b%2f%2bvsD6UfBjGXhTiGV%2fgUg&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687843%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ncDr3UMtUVGuzK3mpZBIEQ&sysid=1)
---

# **[Illinois won't target pro-life pregnancy centers after being accused of weaponizing government](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Illinois will not enforce a law that targets the practices of pro-life pregnancy resource centers and seeks to prevent these organizations from engaging in what their critics have claimed are "deceptive practices."

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0gmanq0e9b8too52h1qkrevqinnsfe8lo002m90_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o32cjh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8avv0aa9hgu7qpa2mrhl0usl9bbsk7gnukepemg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o32cjh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu4cg02rjgtboca7fnh82k9ila95slcc9e6iofa0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o32cjh2bs)**
---

---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zijtl6tt6bt93hiiujl7u5j5i9u1qt9f6ssuv7pg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o34clh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc2dmm53fcjiqtlj4tiaaensom97b0ku8kno0kb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o34clh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsrc6hccdk7nufl874lr5tnot8nje6o9r6dlfnpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o34clh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zss3r0in9j5dekqmjj91n9dd9knlome4s0m8pg78_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o34clh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zar5in2vtbt8hdm4pi7nfloib7t7aqb0ptlaphp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9i6epj0cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1u6fd16b7t68rc6vd3ue583j4edr7g9uju3rjt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61o34clh2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs3ieahovjmc0rpnuavlfrmqoq7paf6kp1q6tdd8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c9jm4o70chim49fg)

subject: Could This Money Move Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?
body:
*|MC:SUBJECT|*
Take Retirement Quiz

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze7rpua5husog2389seftvrt3mof3i4v7us6bmeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61p30clh2bs)
---
|
# Study: This Could Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3h0lf9r6rdl7gj0t89es3c5f7pjaevkso0d89dg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61p30clh2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors who serve your area, free!_
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmg3gk3rsvpnkmthr57bq2ss5vem8gsud7nc3k78_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61p30clh2bs)
---
| With a volatile stock market, potential recession alerts and high inflation, investors are (understandably) looking to safeguard their assets.

The move to consider? Professional financial advice. Investment firm Charles Schwab analyzed its customers' account data, and the research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have [saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm9entlf2bthokupiuafoqf239vppfhuni0eij08_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61p30clh2bs).1

**Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?**
Analysts at Schwab dug into the data from its customers' Personal Choice Retirement Accounts® (PCRAs), self-directed brokerage accounts offered within employer sponsored retirement plans.

Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022:
* Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438
* Non-advised participants: $236,2061

Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders.

**Why Work With a Financial Advisor**
[Working with a financial advisor](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6j6en1027ab9kt9gl3mihhmf6g5b4aos5sf9ga0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cth61p30clh2bs) could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress.

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Biden's "Strategic Plans" for Election Interference
body:
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687959%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cr%2fY6KxLOH4mNYdKO3H1VQ&sysid=1)
---

Fellow Patriot, _As you well know, the Biden Administration has weaponized nearly every part of the federal government to advance its radical agenda.**And now time is running out for us to ensure that Biden’s Deep State apparatus doesn’t interfere with the elections in 2024 ...**_ That’s why my team at America First Legal is in federal court fighting to force the government to release the “Strategic Plans” of fourteen different federal agencies that describe their secret efforts to prepare for the elections in 2024. **Quick Recap:** President Biden’s Executive Order 14019, titled “ _Promoting Access to Voting_ ,” called for each agency to submit to a “Strategic Plan” to promote mail-in voting schemes, expand multilingual voter registration and election communication, and distribute voter registration and mail-in ballots among many other suspicious preparatory moves. _**We must expose and stop these nefarious plans!**_ [_**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT BACK >>_**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687950%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wwKvT6lnx7rmdMl%2bI9Yy6A&sysid=1) In this crucial fight, we continued our urgent legal action in the Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit this past week. This case stems from our lawsuit against the 14 federal agencies for concealing their “Strategic Plans” for implementing Biden’s executive order (EO. 14019) which clearly paves the way for their interference in elections as described above. If we fail, Biden and the far-left Deep State may gain even more power to interfere with and rig our elections for their own benefit. America First Legal is absolutely committed to exposing the government’s scheme to rig the next election to prolong the current leftist dystopia. **We are one of the only conservative groups aggressively targeting the most serious threats from the Deep State without fear or hesitation - when you support us, the impact is immediate and efficacious -**[**please consider**** _supporting us strongly again_****right now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687951%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vqkAbVnuQ%2bQZAy6PrbcESQ&sysid=1)**.** _Thank you!_
| [**DONATE NOW >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687952%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MVgXPhFI5CEhuJztmku%2f3w&sysid=1)
---
Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Derrick Van Orden, Ret. Navy SEAL Senior Chief
subject: Guys like me are a dime a dozen. I'm a Christian. I drive a pick-up truck. I don't have a degree from Princeton or Yale.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
And just like you Friend, I'm 100% conservative.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr6e69pq3sqekmpsck2kou2p9ikcp9vs1na1ekg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32ctj68pr4cjh2bs "Derrick Van Orden")
---
Guys like me are a dime a dozen. I'm a Christian. I drive a pick-up truck. I don't have a degree from Princeton or Yale.

**And just like you Friend, I'm 100% conservative.**

According to Sleepy Joe Biden, that makes us "political extremists."

My name is Derrick Van Orden.

You probably haven't heard of me, but I'm a Ret. Navy SEAL Senior Chief & Afghanistan & Iraq War veteran from a rural town you've never heard of before. I did 5 combat deployments.

__I went to war against REAL extremists like al-Qaeda and the Taliban.__

Friend, I'm in the most competitive race in America - the ONE seat that WILL decide 2024.

_**[I need you to do me a favor by chipping in just a few bucks by midnight to help me win!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zst0tp8cr9jhoedhic2m3pliei4g5ip5foh6dvf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32ctj68pr4cjh2bs "I need you to do me a favor by chipping in just a few bucks by midnight to help me win:")**_

I'm asking you this favor on behalf of all the forgotten men and women of this country who are just like us...the silent majority that Sleepy Joe Biden smears as "political extremists."

Right now, I have the ability to take them on. As a Navy SEAL, I know how, and with your help, _I will_.

Thank you & God Bless.
Derrick

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64d5e708827b349ce7437b926219272f7f7cf950169b51c9be30dcc1336a4d40a05f7893654d7c12813933ab36fc1480c335499a846ffdace55 Hey there, Peter, You may not know me, but it’s Navy Veteran, Congresswoman, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom Jen Kiggans here. It would mean a lot to me if you would take a moment to read about something close to my heart. I grew up in a home where we flew the flag above the garage door every day. My dad was an Army Green Beret and Vietnam Veteran, and he would take time to salute the flag going to work. Years later, I joined the Navy and served for 10 years flying helicopters. It was there that I met my husband and now, I am the proud mom of future Veterans. Not only am I a Veteran myself, but I come from a family who’s dedicated to a life of service. We have and will continue to dedicate our lives to the protection and service of our country. Even though I am retired from the military now, I continue my mission of serving and protecting America and doing the best I can for ALL its citizens. This is why Veterans' issues are so important to me, Peter. I’ve used my own GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Nurse Practitioner. It’s essential that we prioritize giving much-needed support to those who deserve it most. This is why I promise to continue fighting to deliver on my promises–I’m not a career politician. I won’t lie to you or make false promises. I will fight with everything I have to deliver REAL results to hard-working Americans. This is why I’m personally sending around a petition to gather support for our Veterans. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64d5e708827b349ce7437b926219272f7f7cf950169b51c9be30dcc1336a4d40a05f7893654d7c12813933ab36fc1480c335499a846ffdace55 I’ve set an ambitious goal to get 500 signatures by 11:59 PM tonight. Do you think you can help me? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64d5e708827b349ce7437b926219272f7f7cf950169b51c9be30dcc1336a4d40a05f7893654d7c12813933ab36fc1480c335499a846ffdace55 SIGN THE PETITION > SUPPORT OUR VETS It would mean so much to me if you could join my mission and help support our Veterans across America, Peter. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64d5e708827b349ce7437b926219272f7f7cf950169b51c9be30dcc1336a4d40a05f7893654d7c12813933ab36fc1480c335499a846ffdace55 SIGN THE PETITION > SUPPORT OUR VETS Together, we can accomplish incredible things and make a real difference! -Congresswoman Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64dca7957fecbb2b810c41f12bbebfa54b7804b7adb7f2d0114c5bf6a33d90877bfe77eacfc6893fa28f7c9836a4e535605326bf775a2ff188d JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64de257aeadcfee12a78ca9d09efc9c339b7337a37df2e4c224cc14b124dde9ee0e9fa8b6088a1374eb74127354e60d68893eac68f1e97258a8 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=06834d8163adc64d3ec5a16d4c368632eaf564b268db08988f9acd47f02948786da384c9f29b1e2524f45601a2b078aa74b9bc0e3232379c258d5e66a711dd84 here . name: SmartAsset
subject: The 7 Biggest Mistakes People Make With Financial Advisors
body:
choosing the wrong one could wreak havoc on your retirement.

| | | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37963%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5r3swLlwJQcQ4G%2f67lnJog&sysid=1)
---
|
# 7 Mistakes People Make When Hiring a Financial Advisor
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37964%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KhIFGhjp0mJHjpQPqknHlQ&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors who serve your area, free!_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37963%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5r3swLlwJQcQ4G%2f67lnJog&sysid=1)
---
| _Life should be a balance of adventure and relaxation - not finances._ Enter: Working with a financial advisor. But [choosing the wrong one](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37975%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U6C17G688qu60F18SosC3w&sysid=1) could wreak havoc on your retirement.

According to a 2022 Northwestern Mutual study, over 60% of US adults think their financial planning skills need improvement -- and yet, only 36% of them work with a financial advisor.1

_Why?_ With thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. Plus, it can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. But some things are better left to the professionals. While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor:
* Feel more at ease about their finances, and
* Could end up with 15% more money to spend in retirement.2

_So, how does that play out over time? _
Let’s pretend we have $500,000 to invest -- a good chunk of change. According to a 2019 Vanguard study, here’s what that investment would be worth after 25 years:
* $1.69 million with self-management alone
* $3.4 million with a financial advisor _(read: 2x more)_

In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to just 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3

_Okay... but how do I find one?_
SmartAsset’s [no-cost tool](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37976%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=exO%2b1oj6yUYxprjc%2ff4VGQ&sysid=1) simplifies the time consuming process of finding an advisor. A short questionnaire matches you with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area, each legally bound to work in your best interest. In many cases, you can be connected instantly to compare and decide on the best fit for you.

Ready to know what to look out for? Check out SmartAsset’s list of [seven mistakes to avoid when choosing an advisor ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37977%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vs8dpa7LyahufN2bcGc44A&sysid=1)so you can work towards a more comfortable retirement.

[See all 7 mistakes >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37978%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bXi4pyZo6ngrI197j0Zs1A&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37979%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gxf8%2fyBZYYEKSHMFWCHmFQ&sysid=1 "Get Started")
---
| SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
|
---
|

| Sources:
1\. [“Planning and Progress”, Northwestern Mutual (2022)](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37970%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5no%2f55dwM3DT0JTwEaPhzA&sysid=1)
2\. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020).](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37971%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BUbszv7A24YafPkSFLMaTQ&sysid=1) The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37972%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bsQjF99ZMiOxiELG7fz58g&sysid=1)
3\. Vanguard (February 2019), Putting a Value on Your Value The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please see the methodologies employed in the Vanguard whitepaper. To receive a copy of the whitepaper, please contact compliance@smartasset.com.

| | |
---
| This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors.

Enter: Working with a financial advisor. But could wreak havoc on your retirement. According to a 2022 Northwestern Mutual study, over 60% of US adults think their financial planning skills need improvement -- and yet, only 36% of them work with a financial advisor.1 Why? With thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. Plus, it can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. But some things are better left to the professionals. While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor: Feel more at ease about their finances, and Could end up with 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 So, how does that play out over time? Let’s pretend we have $500,000 to invest -- a good chunk of change. According to a 2019 Vanguard study, here’s what that investment would be worth after 25 years: $1.69 million with self-management alone $3.4 million with a financial advisor (read: 2x more) In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to just 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3 Okay... but how do I find one? SmartAsset’s simplifies the time consuming process of finding an advisor. A short questionnaire matches you with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area, each legally bound to work in your best interest. In many cases, you can be connected instantly to compare and decide on the best fit for you. Ready to know what to look out for? name: Derrick Van Orden, Ret. Navy SEAL Senior Chief
subject: Guys like me are a dime a dozen. I'm a Christian. I drive a pick-up truck. I don't have a degree from Princeton or Yale.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
And just like you Friend, I'm 100% conservative.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4i8kksgvq1c2j2rabqe8uml458741heh91d2tp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32ctj6apb1cth2bs "Derrick Van Orden")
---
Guys like me are a dime a dozen. I'm a Christian. I drive a pick-up truck. I don't have a degree from Princeton or Yale.

**And just like you Friend, I'm 100% conservative.**

According to Sleepy Joe Biden, that makes us "political extremists."

My name is Derrick Van Orden.

You probably haven't heard of me, but I'm a Ret. Navy SEAL Senior Chief & Afghanistan & Iraq War veteran from a rural town you've never heard of before. I did 5 combat deployments.

__I went to war against REAL extremists like al-Qaeda and the Taliban.__

Friend, I'm in the most competitive race in America - the ONE seat that WILL decide 2024.

_**[I need you to do me a favor by chipping in just a few bucks by midnight to help me win!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaqiturl29iflgd9ububrfrmk9g8gmlrrardae80_rp22sh2s8i6eo32ctj6apb1cth2bs "I need you to do me a favor by chipping in just a few bucks by midnight to help me win:")**_

---
I'm asking you this favor on behalf of all the forgotten men and women of this country who are just like us...the silent majority that Sleepy Joe Biden smears as "political extremists."

Right now, I have the ability to take them on. As a Navy SEAL, I know how, and with your help, _I will_.

Thank you & God Bless.
Derrick

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 12.15.23
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-jj/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-r/) **December 15, 2023** Friend -With Thanksgiving in the rearview mirror, the Christmas season is upon us! The 2024 election year is also right around the corner, and we need conservatives across Wisconsin fired up to take back the White House and Congress, and maintain our majorities in the Wisconsin Legislature.>From everyone here at RPW, we are wishing your and your families a safe and merry Christmas!Read our latest updates below.-Team WisGOP | After months of negotiation, the Wisconsin Assembly and the The University of Wisconsin Board of Regents have [compromised on new standards](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-y/) for diversity, equity, and inclusion efforts and implemented new enrollment expectations for in-state students.[Under the new deal](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-j/),** ** the UW System must:
* Stop hiring new administrators and DEI employees for three years
* Eliminate diversity statements in their applications
* Employ an endowed chair focused on conservative thought
* End its Target of Opportunity program

On December 3, the Republican Party of Wisconsin hosted our annual Christmas Party with Senator Ron Johnson. During this holiday season, we want to express our appreciation and gratitude for those who continue to support the party and its mission! We are excited for the upcoming year and the 2024 election cycle.
---

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-t/) Local election season is upon us, with the nomination signature period going on now, through January 2, 2024.Local elected officials are critical to Republican success throughout the state, and are some of the most impactful positions on citizens' everyday lives. Contact your local county party to run for office today, or click the graphic above to let us know that you're interested. Tammy Baldwin has proven once again that her foreign policy agenda is focused solely on political expediency. For years, Baldwin has praised the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR) for their work on fighting Islamophobia in the United States. Even after the FBI released a report naming CAIR as an ["unindicted co-conspirator"](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-i/) linked to Hamas, Baldwin [signed a letter praising the organization](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-d/). This week, after Baldwin's record on anti-Semitism was exposed, the Senator claimed that she had now lost faith ["in the organization and its work." ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-h/) " While Tammy may try to hide from her own record, history demonstrates her inability to put the American people over her personal political agenda. We are excited to announce that the Republican Party of Wisconsin is keeping its promise to secure the vote in the upcoming election cycle. More than 5,000 Wisconsinites have signed up through RPW to serve as poll workers in 2024. "With more individuals signing up to serve as Republican poll watchers, Wisconsinites are determined to secure the vote through safe and fair elections and turn the page on the failures of Joe Biden and Tammy Baldwin." --WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[ICYMI: Evers' Regents Snub Governor & DEI, Pass Vos' UW Deal](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-k/) **
In case you missed it, the University of Wisconsin Board of Regents voted yesterday evening to reverse its prior decision on Saturday and, instead, approve the compromise reached between System President Rothman and Speaker Vos. This deal refocuses DEI positions at UW to further student success, provides funding for employee pay raises, and a new engineering building at UW-Madison.
**[WisGOP Secures Election Integrity with Poll Worker Signups](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-u/)**
With the 2024 election less than a year away, the Republican Party of Wisconsin is delivering on its promise to secure the vote. More than 5,000 Wisconsinites have signed up through the RPW to serve as poll workers for the next cycle. This marks a new modern record for election worker recruitment by the RPW with four times as many signups than in 2019 and surpassing the number for the 2022 midterm elections.****
**[Baldwin's CAIR-Hamas Problem](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-o/)**
"Wisconsinites deserve a senator who can tell the difference between an enemy and a friend. Tammy Baldwin's incriminating record of support for CAIR, an organization with high-level connections to Hamas, underscores her poor judgment and reckless disregard for national security." --WisGOP Chairman Brian Schimming****
**[Baldwin's Dishonest CAIR Dodge](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-b/)**
Either Tammy Baldwin thinks the world is three days old, or she is trying to hide her long record of associating with the Hamas-linked organization that is the Council on American-Islamic Relations from voters.****
**[The Republican Point: Five Takeaways From This Week](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-a/)**
Beyond a Crisis at the Border
"Bidenomics" Is Stealing Christmas
Abhorrent Testimony From University Presidents
Hunter Biden Charged
Biden Prioritizes Fundraisers****
**[Biden Accelerates War on American Energy](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-f/)**
With the COP28 climate summit coming to a close, it's clear that the Biden administration used this platform to fearmonger and double down on radical green energy priorities.
**["Bidenomics" Has Failed](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xjhqdt-didthutlhu-z/)**
Prices are higher under Biden, and Americans know it. The latest Consumer Price Index data shows year-over-year inflation remained high last month at 3.1 percent - twice the rate compared to when Biden took office.

# **Worth the Read**

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Biden's "Strategic Plans" for Election Interference
body:
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37981%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MisRxeGKtx%2fSj8AhTJiG9Q&sysid=1)
---

Fellow Patriot, _As you well know, the Biden Administration has weaponized nearly every part of the federal government to advance its radical agenda.**And now time is running out for us to ensure that Biden’s Deep State apparatus doesn’t interfere with the elections in 2024 ...**_ That’s why my team at America First Legal is in federal court fighting to force the government to release the “Strategic Plans” of fourteen different federal agencies that describe their secret efforts to prepare for the elections in 2024. **Quick Recap:** President Biden’s Executive Order 14019, titled “ _Promoting Access to Voting_ ,” called for each agency to submit to a “Strategic Plan” to promote mail-in voting schemes, expand multilingual voter registration and election communication, and distribute voter registration and mail-in ballots among many other suspicious preparatory moves. _**We must expose and stop these nefarious plans!**_ [_**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT BACK >>_**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37982%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CxKUJ4IqAb7nFFKaqeXlHg&sysid=1) In this crucial fight, we continued our urgent legal action in the Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit this past week. This case stems from our lawsuit against the 14 federal agencies for concealing their “Strategic Plans” for implementing Biden’s executive order (EO. 14019) which clearly paves the way for their interference in elections as described above. If we fail, Biden and the far-left Deep State may gain even more power to interfere with and rig our elections for their own benefit. America First Legal is absolutely committed to exposing the government’s scheme to rig the next election to prolong the current leftist dystopia. **We are one of the only conservative groups aggressively targeting the most serious threats from the Deep State without fear or hesitation - when you support us, the impact is immediate and efficacious -**[**please consider**** _supporting us strongly again_****right now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37983%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=curDenPRxspdEEbvxj%2bpog&sysid=1)**.** _Thank you!_
