name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sM9XLQEckqRfkroPVdZtog~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYCpoP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMjEyX0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplfLGAfWVNEqNGUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sM9XLQEckqRfkroPVdZtog~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYCpoP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMjEyX0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplfLGAfWVNEqNGUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sM9XLQEckqRfkroPVdZtog~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYCpoP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMjEyX0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplfLGAfWVNEqNGUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: 1 billion pounds of pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2201863?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **1 BILLION POUNDS...** _**That’s the amount of pesticides used in the U.S. every year, Friend.**_ Chemicals raining down on crop fields. Seeds coated with pesticides before they’re even planted. It’s impossible to truly imagine that many pounds of pesticides seeping into the ground and poisoning our rivers and waterways. The only reason we know the amount of pesticides used every year is because the U.S. Geological Survey tracks it. But **after Trump Administration budget cuts, this program could expire in 2024!** [_**Please, Friend, tell the U.S. Geological Survey to continue tracking pesticide use so we can protect bees, people, and the planet!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2201864?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2201865?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Some of the pesticides that this program tracks can KILL BEES on contact. Others cause disruption to pollinator reproduction and navigation. **Wild bee populations are already _SPIRALING_** – some have **crashed by more than 90%** in just the past few decades!
And many of the pesticides have devastating impacts on our health, from cancer and infertility to Parkinson’s and learning disabilities.
The USGS program provides scientists and environmentalists with critical information on where, when, and how many pesticides are being applied. How can we protect bees and other pollinators without this critical information, Friend? _[**Will you sign our petition urging the U.S. Geological Survey to extend its pesticide tracking program**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2201866?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)_**[ _?_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2201866?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2201865?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

subject: A $148 Million Court Ruling, a Satanic Statue Slashed in Iowa, and the Mythical Freshwater Octopus
body:
A federal judge has ordered Rudy Giuliani to pay two Georgia election workers over $148 million in damages.
The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine.

## Rudy Giuliani Ordered to Pay $148 Million
A federal judge has ordered Rudy Giuliani to pay two Georgia election workers [over $148 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ_GdEb2GgwpXPwNXf72SrTYa9g7gyPHCcrbn5L6milmpNGn7-s6X5ETH-t_3MnVmGf0lZ80a5DaSjBz1wQXiYBMQ04PCgbTj8Y0mxsH5RerAizejsZHDRoHbfRIGJdLsA07UGA0aKtV3_dd26vLcgnoNXq046hEpyhwzaX9znzUjWJ65SeV1ue9SW6r9XYX5p-AScB0nmfrj8W_RwHT-1rApOEdvYCpPMJLrvxIjAfLXAIVCrJmecOXXCmXlVFSIl85H_LM5YfKXcZcZKCIO37qdqt7aooLt5NT4rsdRKfWHTl9mOrfin4DAAD__0t0aE4) in damages. Giuliani served as the top campaign lawyer for Donald Trump during the 2020 election, and he admitted to making false statements about Ruby Freeman and Wandrea Moss--accusing them of election fraud. As a result, U.S. District Judge Beryl Howell made a default judgment against Giuliani, and the purpose of [this week's proceedings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfgzcsOAyJB4Zv8ZZv7WidzZFchY2FSWj-fdXOnd_hlZ6P23xDTrzf_-NGvsY841r5RbMGqZ0EMw9d8JEIyHTk9UXBxdirMd3DL-OoraXFQbSIeglqNESgrXLDqoPr2IMCo0E7ray1Q2_VuIwBV40ruutViUFR4JpL_5l5rw-K6Z1fVPo1b13yj1qPU5h_AiYBU2utj_lrp3b-dAHTkRNXXk8BU3mGt7zzMzHuLHMJVCjIA98yUMQNK-dd1sKYZCt4nF3x4WicEp_uIgZ135DT77b-rfAdAAD__wZzYHg) in Washington, D.C. was to determine how much the former mayor of New York City would owe.

After the ruling, Giuliani called the amount owed "absurd" and vowed to appeal.
## Homeless Numbers Surge
The total of homeless people in America [shot up by 12%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ_G7ohgMT8uKL4mXb72SmsN63hP2ETAJbq3P-XqK0fTjObjttyQM5_3_3hQ6FtZMHZ-0qJAKCtAL9OYwkYEpEcKyklw2nitxz1MczSJXIw6OmONVYSejNabI4l2MyMHkKAVKKukMWa6GDmvc8KoMKL1Xg6TpMS91Mtn4bPvtOXv8qR6ieUYc9h7f7RB_xvgOsAVHye92lu9oXaOmQa47uWgTK2d1JrgM1bCRqLS2cX-lUQsT07CyjV5b70jhbSpVUICM4Fxs1-TXtVYQ3q8OGdu1g2TvB_I-bei_z3lJwAA__8pmmJg) since last year, according to a report from the Department of Housing and Urban Development. An estimated 653,000 people were homeless on a single night in 2023--the [largest number recorded](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1v9CAQhH8N7mzBAv4oKN7G3b1tSmvB6_NG2JwAnZN_Hzl1mmlGM4-ej8fyQI58Pv_jQa5uacFQ-U2Lglb1LejFNKvbiIB0Q04NEgZtR62b3ZlhstYTaY_eY1CjGdHrFf1kzQRkGnYgQStQvZLWWtNZOflpxaAwYD-OUhhJK9eUu8_EZ91pi9_pTbkL6Wii22t9FaH_CZgFzNd1dfjFqdytgPn-FjAruMMKmPd0UKRSTiql5TNkwkJtprO2IXPh0t6TJrv1dXGMXPpBGPk8kOMvsP7t_xMAAP__78Ja_Q) since the department began gathering data in 2007. Four states account for more than 50% of the homeless population in America: California, New York, Florida, and Washington.

clean_body: A federal judge has ordered Rudy Giuliani to pay two Georgia election workers over $148 million in damages. The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine. | | | | | | Saturday, December 16th, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1773, American colonists threw one of the most famous parties in history: . In response to the British Tea Act, the Sons of Liberty snuck aboard British ships and threw 342 chests of British East India Company tea into the harbor. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . | Rudy Giuliani Ordered to Pay $148 Million A federal judge has ordered Rudy Giuliani to pay two Georgia election workers in damages. Giuliani served as the top campaign lawyer for Donald Trump during the 2020 election, and he admitted to making false statements about Ruby Freeman and Wandrea Moss--accusing them of election fraud. As a result, U.S. District Judge Beryl Howell made a default judgment against Giuliani, and the purpose of in Washington, D.C. was to determine how much the former mayor of New York City would owe. After the ruling, Giuliani called the amount owed "absurd" and vowed to appeal. Homeless Numbers Surge The total of homeless people in America since last year, according to a report from the Department of Housing and Urban Development. An estimated 653,000 people were homeless on a single night in 2023--the since the department began gathering data in 2007. Four states account for more than 50% of the homeless population in America: California, New York, Florida, and Washington. Weekend TV Guide Need something to watch this weekend? Here are some of our favorite options: College football's bowl season with seven games, starting with the Myrtle Beach Bowl at 11:00 AM (ET). Netflix's The Crown has released the of its final season, bringing an end to the highly rated retelling of the British royal family's story. Mark Wahlberg plays a retired assasin trying and failing to lead a normal life in , available on Apple TV. And you think you're getting more than enough fiber. Right? Not necessarily. It's not just about getting "enough" - it's about getting the right types. Not all fiber is created equal, and research has found that 95% of us are not getting enough of the right kind of fiber. And this is a big problem. Countless studies show many health conditions are linked to a low fiber diet including constipation, irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), appetite irregularity, weight gain, out-of-control blood sugar, and unhealthy cholesterol. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=163036c9584947af92d8f30d76746172&_e=iZg61nob8m8FppQSk5P-2nhedAm22JlTnsTHh0tpqIWYw_BwZdr2XYLCt6FaHW-PpKAblfrQ0eU3FLJt_gvUadoV6JBLZG0hWI0y5esetYKIN4qx1NZ9xEGJKMYWv-BsgsoOCObrM1UTZSfp7NxaRzYYjRvvVNUXvBncrBjmseQFxQPAqblTe99uPUiS9yREblqTN--eHNkWbc2KZqjm2MdKVtppHK-napal9Ot5bi5C3RNEtyUsN5IAoQRRexqOSkAL3kE9OokPFVrOIpn5-eYq3qoyCe1epblLva2mmCGH8vC0t1YfPFMXUAy24NifAiSgqnkM2GnwURAxsYCHUXRtJtdoeiP1LxiYIiixykWu2arJV_QYqRsHdCdCYnt93q4HupWt_3sNwDlbnq8rSw%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=163036c9584947af92d8f30d76746172&_e=iZg61nob8m8FppQSk5P-2nhedAm22JlTnsTHh0tpqIWYw_BwZdr2XYLCt6FaHW-PpKAblfrQ0eU3FLJt_gvUadoV6JBLZG0hWI0y5esetYKIN4qx1NZ9xEGJKMYWv-BsgsoOCObrM1UTZSfp7NxaRzYYjRvvVNUXvBncrBjmseQFxQPAqblTe99uPUiS9yREblqTN--eHNkWbc2KZqjm2MdKVtppHK-napal9Ot5bi5C3RNEtyUsN5IAoQRRexqOIA6FhXVNeFQjRKtT0ZsmLRoC1Hfu1y_xmOcGI-erdS4wSLgaURt0IAHRCBRsCd88nA2GMKB5Nk5L3Ec-EjZ2hTs-I7V9f4-qZ9Tp9LQuhSHr-uIQEW4EbCksk4ga17UzVDLKoULiVMHCr942le3gYg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. That 's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. **And just like you Friend, I'm 100% conservative.**

According to Sleepy Joe Biden, that makes us "political extremists."

My name is Derrick Van Orden.

You probably haven't heard of me, but I'm a Ret. Navy SEAL Senior Chief & Afghanistan & Iraq War veteran from a rural town you've never heard of before. I did 5 combat deployments.

__I went to war against REAL extremists like al-Qaeda and the Taliban.__

body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4a60e5d97bc28b73d8983abaf813fb7240f5befa61ecb567b9a502b3d4b6d62510edc4ef93c4a3e25ca96236a07966bc9ec91e1f331b1932d5278564e61f05d452d58eb2d50b42b24c06275135c54c9f

Yesterday marked one month out until the Iowa Caucus, friend...

I'm bumping our email from yesterday because it's really important to us that you know what January 15th means. Will you take a look?

- Xavier

Team DeSantis

--------Forwarded Message--------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600d5031851ded1541553bc8c65866fb4279436e04f01beb7da808a6f38d1c0f3afc71bf776d2e258a13a0b9eca5ccb08e8
Team DeSantis

Subject: @ rondesantissupporter what's a month from now?

Friend, we all know this:

You don't win an election by sitting on the sidelines.

You don't win by hiding away from the cameras or dodging interviews.

You don't win by feeling too entitled to debate your beliefs.

You do win an election by talking to voters everywhere, never taking a day off in this fight for the future, and earning the support of every American by listening to what we need from our future President.

Ron DeSantis is doing what it takes. He's been doing what it takes since the first day of this campaign, and he's never let up.

TODAY, we have one more month until the Iowa Caucus. Just 31 more days until we face the most critical contest we've seen yet.

Help us go the distance and finish the first stage of this race STRONG. Rush in $20 or more TODAY so we can surge ahead:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600a99ff299f01cf38e6a7494aa814426e2a40f2145dd1872135c549541a774ecf5a87cb9f722d2a36b09f6056b1330c113
RUSH IN $20

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c66004848382d06ef15fd1c66bd0c85412bde1a74ee7d05cb009857ae8df7c5683e2a38a208d246e7d78cf6b12ebf4e3a6325
RUSH IN $40

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c66005759832661db990f2c1d7fc317a94976592e6d14392acacb16400a79a06dca0fbdd67b327369c9aa7ba00f865b68ba59
RUSH IN $60

Ron DeSantis needs our help to do everything we can in this state before the day the people of Iowa make their choice for the Republican nominee.

This takes support. It takes effort. It takes all of us.

We cannot finish out this stage of the race as strong as we need to unless we raise what it takes. Ron DeSantis needs you today.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600d5031851ded1541553bc8c65866fb4279436e04f01beb7da808a6f38d1c0f3afc71bf776d2e258a13a0b9eca5ccb08e8
Pitch in a donation in the final days before the Iowa Caucus to:

🌽 Help remind the nation that we're the only threat to Joe Biden in this race.

🌽 Kickstart our momentum at the start of the year to go on to win the Iowa Caucus and every contest that follows.

🌽 SHUT DOWN the lying narrative of the media by showing we have the support, the leadership, and the organization to win this race.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600242026aab592374826c39a3a1043f7e0808ec6c2982897ff46d1408c8995cc522317531d639888670798ae9b8efbb0ed
SEND IN $20.24

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600c49c7fbbb2550ff068200c8562e76267773bd6a0b5b700aacb0770313b244d527c34ccf6dd82bc547f95f1a9cbf14908
SEND IN $47

This campaign is working around the clock to prepare to win in just 31 short days. We have what it takes to win. Millions are being poured into taking us down. We're counting on your help with the resources to fight back and win.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600d5031851ded1541553bc8c65866fb4279436e04f01beb7da808a6f38d1c0f3afc71bf776d2e258a13a0b9eca5ccb08e8

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c660030342217d9f2555d949238cabe6b611f4c1a4525aeebcc7a4e481ff44aad77cd9d7e8c992e293e2684e879b267672781
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600d5031851ded1541553bc8c65866fb4279436e04f01beb7da808a6f38d1c0f3afc71bf776d2e258a13a0b9eca5ccb08e8

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=96069922a96c6600d5031851ded1541553bc8c65866fb4279436e04f01beb7da808a6f38d1c0f3afc71bf776d2e258a13a0b9eca5ccb08e8

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a16d4ea72e114eedb7f80be0de583573&_e=walt-vOtgmU2DlyahQBpnm5bOgDsSJ7Kowx3Zz6LVSOJQce44fkJvJtxSJYZce_Ogn6Bjr2F-C90eGZ4Y2yIuJmNMRhOvNT0enZWpgvLL25IMCAB20DJcPk8uLFnUWMyJ9mzEyED-si6m6o_kcAN6dIUp-oZm1TZ7QDEoxRRu8eHUhpzwMB2gyQ5lQ3C10fwf5FYVTG-GYpLyhfkyHGWGS8x-BnM6fLcClf9IgKDEMYA-DF2ItkjR_jnEuqRvNd-1RWZubOx1OHpyNjO8WJZOq1-y0VJNSlZNLbjlZf-UxAZrauArb69weaUXdjudnRK) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a16d4ea72e114eedb7f80be0de583573&_e=walt-vOtgmU2DlyahQBpnm5bOgDsSJ7Kowx3Zz6LVSOJQce44fkJvJtxSJYZce_Ogn6Bjr2F-C90eGZ4Y2yIuJmNMRhOvNT0enZWpgvLL25IMCAB20DJcPk8uLFnUWMyJ9mzEyED-si6m6o_kcAN6YKDQ02kKMYCou4s56NGUiw9agPYxgHNbBvmaNXK5xUuTHyy5SQyqciatXIxRn-Do_zIxEG1IllnG2U-8o9946YEEVnC0KWokjwvcdGVYx9RTUysuTrmxkhKhNmQcD5b1WV2lSKawC_f8dLthq3CDY-_lgYCLhMxuiNviH6EYIY8) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a16d4ea72e114eedb7f80be0de583573&_e=walt-vOtgmU2DlyahQBpnm5bOgDsSJ7Kowx3Zz6LVSOJQce44fkJvJtxSJYZce_Ogn6Bjr2F-C90eGZ4Y2yIuJmNMRhOvNT0enZWpgvLL25IMCAB20DJcPk8uLFnUWMyJ9mzEyED-si6m6o_kcAN6VPlA89wqbFE4kqSS6Jy7jTZ_JNa1fGy3C3D1AGOSxOqa1R4a4LRjIAhWvTsffR6FdJd0M4EobnSfHpsmelRKsKD1iiJjm0hjQrI-eLpMU_wwWxI4tDOsURv-eZ8W5JzmvZKPQ03W7GCcU4SWurxOsExaRLGBM2UZ-s9ZNQmeAFS). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a16d4ea72e114eedb7f80be0de583573&_e=walt-vOtgmU2DlyahQBpnm5bOgDsSJ7Kowx3Zz6LVSOJQce44fkJvJtxSJYZce_Ogn6Bjr2F-C90eGZ4Y2yIuJmNMRhOvNT0enZWpgvLL25IMCAB20DJcPk8uLFnUWMyJ9mzEyED-si6m6o_kcAN6V7E_gmnyonb7R5J3_e8Ih1u8zq6QplmJD7Lgjb4fTxRoVLyyGZM0ZT2jJKRgiuMn687FZBGoRbUVtAJ_9LnU3H1cyInBhmR-lfg_koRhmAvMP6PRKEOnlY1HY5ohEGZcYLNBWQ07AsLFTHRHDeISOkqiHZclmhsADy4S0DixDFl)

| With a volatile stock market, potential recession alerts and high inflation, investors are (understandably) looking to safeguard their assets.

The move to consider? Professional financial advice. Investment firm Charles Schwab analyzed its customers' account data, and the research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have [saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JA6U61WOiPCGfGlwziQqmg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYDOqP0T8aHR0cHM6Ly9hcnRpY2xlcy5zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS9zY2h3YWItZG91YmxlLXlvdXItcmV0aXJlbWVudC1zYXZpbmdzL2luZGV4Lmh0bWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1yYWlubWFrZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJtYV9fZmFsY19jb250ZW50X2RvdWJsZXNhdiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1kb3VibGVfc2F2aW5nc19oYXJyeV9wb3BhY3RhX25ldHdvcmsmdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wYWN0YV9uZXR3b3JrXzEyMDEyM2RfUk0tQUZSLTIwMjMxMjE2VwNzcGNCCmV8QI59ZUy5Y01SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA).1

**Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?**
Analysts at Schwab dug into the data from its customers' Personal Choice Retirement Accounts® (PCRAs), self-directed brokerage accounts offered within employer sponsored retirement plans.

Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022:
* Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438
* Non-advised participants: $236,2061

Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders.

**Why Work With a Financial Advisor**
[Working with a financial advisor](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FpOGf3b4FOwPue2FtlL09A~~/AARclAA~) could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress.

While the idea of seeking professional advice may seem like an unnecessary expense, the cost of not working with a financial advisor could be far greater. Want to know more about fees and potential value of working with an advisor? [Read more here.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JA6U61WOiPCGfGlwziQqmg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYDOqP0T8aHR0cHM6Ly9hcnRpY2xlcy5zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS9zY2h3YWItZG91YmxlLXlvdXItcmV0aXJlbWVudC1zYXZpbmdzL2luZGV4Lmh0bWw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1yYWlubWFrZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJtYV9fZmFsY19jb250ZW50X2RvdWJsZXNhdiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1kb3VibGVfc2F2aW5nc19oYXJyeV9wb3BhY3RhX25ldHdvcmsmdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wYWN0YV9uZXR3b3JrXzEyMDEyM2RfUk0tQUZSLTIwMjMxMjE2VwNzcGNCCmV8QI59ZUy5Y01SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

**How to Find a Vetted Financial Advisor Who Serves Your Area**
With thousands of options available, SmartAsset’s [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FpOGf3b4FOwPue2FtlL09A~~/AARclAA~) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area. Advisors are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest. It’s never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FpOGf3b4FOwPue2FtlL09A~~/AARclAA~)

| With a volatile stock market, potential recession alerts and high inflation, investors are (understandably) looking to safeguard their assets.

The move to consider? Professional financial advice. Investment firm Charles Schwab analyzed its customers' account data, and the research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have [saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaaff7f7c7b4029a0b34eb304cc1979&_e=Sfg1SVf045nHnqfzyzn0qIG5N-b753HVg9nA57gpwYvg3g8Hobhn31kxzEO_Maf41_-3yv09KwlDExdLxFsqNEvGHsMNOx75BYa2uSjCON6rb8UWqCV57Y2bN77cg0xoW59vaXwLhAiLuNu9gRFthFABoYEtRX_LzRLi6VEC6jXa6vAB0SZo2FzTB4wWyeocwsulcVS4jX4E8vdyaWIc9h1CQKTUXWWa8m4Zb_rjWmyNZUqWpw4V0h2zZH6cqtnSWs4m4sdfJamOAfIZRCFuj3zotNSvqgtzM6ZYFqsodHDjsCiaTasrRB60L6Kbl9iebGTQ84gp8Qv31e74LThlhES-7O4cVBdDRstiE-49Sw6BUnVsH0YOMjnKWgofXE2ngc6BmyqdAsq19ZjFYCqz5q7pJheR7QMhcAYqnbc5q9CHezEVQEizPmNeCP_N0IHibWiM3_3e-YqkByI1FSz82-2zTqVGsh39trOgpt-Qi-1rSLvhEFJcBPM0pYrwOlm1).1

**Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?**
Analysts at Schwab dug into the data from its customers' Personal Choice Retirement Accounts® (PCRAs), self-directed brokerage accounts offered within employer sponsored retirement plans.

Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022:
* Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438
* Non-advised participants: $236,2061

Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders.

**Why Work With a Financial Advisor**
[Working with a financial advisor](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaaff7f7c7b4029a0b34eb304cc1979&_e=Sfg1SVf045nHnqfzyzn0qAAbdZxssNNqNlMRFNbwbSNvWZlm-ZyIXLIJXlNdBQhYgCAhD1EpFjI2Ln2WDp-9G3Ato_aZJEWV0a0tj0vd_LU1i9YYtn9WZmAZODwz_KfmPcNnUjdhTPsNtwoqYp8EUfcfD3WX0aNSy18-zIxBXGujxTlO8CDWfbY3sMVuqwQC5UF31Avs2cF82DYG4ESAD_NswbICdOqFMngJzvIskT0cTtrMfthoKBqQkXXE-ZQclgl7Q2Ls-IEKrLX_ymAx1f2hLs5_y_7FoPWu-ipqJ-PKQC6KopJY6uHo5vLzk4JHfjhWlssW6UIvqYed16yof2FNGqnRSW6en2cFoJ0U3uGMuWrA_teZHhYquAgwn2TdjnQ5inbHcpfax7Pw7DdIMbosWvMf4CMKtCSjsMO4IUjwhfxyG1noxywnGUG8U2ofWYT2jgLIG-SsINGDqF0O9A%3D%3D) could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress.

While the idea of seeking professional advice may seem like an unnecessary expense, the cost of not working with a financial advisor could be far greater. Want to know more about fees and potential value of working with an advisor? [Read more here.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaaff7f7c7b4029a0b34eb304cc1979&_e=Sfg1SVf045nHnqfzyzn0qIG5N-b753HVg9nA57gpwYvg3g8Hobhn31kxzEO_Maf41_-3yv09KwlDExdLxFsqNEvGHsMNOx75BYa2uSjCON6rb8UWqCV57Y2bN77cg0xoW59vaXwLhAiLuNu9gRFthFABoYEtRX_LzRLi6VEC6jXa6vAB0SZo2FzTB4wWyeocwsulcVS4jX4E8vdyaWIc9h1CQKTUXWWa8m4Zb_rjWmyNZUqWpw4V0h2zZH6cqtnSWs4m4sdfJamOAfIZRCFuj3zotNSvqgtzM6ZYFqsodHDjsCiaTasrRB60L6Kbl9iebGTQ84gp8Qv31e74LThlhES-7O4cVBdDRstiE-49Sw60nlWTcVR_VtxuymO_gY3-KSpDVhXb6QamNYgpGQyrq-MluSLSU2d1CSbFETEA3IL1ODW08qiIpwQ0zg55ESQc3ROwsDlNn5bTPIrZeCwGW201Z1SG7Jb5wGlTAyN--al5X-MU-KN9AXy9Y827kvoy)

**How to Find a Vetted Financial Advisor Who Serves Your Area**
With thousands of options available, SmartAsset's [no-cost tool](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaaff7f7c7b4029a0b34eb304cc1979&_e=Sfg1SVf045nHnqfzyzn0qAAbdZxssNNqNlMRFNbwbSNvWZlm-ZyIXLIJXlNdBQhYgCAhD1EpFjI2Ln2WDp-9G3Ato_aZJEWV0a0tj0vd_LU1i9YYtn9WZmAZODwz_KfmPcNnUjdhTPsNtwoqYp8EUfcfD3WX0aNSy18-zIxBXGujxTlO8CDWfbY3sMVuqwQC5UF31Avs2cF82DYG4ESAD_NswbICdOqFMngJzvIskT0cTtrMfthoKBqQkXXE-ZQclgl7Q2Ls-IEKrLX_ymAx1f2hLs5_y_7FoPWu-ipqJ-PKQC6KopJY6uHo5vLzk4JHZnwyy5PqLIJZhfAKNvywbqW7vgdht12RSjiH9EmG2hq6hrL2pjPctIzfuCa_8Jf8VtKsBbj_QrXeZxu43iH_Fk1bncTQiBWlEVMb5XrqcLuGcP5odxxI4Vs4oqsf2rYQaXsxLpo5Tbym0qbZQPeMSg%3D%3D) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area. Advisors are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest. It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

[Get your financial advisor matches today »](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dbaaff7f7c7b4029a0b34eb304cc1979&_e=Sfg1SVf045nHnqfzyzn0qAAbdZxssNNqNlMRFNbwbSNvWZlm-ZyIXLIJXlNdBQhYgCAhD1EpFjI2Ln2WDp-9G3Ato_aZJEWV0a0tj0vd_LU1i9YYtn9WZmAZODwz_KfmPcNnUjdhTPsNtwoqYp8EUfcfD3WX0aNSy18-zIxBXGujxTlO8CDWfbY3sMVuqwQC5UF31Avs2cF82DYG4ESAD_NswbICdOqFMngJzvIskT0cTtrMfthoKBqQkXXE-ZQclgl7Q2Ls-IEKrLX_ymAx1f2hLs5_y_7FoPWu-ipqJ-PKQC6KopJY6uHo5vLzk4JH6DmdK6wPyQtm05FpDM7kDC7mKetoN4vfRReGu837_YXQZLiXeyXNfbWWl65UBjF-rYY9EwdPBStAvgviUh1EBlEvDMiRSO-GLwPp-5-rJEjJ1FW8v6VRMrX1rj62nu5Op8LjzCfYWBa70_bhZUi9wA%3D%3D)

SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset's services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user's account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments.

We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors.

SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4244bd2550489482d792465a3a68d9&_e=SRdWkriuYL4ifToCeXDZd2uZNJb29F9o1zi4s8xUeZ-Ic7EzoycLyLh2TN0SgzqGx363q3LMpJvfQZ9i5TZPsil9E4k9ZJs8QI9Fz9dn2O2jP94MwvYqxgKvT7CJZVNX7f7TT5vj90xcnKco4J4xSboBQqOrY4QjW2IWpJuKa-KzzMOXMGmpcFrR5nOqnjbc7v-O4Bd22EA2WYlTctdJ_TySPc3D5xT8t-KVC8FYBirOZDHuCCkDcSxf6FOFjoxKgp2SFugCT6j8ahpD-yzIuACEQVrrkFDcR0-7EUW4X96J4W6U5LK2rRCwKi4nJqkt) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4244bd2550489482d792465a3a68d9&_e=SRdWkriuYL4ifToCeXDZd2uZNJb29F9o1zi4s8xUeZ-Ic7EzoycLyLh2TN0SgzqGx363q3LMpJvfQZ9i5TZPsil9E4k9ZJs8QI9Fz9dn2O2jP94MwvYqxgKvT7CJZVNX7f7TT5vj90xcnKco4J4xSYL9087LIEyFSENi8ZEjADEsx8MVITnXYqH3D9D91y9f6YSZNdyDGGuyXzFohqsBXxO7EQXfqUCwTmurri9SkNd4ii9f9cSFozeAp3I4AzCwyIM0bAkkGOQq4Nt1j9F5MJ-CJr0xQ_lQ94pRA2pZ70DshznPxpalMM0pgIg6vqys) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4244bd2550489482d792465a3a68d9&_e=SRdWkriuYL4ifToCeXDZd2uZNJb29F9o1zi4s8xUeZ-Ic7EzoycLyLh2TN0SgzqGx363q3LMpJvfQZ9i5TZPsil9E4k9ZJs8QI9Fz9dn2O2jP94MwvYqxgKvT7CJZVNX7f7TT5vj90xcnKco4J4xSVJqAQ1c3Knr48xqXDkbBgZuD3L1fVfru8bhOmfeuwSDinXLit9gL1Uanzza7f0nDUlCY-WCiFicslNyvFXL9I80KhCbvyO27-9N1tId2w3PzWN_OHA6CSJtZsSgsfpKecRTNoPJlUdU2d3q3aAwwHJ0XfbUseyrr7yAs5LoLf64). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa4244bd2550489482d792465a3a68d9&_e=SRdWkriuYL4ifToCeXDZd2uZNJb29F9o1zi4s8xUeZ-Ic7EzoycLyLh2TN0SgzqGx363q3LMpJvfQZ9i5TZPsil9E4k9ZJs8QI9Fz9dn2O2jP94MwvYqxgKvT7CJZVNX7f7TT5vj90xcnKco4J4xSZDrluVuA-ozydtt9BZZIhZdlmSkCkX6oRv3n6679wbVMw-Y15fxfAQKW3A6a0_6qgpPqQ5By0rSEFL9KlpT2Sot8jOFDyH-Ac6iIuwsRIgPJA1yj2iPDRELCa2nC9H6UpMbxPRVRrQ_onllRqFwy7uLDcOzP0PmbODu63dn3Tk8)

Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=97d5df95f68e4a89b999cab79e742635&_e=im5iV3LCbprgxjLgOImJHcRdtuAgyP_-EYLeICpQLRcqlMebqifpgcgh8AB3rh3aSOAykV0vP8W5oRSIgGG_wvBz4OaT2BUDZf8NQw5trYFBM6_6XXbVqpV5HCA05kiDQT4dACvOFWEiEUJuxzZ6s8t1q3VWENd0rEiuj_JRRWxGw93-diuf8zlWxIIcLj-A91ti7WCeDKX43OPU2YR5N56ZHOQo_gRoEAf31FM-iecSGqj5XwQ-lIwG_TsvHSxxnb39WMMld9PlSbnyRyN53Y0whneSeRTcPgLj56UUDyOYcPwPGBUzUiC9OYYb0alOILcdYba1r7yt36giNBjjL-z-Lau2lwcyPz7ibD1sUO93PaU1KYEBzFbTtYp8-L50cd3sisVgmh16jUz3-Wspz9R_2TuYkI_dr_-Ooe3UCyZONti08xJ6HU3o55TdwNynmC4AhtBFzNXGu6YIx8L8nIZt-1cRFx9uMwoj5DSDCBBv8VglrsvqNb5DTgSmL0LuUA78_ha04jerd6P1LzDJ6Pdg4Gu70-IpLOjrUhfRRJiIwTTwWC6w2WSXNMCZGNQeEPETzQ4r7LQ_ZM-_9tfCqswqPrn-tzYcFkV8bwn_Ph0%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: It's Nikki Haley | | | | | | It's Nikki Haley, Before you exit this Friend, please take 30 seconds to read this important message. | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. | With a volatile stock market, potential recession alerts and high inflation, investors are (understandably) looking to safeguard their assets.

The move to consider? Professional financial advice. Investment firm Charles Schwab analyzed its customers' account data, and the research shows investors who work with a financial advisor have [saved nearly twice as much for retirement as those who don't](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b0a9028914a47b8953fc5044ed90e&_e=d2NLJQ0rD654VMXodQeQ5JTAlCmuKyuXhK65bHuwi5OHZI3jYgq7oVWCUVyaNPIq7io6AXzQJ9CXutQ2MEOxFi3Lg0j8H3EyElZUZaGxvYrdfbAo5ijhk-qdlbpJfbGUS1ACa3Dbm734itBH83Y_Vk7pY0YoFaHow7XgvLCnLy_V4F3jnOq9x2hNDeHwKOq-SrLbPN6DVbcn27oc5fuS4VYBL63jkP-7vPtBJyJllaU6mrNsDjddeBLfYF-WNd3xGFCCXbpb7na2LhVOMS_9veXu1DTxg6UWATE7dXnkE3jeKJh6RbGn2UKXHmuTR4mi0Pa5N3SPWOGCoTGdXTGCFSuBIflBz_EOZs4uPIks99HlT_YI_UkWSfbXiCJcLDJRBvLJ-ervJVJoDARYM79SI78wDg0ttkbXBaXVMqZOqpx0UGd8Py_l1hKZ9mxKRQhPhTkr4iQTwGXS8BddWZjK6rCc5Qoft1x1Q2dV0pvhrqE6R7fN589_knEqavyL92jx).1

**Could Financial Advice Potentially Double Your Retirement Savings?**
Analysts at Schwab dug into the data from its customers' Personal Choice Retirement Accounts® (PCRAs), self-directed brokerage accounts offered within employer sponsored retirement plans.

Here are the average PCRA account balances the study found for the fourth quarter of 2022:
* Plan participants who work with financial advisors: $459,438
* Non-advised participants: $236,2061

Notably, advised participants had an average balance nearly double that of non-advised account holders.

**Why Work With a Financial Advisor**
[Working with a financial advisor](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b0a9028914a47b8953fc5044ed90e&_e=d2NLJQ0rD654VMXodQeQ5KEHtlyXceYzNtDEb9z7YOZm-cm5EISRs5USibPcss1VF7xjOxrrafW0bNjq4aSb6-5aD-75gfuMsGejIlhYnS77jitwh24UOJVAhrhfGpbmlBZUrdthdLiV6TGjt_nafFy19zizFFzY1m8eATKgPjkLMCxpdMpvN5NkeskwCTyUuDOj03YvAmsqk3nL3rP-mmhfgOuPginKHEu1vin7X04TinEv9gHdLHbpxrXkGqCoVBtJQXH1HJxCpSBDjeECvwlz3oeIm6KOwuKPAUtqh3ICdh9-hm9scz6CcRbwmPc3dIcGIbqXSM3d5exnjzFOsoC6e3mvT65c6Qil4ALBPzKjSOa1xR1jaTc90ws92ZmOlRejRVNlKmBzlkagPfotUVDqRx2VDoQdBeYlTiDunZkcO0IHam3z0NpPAgPB650Hq_Wtg5kF29GB97j_jrwtJw%3D%3D) could help you gain access to a wealth of potential benefits, including their intricate knowledge of financial markets, access to exclusive investment vehicles, and their ability to navigate complex tax and estate planning regulations. All of which could help expand your portfolio, mitigate risk and help alleviate financial stress.

While the idea of seeking professional advice may seem like an unnecessary expense, the cost of not working with a financial advisor could be far greater. Want to know more about fees and potential value of working with an advisor? [Read more here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b0a9028914a47b8953fc5044ed90e&_e=d2NLJQ0rD654VMXodQeQ5JTAlCmuKyuXhK65bHuwi5OHZI3jYgq7oVWCUVyaNPIq7io6AXzQJ9CXutQ2MEOxFi3Lg0j8H3EyElZUZaGxvYrdfbAo5ijhk-qdlbpJfbGUS1ACa3Dbm734itBH83Y_Vk7pY0YoFaHow7XgvLCnLy_V4F3jnOq9x2hNDeHwKOq-SrLbPN6DVbcn27oc5fuS4VYBL63jkP-7vPtBJyJllaU6mrNsDjddeBLfYF-WNd3xGFCCXbpb7na2LhVOMS_9veXu1DTxg6UWATE7dXnkE3jeKJh6RbGn2UKXHmuTR4mi0Pa5N3SPWOGCoTGdXTGCFSuBIflBz_EOZs4uPIks99HIP4-ik4eTWsAEtI2K8LRqb9n5yr6WplxgVdxXoezGiBLOrpWHkksfPW3m1U2TL3-YAiXfncubyilvg5wTtWLazp4SNBTKSKJgyPKiWjSE-gQYf4JyZlgeRM8tO5crxs109hgfdUl5UgE_3ubIrTVI)

**How to Find a Vetted Financial Advisor Who Serves Your Area**
With thousands of options available, SmartAsset's [no-cost tool](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b0a9028914a47b8953fc5044ed90e&_e=d2NLJQ0rD654VMXodQeQ5KEHtlyXceYzNtDEb9z7YOZm-cm5EISRs5USibPcss1VF7xjOxrrafW0bNjq4aSb6-5aD-75gfuMsGejIlhYnS77jitwh24UOJVAhrhfGpbmlBZUrdthdLiV6TGjt_nafFy19zizFFzY1m8eATKgPjkLMCxpdMpvN5NkeskwCTyUuDOj03YvAmsqk3nL3rP-mmhfgOuPginKHEu1vin7X04TinEv9gHdLHbpxrXkGqCoVBtJQXH1HJxCpSBDjeECvwlz3oeIm6KOwuKPAUtqh3ICdh9-hm9scz6CcRbwmPc3sYiVdzWMOhZXEITnIVG-SbYp7M5UOMadKuIM3BIjq09F1ZhQ0gOWocvpDfeZQ0MScbXVQ-MmwWg1J94lczanqsAdmVQEEdUDN09HosOuy_1-MiHo4073SyqzmP2XvnS4vZuHobb0mPNryzcerU2K7w%3D%3D) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area. Advisors are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest. It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: DEI is destroying American universities. We need to act now.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/antidei?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Any sensible person can see that there is something seriously wrong with many American universities. **

For several decades many of our most prestigious seats of learning have become hostile to free speech and genuine inquiry. Speech codes have been introduced to prevent so-called ‘micro aggressions’.

**Speakers that do not subscribe to ‘woke’ orthodoxies have been ‘de-platformed’. Those that do get invited on to campus risk being mobbed, as recently happened to a federal judge at Stanford and Riley Gaines at San Francisco State.**
---
|
---
_Woke mobs on campus_
| **Intellectual inquiry, too, has narrowed.** Anyone presenting ideas outside the approved parameters risks having their career terminated. (See what happened to Harvard’s then President, Larry Summers, in 2006 when he suggested that genetics might help explain why there are more male than female scientists.)

**Then on October 7 th, Hamas slaughtered over a thousand Israelis, most of them civilians. Far from condemning the massacre, student groups at Harvard, Cornell and other universities, rushed to issue statements attacking Israel.**

Anti-Israel protesters on campus made statements and chanted slogans that went beyond being merely rude or unpleasant. Some seemed antisemitic. Others sounded like they were calling for a Jewish genocide.

**How come those campus speech codes suddenly no longer applied? Having spent years policing what could be said to avoid ‘micro aggressions’, where were the university authorities when Jewish students faced actual aggression? **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0c2f710a7d&e=5703353baa)
---
_Jewish student being mobbed at Harvard. In the United States. In 2023._
| Giving evidence before a Congressional committee last week, Claudine Gay of Harvard appeared to suggest that however unpalatable the protesters might be, it was all part of their right to freedom of speech. “Our university embraces a commitment to free expression” she said. Both she, and Liz Magill of Penn, failed to confirm that calls for genocide of Jews violated the university’s code of conduct.

**Free speech appears to apply at these universities when you want to call for genocide, but not if you want to talk about genetics.**

Watching both Gay and Magill give evidence, they both appeared out of their depth. I may not have been the only person left wondering how either of them was appointed to their respective roles in the first place. (Some have unkindly suggested it may have something to do with ‘woke’ hiring practices....)
---
|
---
_Gay and Magill give evidence to a Congressional committee._
| **The problems at US universities run deeper than just a handful of poor appointments.**

**Many US universities, including some right here in Mississippi, have DEI, or Diversity, Equity & Inclusion, programs. This needs to stop. Now. **

DEI can sound entirely harmless. Who could possibly be against supporting different groups of individuals, including people of different races, ethnicities, religions, abilities, genders, and sexual orientations? Pretty soon, however, DEI becomes something much more sinister.

**In the name of diversity, some US universities have been systematically discriminating against some Americans on the basis of their race, limiting admissions to ‘overrepresented’ groups.** In the name of equity, US universities have set out to address structural inequalities – historic and current – that advantage some and disadvantage others. In the name of inclusion, those with the wrong views are excluded.

**DEI is flawed because it demands we think in terms of groups of individuals, rather than just individuals. **Universities that apply DEI no longer treat everyone on campus equally, but on the basis of their immutable characteristics. DEI is a fundamentally un-American ideal.

**DEI is also a formula almost guaranteed to produce institutional incompetence.** Imagine, for a moment, that your favorite football or basketball team was to be run on the basis of DEI. If they recruited players on the basis of something other than their ability to play the game, they would lose. It makes no sense to run a public university that way.

**What is to be done?**

**This week, the Governor of Oklahoma, Kevin Stitt, showed the way.** He issued an executive order banning DEI programs in public universities. **Mississippi needs to do something similar.**
---
|
---
_No more DEI in Oklahoma public universities._
| **An executive order in Mississippi could prohibit public universities from using state****funds, property or resources for DEI initiatives. **

Yes, if the Governor was to do this there would be howls of protests. Various columnists and pundits would whine. Lobbyist would lobby. Others will warn that unless we continue to pay DEI staff six figure salaries Mississippi will somehow regress.

**I suspect most Mississippi parents wanting the best for their children would breathe a sigh of relief knowing that the sort of scenes we witnessed at some of those so-called ‘elite’ institutions never happen here. **

If we want to stop the ‘woke’ takeover of our institutions, we need to act now.

Have a wonderful weekend.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=71ab5d0c7f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

For several decades many of our most prestigious seats of learning have become hostile to free speech and genuine inquiry. Speech codes have been introduced to prevent so-called ‘micro aggressions’. Speakers that do not subscribe to ‘woke’ orthodoxies have been ‘de-platformed’. Those that do get invited on to campus risk being mobbed, as recently happened to a federal judge at Stanford and Riley Gaines at San Francisco State. | Woke mobs on campus | Intellectual inquiry, too, has narrowed. Anyone presenting ideas outside the approved parameters risks having their career terminated. (See what happened to Harvard’s then President, Larry Summers, in 2006 when he suggested that genetics might help explain why there are more male than female scientists.) body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=413fcc4d95b54d37949325404f2b8e75&_e=YE0DT8bSAlqTgOEDeu00sK1p271pHGO7cxpoYICmXR3xmTkHwueucWNGZvFpDohmul6k7VnK4r6XmiUzTpwVo25i6Nqa_CGHKEetMnb6mlpcFFwt_CEKxPwlCWZsxzIqX3VeLdwflABBF6DmsDZ6sAWfuUzxenLVVtObnap1kogh2AfhfrQl70MLcAmCz4oNP_ttqZeBFXPtwCUhj4S7EGdVPLXAPwy8-c5wIZCn6kohmeifjJ9DcYaBVneCXPuqZ8u15Q_iMl6SwrBab9-Ugus0ZSVOgUO2uBXiEGeVkyRD-NuHiK4F0nC3FHcIuL9YWQihWp_X-THOIlgHSO_dwFB9Zg1mDXGlNCtZRrQtUxY%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=413fcc4d95b54d37949325404f2b8e75&_e=YE0DT8bSAlqTgOEDeu00sK1p271pHGO7cxpoYICmXR3xmTkHwueucWNGZvFpDohmul6k7VnK4r6XmiUzTpwVo25i6Nqa_CGHKEetMnb6mlpcFFwt_CEKxPwlCWZsxzIqX3VeLdwflABBF6DmsDZ6sAWfuUzxenLVVtObnap1kogh2AfhfrQl70MLcAmCz4oNP_ttqZeBFXPtwCUhj4S7ECb0F7w2JMZVbgsDp-XhLOHcp20DqH-p1iBmTaqf8yxYYE2laeceRtoBSQaFqjvUtCDy-GcwPiaAyQw1yzhvvCKHo58BlpM3y8VXHm2h0kRO-BsIUgNnw2flABRKuEi9WRDPLLVV1oXiKeWKKcSYL60%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=413fcc4d95b54d37949325404f2b8e75&_e=YE0DT8bSAlqTgOEDeu00sK1p271pHGO7cxpoYICmXR3xmTkHwueucWNGZvFpDohmul6k7VnK4r6XmiUzTpwVo25i6Nqa_CGHKEetMnb6mlpcFFwt_CEKxPwlCWZsxzIqX3VeLdwflABBF6DmsDZ6sAWfuUzxenLVVtObnap1kogh2AfhfrQl70MLcAmCz4oNP_ttqZeBFXPtwCUhj4S7EH3LSpfJ-wdjfXzirIpVpjaA8osVVbveWRl0y12MA1rpdC0aCIsxbH0dwXMLyo3yuZy0IKmi5u8tHyIWJHG6QHms-C78K9AsB6KQdVkRDUp0Jt64lu_J9EsNF3yF_Srw2eutp_vnMTv4BVBGB6XVMws%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=413fcc4d95b54d37949325404f2b8e75&_e=YE0DT8bSAlqTgOEDeu00sK1p271pHGO7cxpoYICmXR3xmTkHwueucWNGZvFpDohmul6k7VnK4r6XmiUzTpwVo25i6Nqa_CGHKEetMnb6mlpcFFwt_CEKxPwlCWZsxzIqX3VeLdwflABBF6DmsDZ6sAWfuUzxenLVVtObnap1kogh2AfhfrQl70MLcAmCz4oNP_ttqZeBFXPtwCUhj4S7EIqteWjlGBTBBDdpQfITD1Fq0bg0qtl7tM6V4RSbLNSk9XUUmhhpl7_04ykPwhr6Vo_hs3I1b8e5Iv_zmFvs9yFQ5eFydab9q8ckvguvHXuzOz51Baq5k1ZOhd3i2nVGArXevg7l3bGTwTqYIL7UaKo%3D)**

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Today is the 250th anniversary of the Boston Tea Party!
body:
| | |
---
On December 16, 1773, colonists in Boston who had had enough of a tyrannical government dumped 342 chests of tea into the harbor. The event we now refer to as the Boston Tea Party was not only a statement against taxation without representation, it was a matter of standing on principle. At the time, colonists were furious that the British government had imposed a tax on tea without their consent. So, as a form of protest, the colonists began purchasing smuggled tea. The British government in turn lowered the price of tea until it was cheaper than the smuggled tea. The colonists, rather than purchase British tea, stood on principle and dumped the British tea into the harbor. They would not be manipulated or controlled by a government that they didn’t elect or have a voice in.
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | [WATCH NOW](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
_**This reminds me of you.**_ You refuse to be bought off or intimidated into submission. From the inception of this great nation, American patriots like you have shown that they will stand up - no matter the personal cost - to fight for what is right and true. The colonists fought for the guiding principles laid out by our Founding Fathers - limited government, the right to free speech, the freedom to practice one’s faith, and the right to bear arms. Tea Party Patriots and the modern day tea party movement was born in 2009 out of these same goals and ideals. After all, it’s in our name! With you, we have spent the last 15 years promoting issues based on these principles, such as a balanced budget, free market healthcare, election integrity, less spending, choice in education, and much more. **On the 250th anniversary of the Boston Tea Party, we want you, our supporters, to know that we will never stop fighting for this country.** This is the greatest nation on earth and we will never stop fighting to protect it. Our country wouldn’t exist without the original tea partiers, and it would be lost now if not for you. Thank you for your steadfast commitment to our founding principles and for the work you do to revive and maintain them. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-mgMTfv4TennSFrw8w)
---
|
---

---

A U.S. warship operating in the Red Sea engaged a wave of suicide
drones on Saturday launched from Yemen, U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM)
said in a statement. The 14 one-way attack drones were assessed to
have originated from Houthi-controlled areas of Yemen, CENTCOM said,
