Fox News host Laura Ingraham blasted the Biden administration over a series of “freakish” incidents Friday. Ingraham noted the invitation given to Dorrance Dance, whose performance of a tap-dance version of “The Nutcracker” set to jazz music led to a backlash. “The Biden party planners decided to ditch the traditional ‘Nutcracker’ to one that was not so sweet,” Ingraham said.

A U.S. warship operating in the Red Sea engaged a wave of suicide
drones on Saturday launched from Yemen, U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM)
said in a statement. The 14 one-way attack drones were assessed to
have originated from Houthi-controlled areas of Yemen, CENTCOM said,
but did not directly confirm whether the Iran-backed militia intended
to target the U.S. destroyer. Sending a “drone wave”

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f8701e609d42ccae61009bd4ef1d92&_e=rg-nCg_NoPyyZB4wS6iWbo9H15FZBhsUKDxOKyrVlNaMUUdByHgn0WzpYHig2SxLLukcXmEfUdBsFmoPlTN0xfoqBGA6YmkyBCcaK6q6BRe67PrGWqkhiRmBFfTp7mT4a94TViNCQQ_hcmx2HaUxcTLIIfKuyvSIhLGmh5T6sb4ebCh-JSh7_sKZniJdsPJET7Lyw-OTCoSFxz3dgnfurWd6pFv9QdFbVVrw2eVOOk3WurvVyaBi1Gi3I72VeRs2dzCFQ0HDKUUlKM2pLp2gRksca4bsQyUuzFRW0OfwSBLfnly3WegBRoaWUpccrZEsVwrVLC6d2GlZTbZN1Tg9fwWpx97AOPSrHnUbgKpBaFo%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f8701e609d42ccae61009bd4ef1d92&_e=rg-nCg_NoPyyZB4wS6iWbo9H15FZBhsUKDxOKyrVlNaMUUdByHgn0WzpYHig2SxLLukcXmEfUdBsFmoPlTN0xfoqBGA6YmkyBCcaK6q6BRe67PrGWqkhiRmBFfTp7mT4a94TViNCQQ_hcmx2HaUxcTLIIfKuyvSIhLGmh5T6sb4ebCh-JSh7_sKZniJdsPJET7Lyw-OTCoSFxz3dgnfurT2R5I4lqFgG3Q0rUv6ldCzC7CjpMf23KIK7b1WDyM61BNqLTkwYhQSHTILuCCUbpjRBqmvVoyV3K9qVzVcukHuw8uw7vdePjadiWh6ShRIhjKMylhFOY7lugYXvndWmqMgW7HcUqfJXVIshFnT4kSI%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f8701e609d42ccae61009bd4ef1d92&_e=rg-nCg_NoPyyZB4wS6iWbo9H15FZBhsUKDxOKyrVlNaMUUdByHgn0WzpYHig2SxLLukcXmEfUdBsFmoPlTN0xfoqBGA6YmkyBCcaK6q6BRe67PrGWqkhiRmBFfTp7mT4a94TViNCQQ_hcmx2HaUxcTLIIfKuyvSIhLGmh5T6sb4ebCh-JSh7_sKZniJdsPJET7Lyw-OTCoSFxz3dgnfurZHFnXR4xQ3ooTBVOWnwaIQ-pKGShRljAOmBWWVjmPXsJubNxm0S7R4fNBnUBywOkOH9JlLBptiqQh2jah2JZT8G0KAJhtoK8AmhG7BhTC7nHoD8e6r5QDVLocilsTeQoZVbMTb00OCwkNOxeqnxBk0%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f8701e609d42ccae61009bd4ef1d92&_e=rg-nCg_NoPyyZB4wS6iWbo9H15FZBhsUKDxOKyrVlNaMUUdByHgn0WzpYHig2SxLLukcXmEfUdBsFmoPlTN0xfoqBGA6YmkyBCcaK6q6BRe67PrGWqkhiRmBFfTp7mT4a94TViNCQQ_hcmx2HaUxcTLIIfKuyvSIhLGmh5T6sb4ebCh-JSh7_sKZniJdsPJET7Lyw-OTCoSFxz3dgnfurVXQouK7c7s_X0cKDjo8WfsPGF0YyYxDPDww5l4fmYR_8JNIDSlnsVMQqG1b69n2KxmdQFse_4V0gaNalZzqVozHgtb7Mwy0QCM_alD9R7LPwLrO-iPnEKTqEiZcMa26djWtcs94kIOzG0-uAkraNZM%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1R5o4LvPoRRW-zgV3eFbow~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYFSYP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjE2VwNzcGNCCmV8bqp9ZZQ6XVhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1R5o4LvPoRRW-zgV3eFbow~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYFSYP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjE2VwNzcGNCCmV8bqp9ZZQ6XVhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1R5o4LvPoRRW-zgV3eFbow~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYFSYP0SoaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2RlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtanVzdGljZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP3NjPTAxMDQwTjAyNDJMMEFET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1kb2pzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjE2VwNzcGNCCmV8bqp9ZZQ6XVhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iU70PsQNkMSTPC-Os9vPuA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYFSYP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmV8bqp9ZZQ6XVhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/d6vxwklc0qxoOHgojf4o-Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYFSYP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplfG6qfWWUOl1YUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: The Bidens are not above the law.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Hunter failed to show up for his deposition with top GOP investigators! | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dd724c1a0e&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

House Republicans refuse to let the Biden family dodge accountability. We voted to launch a formal impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden and are now working to hold Hunter in contempt of Congress for defying a lawful Congressional subpoena.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HUNTER RAN AWAY FROM THE OVERSIGHT COMMITTEE**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=96b6016877&e=1050d051da)
---
| Hunter Biden **BROKE THE LAW** this week by refusing to show up to his deposition with GOP investigators.
**Hunter breaking the law may not surprise you****—****but it's unacceptable to me. **
We were ready with over **800 QUESTIONS** for Hunter about his dad's involvement in his shady foreign business dealings. If the Bidens have nothing to hide, then why did Hunter run away from our questions?
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ae4c845fb0&e=1050d051da)
---
| Jim Jordan, James Comer, and I **REFUSE** to give the Bidens special treatment. That's why we are initiating contempt of Congress charges against Hunter for defying a lawful Congressional subpoena.

**The Bidens can run and hide all they want but I will never stop pursuing the truth. Accountability is coming...**
---
|
---
| **LAUNCHING A FORMAL IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f0aeb68cf8&e=1050d051da)
---
| **NEW IMPEACHMENT DEVELOPMENT: HOUSE REPUBLICANS VOTE TO FORMALLY LAUNCH AN IMPEACHMENT INQUIRY INTO PRESIDENT JOE BIDEN.**

* The Biden family received **$24** **MILLION** in payments linked to China, Russia, Ukraine, Kazakstan, & Romania.
* The Biden family used **20 SHELL COMPANIES** to hide these payments from Americans.
* Joe Biden lied over a **DOZEN **times about his involvement in his family's foreign business dealings and influence-peddling schemes.
* **$40,000** of laundered CCP money went to Joe Biden.

_**We simply cannot ignore these facts.**_
An official impeachment inquiry will prevent the army of liberal lawyers in the White House from stonewalling our investigations and ensure we get the documents and testimony we need.

We will **NOT** let Joe Biden or the corrupt DOJ bully witnesses or slow down our investigation. I promised Kansans that I would fight tooth and nail to get to the truth and that's a promise I refuse to break.
---
|
---
| **NOT A PENNY TO UKRAINE WITHOUT BORDER SECURITY**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d15b069d3b&e=1050d051da)
---
| Since Joe Biden took office, there have been **OVER 6.2 MILLION** illegal crossings at our southern border. That's not including the nearly **2 MILLION** illegals who avoided law enforcement and are now unaccounted for in our country.

America is being invaded and what does Biden want Congress to do? He wants us to send more taxpayer dollars to secure **UKRAINE's** border.
_I refuse to do it without real solutions to secure AMERICA's southern border._
I joined Pete Mundo on KCMO this week to talk about the importance of stopping Biden's obsession with Ukraine and focusing on ending the crisis at the southern border. **[**[**LISTEN TO THE FULL INTERVIEW HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=734c824c0c&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f00e830fe4&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---

subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6bc628183ee04f038d84c769a0a4117f&_e=hYW7ksPWhLxQbNZqHCY7pxT7KXbZ1oEPdenruQi30mK60mLPXoueeuydx60BLrqqtVYFC6_6SRwYIxQcQucDdxt7hWe4D04DxttoX-XstU6SiiwFupCiKfCPm-Itw5gs4O0kG4br8wKzPhlC434P6XPhiYpFchmDEX0F201W43UW-fSu_Zj--JoLLTgk46od-WhuBQ4q080nQl2a94IOWqIUjs3eJx3oX_unMZX2dgLYUrCmu0xvHas01CIZFST71xBMvIBlF6m2NYB9uyM1RXKsTeO6rlTNmM7RdZ30g_lXDCSqAOdixNKh13BRcZ3VMNiXu8oOUmn0XNGRLM3HEc3_tSu3lyKntppzKv4mvBmgS_Onf2UkXrps2T_-NWvz)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6bc628183ee04f038d84c769a0a4117f&_e=hYW7ksPWhLxQbNZqHCY7pxT7KXbZ1oEPdenruQi30mK60mLPXoueeuydx60BLrqqtVYFC6_6SRwYIxQcQucDdxt7hWe4D04DxttoX-XstU6SiiwFupCiKfCPm-Itw5gs4O0kG4br8wKzPhlC434P6XPhiYpFchmDEX0F201W43UW-fSu_Zj--JoLLTgk46od-WhuBQ4q080nQl2a94IOWqIUjs3eJx3oX_unMZX2dgIdCDs9Iq44TJJa9pdqh0nwFFjUn4T6Dn-ZWPPgXgh9al319RTkWx--Q3fymtLHNnYlVisqkE2Zf-AFpnILbT-XXUPb0miIkqDX49doeteMjqa83LjP6jTLBH7UCWU6vV3KJjBTVMzo9ekcZeTQkWdS)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6bc628183ee04f038d84c769a0a4117f&_e=hYW7ksPWhLxQbNZqHCY7pxT7KXbZ1oEPdenruQi30mK60mLPXoueeuydx60BLrqqtVYFC6_6SRwYIxQcQucDdxt7hWe4D04DxttoX-XstU6SiiwFupCiKfCPm-Itw5gs4O0kG4br8wKzPhlC434P6XPhiYpFchmDEX0F201W43UW-fSu_Zj--JoLLTgk46od-WhuBQ4q080nQl2a94IOWqIUjs3eJx3oX_unMZX2dgLFK4loReUarqdLUYwPGdzcUh6gpGpFiMfWpJ1prWYIQ5BBQf_8KoTBfpVsqdUjcqi9bQE5bfwPw0yOQ-3lExo4lZSGr67fW0wjfUkAQrSZVG-BBSU1D9Ka1m1hT_UHQM3yjoKfauheIIh1RAg5HJLq)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6bc628183ee04f038d84c769a0a4117f&_e=hYW7ksPWhLxQbNZqHCY7pxT7KXbZ1oEPdenruQi30mK60mLPXoueeuydx60BLrqqtVYFC6_6SRwYIxQcQucDdxt7hWe4D04DxttoX-XstU6SiiwFupCiKfCPm-Itw5gs4O0kG4br8wKzPhlC434P6XPhiYpFchmDEX0F201W43UW-fSu_Zj--JoLLTgk46od-WhuBQ4q080nQl2a94IOWqIUjs3eJx3oX_unMZX2dgI-r-q9pjTrRSQnEysLu4_6CaVDeuRKCGIMVjS6lmm0aJF06ne3D0Sh57WLvS25ToFbSxCxqhC5UNgMOP7Wpo4W-051Onap5iJ4KmAiHIlC11jJqfcitQSeTLyqREauvGvJ4Q6acu1-HFJafN82hsnD)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6bc628183ee04f038d84c769a0a4117f&_e=hYW7ksPWhLxQbNZqHCY7pxT7KXbZ1oEPdenruQi30mK60mLPXoueeuydx60BLrqqtVYFC6_6SRwYIxQcQucDdxt7hWe4D04DxttoX-XstU6SiiwFupCiKfCPm-Itw5gs4O0kG4br8wKzPhlC434P6XPhiYpFchmDEX0F201W43UW-fSu_Zj--JoLLTgk46od-WhuBQ4q080nQl2a94IOWqIUjs3eJx3oX_unMZX2dgIVB0NXHvihDTCC_s9g7Baxf7tict0_OnnswjGUX9oY4oOyiZhutOfQO7oJCAaivGed93RHt2jHudXRpO7X0arn5AUI5POIqo4XntT7as7Hh54OkYSfbhWUYNNCbogc0KX6D4HuUKnWGBM8g2XOxwLM)
---
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6bc628183ee04f038d84c769a0a4117f&_e=hYW7ksPWhLxQbNZqHCY7pxT7KXbZ1oEPdenruQi30mK60mLPXoueeuydx60BLrqqtVYFC6_6SRwYIxQcQucDdxt7hWe4D04DxttoX-XstU6SiiwFupCiKfCPm-Itw5gs4O0kG4br8wKzPhlC434P6XPhiYpFchmDEX0F201W43UW-fSu_Zj--JoLLTgk46od-WhuBQ4q080nQl2a94IOWqIUjs3eJx3oX_unMZX2dgLoKR-yDf_XdeMw-b0cTH2p1xOMSNUVjhmfIJrLIXIfdY9nnhrRps_slQdq5w39SDaz7axKOFz-mrcf4EAABaSiE7mDcpV6e_JWytZdqYH4dmvDLWGbPVz51amFicp4xgbVi5NFqrK2SEO6xteJk19p)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: Not Ignored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Your vote is important.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/8ddfb4b4ba2f/re-hey-9336021?e=d30db4cde8)
Fellow Republican,

The Source is out today with a story that you will want to read.

The story (https://stthomassource.com/content/2023/12/16/congressman-norman-to-represent-nikki-haley-campaign-at-st-thomas-republican-reception/) covers the appearance by Congressman Ralph Norman on behalf of presidential candidate Nikki Haley at tomorrow evening's St. Thomas holiday reception.

Norman joins Congressman Byron Donalds and Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo, who are coming to personally represent Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis.

Here's how the Source reported it:

"The visits are the latest sign of how important the normally ignored U.S. territory will be in the 2024 campaign for the Republican presidential nomination. While voters in the Virgin Islands and the other four territories are unable to vote in the general election, they fully and equally participate in the Republican nomination campaign."

You can read the whole story by clicking here (https://stthomassource.com/content/2023/12/16/congressman-norman-to-represent-nikki-haley-campaign-at-st-thomas-republican-reception/) .

If you haven't already done so, make a plan to vote on February 8. That's the date of the Virgin Islands caucus, which is the third-overall Republican primary or caucus in 2024. We're right after Iowa and New Hampshire. All voting will be in-person with locations on each island.

By the way ... if you haven't RSVPed and want to attend the reception tomorrow on St. Thomas or Monday on St. Croix, reply to this email and I'll save you a spot.

Forward,
Gordon Ackley
Republican Chairman

body:
We fell short
#

We’ll cut to the chase: We fell short of our mid-month goal.
To be honest, this has us a bit worried.
Our fundraising goals are real benchmarks we set so that we have the funds to continue our work towards a future free from gun violence. The goals we have this month are even more important than usual, because December deadlines are our last chances to meet our 2023 fundraising goals.
We _really_ need to catch up right now. That’s why we’ve set a new goal to reach **500 individual contributions** by the end of the day today to help us reach the goal we missed last night.

name: Team Slotkin
subject: A few stories of our donors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=917%2E135344%2ETk3Fyc)

Hey there,
Here at Slotkin HQ we receive some really lovely notes from small-dollar donors sharing why they're a part of this campaign. These notes often come from the heart and highlight some of the personal reasons donors choose to support Elissa – and sometimes come with very compelling personal stories about their connection to our campaign.
Today, we wanted to share a couple of those notes with you:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231216-1-tt&t=2&akid=917%2E135344%2ETk3Fyc)
---

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231216-1-tt&t=3&akid=917%2E135344%2ETk3Fyc)
---
How nice is that? Notes like this, with such personal stories to why they’re giving, mean the world to us on Team Slotkin, and to Elissa especially. They snap us out of our daily tasks and remind us that this work is about fighting for real people, with real stories and real hopes for the future.
Everyone has their own reason for supporting Elissa's campaign for Senate in Michigan, and it's important that all of us come together to defend this seat for Democrats.
Elissa has won three tough campaigns for Congress in Michigan, and one of the key reasons for her success in those races is because she connects with real people and gives them hope. We hope we can say the same for you.
[**With an FEC deadline coming up at the end of this month, there has never been a more important time to chip in to show you stand with Elissa.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231216-1-tt&t=4&akid=917%2E135344%2ETk3Fyc)
Together we are going to defend Michigan's Senate seat and protect the Democratic majority.
Thank you for reading, and for being a part of this team.
Team Slotkin
_Note one: I am a former employee of your father. As an immigrant from former Yugoslavia, now known as Serbia, I made my first dollar in the United States working for your father. I have worked all my life and can look back on working for your dad with gratitude. I am truly grateful for this experience. I wish you nothing but the best on your campaign, and I look forward to seeing you as Senator._
_Note two: Seems to me, Ms. Slotkin, your entire life has prepared you for this moment. Great good luck! When US Senators are sworn in January 2025, I will smile broadly to see you raise your right hand._

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=917%2E135344%2ETk3Fyc).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=917%2E135344%2ETk3Fyc)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

body:
doughnuts and the American Dream 🍩
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75275674/444174663/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk494-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU4MTc2YzYtMjE5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Mvmw9JFQuAuebVRCEbomCaCeV9hPuRpTMiGK65KmFQ=)
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida.
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. [**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75275675/444174664/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk494-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU4MTc2YzYtMjE5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Mvmw9JFQuAuebVRCEbomCaCeV9hPuRpTMiGK65KmFQ=)
When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. **It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet.**
I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, **_bought_** two doughnut shops.

While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner.

**For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career.**
I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat.

If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows this race is already tied! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written _six-figure_ personal checks to his campaign this time around.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75275676/444174665/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk494-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU4MTc2YzYtMjE5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Mvmw9JFQuAuebVRCEbomCaCeV9hPuRpTMiGK65KmFQ=)**

Subject: Want to meet Ron DeSantis in person?

Breaking news: another debate is set!

COMING UP ON JANUARY 10th!

The most intense match-up yet between the GOP presidential candidates just days before the first nominating contest in Iowa!

The candidates will be grilled on that stage about their plans for the country and how they plan to achieve them. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

body:

, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to show the nation that leadership. I debate and defend what I KNOW is right--even when it goes against the grain of the approved elite media narrative. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all.**_This is a race to defeat Joe Biden._** That is my focus. To get that done, I am asking for your continued support. _**[If you can, will you pitch in $25 today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62587658:syRGubiNL:m:1:2625680565:39302F7B36AD16EF91FF6CFA0B2B08E6:r "If you can, will you pitch in $25 today?") **_

I am humbly asking for your support today, . **[Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62587658:syRGubiNL:m:1:2625680565:39302F7B36AD16EF91FF6CFA0B2B08E6:r "Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party.")** We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make.

Ron DeSantis

|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62587658:syRGubiNL:m:1:2625680565:39302F7B36AD16EF91FF6CFA0B2B08E6:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | , The time for chirping from the sidelines is over. Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I am looking forward to rising to the occasion to show the nation that leadership. I debate and defend what I KNOW is right--even when it goes against the grain of the approved elite media narrative. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage to our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE listening to excuses, and I know you are too. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob: Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids STANDING UP against corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country I promise you, with me as your nominee for President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all.This is a race to defeat Joe Biden. That is my focus. To get that done, I am asking for your continued support. "If you can, will you pitch in $25 today?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now. 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We will fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today, . "Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party." We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make. | | Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. name: Letitia James
subject: What happened here, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
---
Yesterday, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my mid-month deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight.
From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for December.
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $2,479 left with only hours to go.**
**Peter, I’m counting on _you_ to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: **[**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to support our fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75277631/444181911/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWIzNmNkZS0yMzljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEMviGOaNsI2VCL4m0q-SVK4yFhGAFNZfG_nf3V_Dd0=)

Letitia

From: **Letitia James**
Date: Wed, Nov 29, 2023
Subject: This is a tough time of year
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75277633/444181915/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWIzNmNkZS0yMzljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEMviGOaNsI2VCL4m0q-SVK4yFhGAFNZfG_nf3V_Dd0=)
---
Peter, I'm asking for 60 seconds of your time so I can explain why hitting my mid-month membership goal is absolutely critical.
**FIRST,** despite the GOP and its far-right megadonors pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into New York, you helped me win my re-election campaign and make history as the first Black lawmaker ever to serve a second term as New York's attorney general.
**THEN****,** I continued to use my position as the People's Lawyer to hold the corrupt and powerful accountable across New York and the country.
**NOW****,** GOP extremism is running rampant and attacking reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and even Social Security benefits.
**Peter, I'm proud to say that I have NEVER been bought or bullied by the most powerful and corrupt forces in our nation, but that's only been possible because of the help of grassroots donors like you. So I have to ask, before my mid-month deadline ends tomorrow at MIDNIGHT:**
_[**Will you donate any amount you can spare to automatically activate your December Team James Membership and help me continue my fight for the voiceless and vulnerable?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75277634/444181916/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWIzNmNkZS0yMzljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEMviGOaNsI2VCL4m0q-SVK4yFhGAFNZfG_nf3V_Dd0=) _

Letitia James

name: NDRC HQ
subject: 3️⃣ reasons your support for fair maps has never been more important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, your support for the NDRC’s fight for fair maps has never been more important. This is the case for many reasons – but we’ll just share three:

**(1) We’re making real headway in our work to end gerrymandering.**

During the 2012 midterms, maps across the country were so manipulated that Republicans were virtually guaranteed majority power, even when they only won a minority of the votes. So in 2017, A.G. Holder founded the NDRC to fight for fairness and hand power back to the people.

Ahead of the 2022 midterms, our work helped secure _much_ fairer maps – the fairest maps of the last 40 years, according to the _New York Times_. [**_Your donation today will help us continue executing our proven strategy across the country._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75279376/444188350/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231216_FR_12i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ODI5M2Y1LTI1OWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-8uigs-qAWU7WmT87HJyCQCC_N1hQ9HiwuQdcf7vbA=)

**(2) Redistricting could determine control of the House in 2024.**

Our fight for fair maps is far from over. According to _POLITICO_ , “The House majority next year could be determined in a state-by-state fight over redistricting that’s taking place right now.”

[**_Your donation today will power our nationwide efforts to strengthen democracy and end gerrymandering so we can secure even fairer maps ahead of 2024._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75279377/444188351/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231216_FR_12i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ODI5M2Y1LTI1OWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-8uigs-qAWU7WmT87HJyCQCC_N1hQ9HiwuQdcf7vbA=)

**(3) December is almost halfway over, so we’re running out of time to hit our year-end fundraising goal.**

The resources we raise in 2023 will determine whether we can carry out our complete democracy-saving strategy in 2024. [**_By donating today, you’ll help us end the year strong._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75279378/444188352/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231216_FR_12i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ODI5M2Y1LTI1OWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-8uigs-qAWU7WmT87HJyCQCC_N1hQ9HiwuQdcf7vbA=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75279379/444188353/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231216_FR_12i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ODI5M2Y1LTI1OWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-8uigs-qAWU7WmT87HJyCQCC_N1hQ9HiwuQdcf7vbA=)
---
**_President Barack Obama:_

“Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered...are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around ...

But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.”**
---
[**_Will you help the NDRC continue fighting for fair maps across the country with an urgent donation today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75279380/444188354/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231216_FR_12i_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ODI5M2Y1LTI1OWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9-8uigs-qAWU7WmT87HJyCQCC_N1hQ9HiwuQdcf7vbA=)

name: Powered By People
subject: Beto wins lawsuit against energy billionaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**Beto just won his lawsuit against energy billionaire Kelcy Warren, who sued Beto last year for exposing his role in the 2021 power grid failure.**
****
Warren’s pipeline company made $2.4 billion in windfall profits from the grid crisis that killed over 700 Texans. Then, after Greg Abbott let his company off the hook, Warren cut the governor a $1 million campaign check.
Warren took Beto to court for shining a spotlight on this story — using his billions of dollars to try to shut him up and shut us down. **But this victory proves that when we stand up and speak out against special interests, we can win.**
[**Can you chip in $3 today to help Beto and Powered by People continue our fight against corrupt politicians and the billionaires they serve?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231216.bDw_w_&refcode=ema20231216-236410&t=1&akid=236410%2E444211%2EdRv6Bo)
**[DONATE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231216.bDw_w_&refcode=ema20231216-236410&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=236410%2E444211%2EdRv6Bo)**
Beyond exposing the corruption of Abbott and other top Republicans, we have thousands of volunteers on the ground who are registering and mobililzing the voters we need to defeat them.
It's clear that our state leaders and their billionaire mega-donors are scared of our movement. Now, let's show them what we're really capable of.
— Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20231216-236410-footer&t=21&refcode2=236410_444211_dRv6Bo&akid=236410%2E444211%2EdRv6Bo)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=236410%2E444211%2EdRv6Bo), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=236410%2E444211%2EdRv6Bo).

It's clear that our state leaders and their billionaire mega-donors are scared of our movement. Now, let's show them what we're really capable of. — Powered by People ** Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP0zAQhX-Nc0vlzMR2csiBYsKhYsUFwa0yY7v1YjshcYiWX49Sdbl-72n0Po1Jcwz-bWDqzADuwa4MgOEHBnBpzz9e5OX7Rdefz9HVWop2P1L4yADK2-z-V59XTi6ZEA-qdGUHoA6IKjc0ioNqedv31X1oAHqJru8MF1wJSwY9dOgBfEfGUxUG4IANNLIRoIQ48QYVx59GIQEJ71nL95BPdsom2teybGk-0ZSqONxLmdfHpJHBuDraFnfaQ16cPRoHM39cbZJbApn6dQq51H7LdjFhDflW05RSKMU5BmOm2NlWeDS8lUSyd8hw3Eq6JmfDlhjqp6884DptCzmGmsLVPBmZNJtwywz1u9N7MuXicmGoGy67g15zDJahni94H3_r-Zd4wMdLUH_d45dv_OXvp2oZ7LyHGMMqFWv57ZhwyP0LAAD__4ctjXs)

Friend,
We’re doing things differently in Iowa.
Instead of wasting time and resources debating career politicians on TV, I’ve decided to go _DIRECTLY_ to the American people.
Our campaign is all about giving a voice to the hardworking men and women of our country, who’ve been abandoned by the self-serving political class in the Washington Swamp.
And the numbers PROVE that our approach has been a tremendous success.
Not only are we leading with the most enthusiastic and committed supporters, but we’ve also activated a massive group of patriots in Iowa who had NEVER even CAUCUSED before in their entire life.
Despite sitting out dozens of caucuses in the past, these patriots have decided that THIS is the time to take a stand. No one can stand on the sidelines in 2024.
Our country is dying. Our justice system has been hijacked by radical Marxists. Our border is being invaded. Our rights are being violated. Our political system is completely and utterly broken.
**But our _“different”_ approach that puts Americans like YOU at the center of our political system has awakened countless patriots to take a stand to save our country.**
Friend, I see it wherever I go – something BIG is happening in our country.
Americans are fed up with the corrupt ruling class. We want REAL change and a REAL plan to put our country back on the path to GREATNESS.
**And in exactly 30 days from now, we get to show the Washington ruling class just how powerful of a voice the Silent Majority has when we DECISIVELY WIN the Iowa Caucus.**

Hi Peter, it’s Speaker Mike Johnson and I had to email you with these two urgent updates...

1. Democrats are BEATING US at fundraising... they’ve brought in more than $44 million this cycle, and that number is climbing every single day.

2. Our razor-thin majority is SHRINKING, making it easier for Nancy Pelosi to retake the House and granting Democrats FULL control in Washington.

I know times are tough right now, but I’m incredibly concerned about the state of our country... and if we don’t see a surge in donations before the year is up, we’ll be giving Democrats the momentum they need to beat us BIG in 2024. [**So, I’m humbly asking for your gift of any amount you can spare in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7824caa3a30a46ff829ec014b5a80ab7&_e=RvRfcNazakHnTpXeR8_ljA8UxhWWkfsDMRVaLkIkLK_i_pkXWrE5QNz5fJEUMr8mllWM3OfZW1iEJ-Yq23IGevcwU3OOyenohOLVUo3I4WBRa_pqLOuaQlh-eiG7CW3kfoBKAjCaHKzy1aiQ1ByR8nCBnlC9EiCwHuHke_7x4pznpiQufmQW32MfiSQ-G7n3OpQ75G_ttpwwx7lQaPxvp09BMHX-IRjnNo5JJ1q6d1UBAaLn437wvWNHVeldYexPTWBkTBeX8D5Brsud5zt3M_Gi97EvEegqPknhqdI83xLZiYiWsUGlMZj9XfMW6fS-21E6vhgmxQFwAnn9Dt-Ow5S901a4IDGkyFie-JI_GuZM1kqBnCXcApE4UgWCEQ4MAC7nXzbRN_UiurDg9PY2yQX6YNzHBkRxCo8QtB9I5lc%3D)

[** STEP UP IMMEDIATELY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7824caa3a30a46ff829ec014b5a80ab7&_e=RvRfcNazakHnTpXeR8_ljA8UxhWWkfsDMRVaLkIkLK_i_pkXWrE5QNz5fJEUMr8mllWM3OfZW1iEJ-Yq23IGevcwU3OOyenohOLVUo3I4WBRa_pqLOuaQlh-eiG7CW3kfoBKAjCaHKzy1aiQ1ByR8nCBnlC9EiCwHuHke_7x4pznpiQufmQW32MfiSQ-G7n3OpQ75G_ttpwwx7lQaPxvp09BMHX-IRjnNo5JJ1q6d1UBAaLn437wvWNHVeldYexPTWBkTBeX8D5Brsud5zt3M88MWgWC-dimMUjlN-GeT_ERCdIGptG9UzInQCPS0ciwNKej5RPgpc3jGwg-rOtngDG3-L6XJJoPf2Uaee60RJYoqgWNKwjfkcwH44WthL5IGcijhnnO1lpk_DqzcccnnnZmt9ljGcRmQ2sLU1lQm80%3D)
You already know how bad things are, Peter. But imagine the state of our country next year if Democrats control all three branches of government. _**They’ll have unlimited power to ram through their radical, woke agenda.**_

**Just think... OPEN borders, UNSECURED elections, Government hand-outs for ALL (including non-Americans), corruption run AMUCK, violent CRIME in our streets, woke politics in our schools... _the list goes on and ON._**

[**Which is why I’m looking for every conservative across the country to step up and FIGHT back against the Democratic fundraising surge and ensure we have the resources to GROW the majority.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7824caa3a30a46ff829ec014b5a80ab7&_e=RvRfcNazakHnTpXeR8_ljA8UxhWWkfsDMRVaLkIkLK_i_pkXWrE5QNz5fJEUMr8mllWM3OfZW1iEJ-Yq23IGevcwU3OOyenohOLVUo3I4WBRa_pqLOuaQlh-eiG7CW3kfoBKAjCaHKzy1aiQ1ByR8nCBnlC9EiCwHuHke_7x4pznpiQufmQW32MfiSQ-G7n3OpQ75G_ttpwwx7lQaPxvp09BMHX-IRjnNo5JJ1q6d1UBAaLn437wvWNHVeldYexPTWBkTBeX8D5Brsud5zt3M8hfPfi2922y4D_Jy1_6MBWuYzqT6PYHKnC8XBoAa2uIwroGsmaog-BN0hPZTidD-XgCpo56RwYhJuvo38z_Npsqhz4601X6lg9_8c9FtCNP8lXGjMPZcYtQ1xe-ngd6lej4eTBr25S8_0JaBb1R8gY%3D)

I hope I can rely on you.

In service,

Mike Johnson

Fellow Patriot, _As you well know, the Biden Administration has weaponized nearly every part of the federal government to advance its radical agenda.**And now time is running out for us to ensure that Biden 's Deep State apparatus doesn't interfere with the elections in 2024...**_ That's why my team at America First Legal is in federal court fighting to force the government to release the "Strategic Plans" of fourteen different federal agencies that describe their secret efforts to prepare for the elections in 2024. **Quick Recap:** President Biden's Executive Order 14019, titled "_Promoting Access to Voting_ ," called for each agency to submit to a "Strategic Plan" to promote mail-in voting schemes, expand multilingual voter registration and election communication, and distribute voter registration and mail-in ballots among many other suspicious preparatory moves. _**We must expose and stop these nefarious plans!**_ [_**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT BACK >>_**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0528bc0647f847bf81df4e7bd6cf0675&_e=hzijq8xMjLd4J5tNX9HN-aIc1a6UxQeUNWAnkN9GCQrynNxGpXONg5B_kwxaClFGS_d9LA62vkpQmvdqA4l61_sKfDAWS9In4XFzgVVQH1LYAd0EpoL-lTpqDnkNrbWWR_55S4QoAUFUFHYoJFWd41KC5unaLbiljYX0CtrlzIO5ig6GtIstUqaqHHNTQfFQkEeuXCgNTZC7ImUVFsLlZTsYkYsV_RBNGt4uNNsH4qVMcH1LZcUNsHotlcgcQdcsaMWToMLA3u1aLjQAXIntFuoFyDSxnbVOg7YRqr-ZTIUkGCXU-VbIEYTZ5R-A2YwlYZvkApNbYj2nv5AQWm7ZKSictfJv78Q6cBqw70pq46y0ks_Szbm2tSDWR6JVg0rJYKeZxz9lmZL6sMpm8z_vMghte96gy_6nQF7TuOOsgOKvbuv7Lb0qzlIxowDfdnj668K9xhj9ut00cdIK9bSxnw%3D%3D) In this crucial fight, we continued our urgent legal action in the Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit this past week. This case stems from our lawsuit against the 14 federal agencies for concealing their "Strategic Plans" for implementing Biden's executive order (EO. 14019) which clearly paves the way for their interference in elections as described above. If we fail, Biden and the far-left Deep State may gain even more power to interfere with and rig our elections for their own benefit. America First Legal is absolutely committed to exposing the government's scheme to rig the next election to prolong the current leftist dystopia. **We are one of the only conservative groups aggressively targeting the most serious threats from the Deep State without fear or hesitation - when you support us, the impact is immediate and efficacious -**[**please consider**** _supporting us strongly again_****right now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0528bc0647f847bf81df4e7bd6cf0675&_e=hzijq8xMjLd4J5tNX9HN-aIc1a6UxQeUNWAnkN9GCQrynNxGpXONg5B_kwxaClFGS_d9LA62vkpQmvdqA4l61_sKfDAWS9In4XFzgVVQH1LYAd0EpoL-lTpqDnkNrbWWR_55S4QoAUFUFHYoJFWd41KC5unaLbiljYX0CtrlzIO5ig6GtIstUqaqHHNTQfFQkEeuXCgNTZC7ImUVFsLlZTsYkYsV_RBNGt4uNNsH4qVMcH1LZcUNsHotlcgcQdcsaMWToMLA3u1aLjQAXIntFuoFyDSxnbVOg7YRqr-ZTIUkGCXU-VbIEYTZ5R-A2Ywlsal6gbHbq1rTEyY8RWiBajPV-4zRP0f4Ymu4v7GRRwKijYsnm8t9tCRiqbtDpEmg_P6xB0BbTD3UqeAzWFeC1D7h3zrJSziXgbMDdJclcKe7pcbYQR6tGOKaUibLfZqKRYyTK4NS37ppuhQQDKw1Mw%3D%3D)**.** _Thank you!_

| | **Right now, New Jersey is facing a democracy crisis.** I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general — has a reputation for corruption. Many people and politicians brush it off, saying _that's just Jersey_. Here's the truth: I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, regular Americans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and figuring out how to earn their support. [**We're building a powerful movement with people like you. Can you help our team win by pitching in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75280773/444193054/-1197072038?refcode=2023-12-16-democracy&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3933260f-289c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMzMjYwZi0yODljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLCdhocjFBIiaWT3JD9waEE8lIVXMCag0aTqbs8q_xA=) **I've heard from a lot of people that say they're tired of the business-as-usual for Jersey politics. I want to show that we can do something different.** That we can have a different kind of politics and we can restore trust in our democracy. We need people of substance and experience in this job, people who have their heart in the right place, people that recognize that a job of this magnitude demands someone ready on day one. That's what this country deserves. That's what our democracy deserves. I want to have the kind of country that all of us believe in, the kind of country that my parents came to 50 years ago, a country where we can look at our kids and beyond and tell them that this is a country where I can guarantee that you will have a better life and more opportunities than we do. That's what I want. I refuse to believe that my kids are doomed to grow up in a broken America. And if I believe that in my heart the question then is, what am I going to do about it? My answer to that is that I'm going to be the next senator from New Jersey. [**We need to restore confidence in our representation and New Jersey, and I'm running to be that representative. From: 🔵 Defend Social Security 🔵

[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] BREAKING NEWS: The Supreme Court agrees to hear a case that could END Social Security! [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, nearly 67 million people receive benefits — that's 1 in every 5 Americans!
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court.
These extremists have already made it clear they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits. We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:
Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security?
YES [https://surveys.signforgood.com/KEG-Dec-2023-SCOTUS-SS-Email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100]

Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. Kirsten Gillibrand

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kJlobOJ6dUJC-7l29sdGLA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYGLGP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIxNiZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZXxMxn1llD8SdVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kJlobOJ6dUJC-7l29sdGLA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnYGLGP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVVDTi0yMDIzMTIxNiZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZXxMxn1llD8SdVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Lt. Col. Alex Vindman (USA, Ret.)
subject: Please help keep the new VoteVets ad on the air
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The objective of this is to continue pressuring Republicans in Congress until they pass aid for Ukraine.
#
Derek, Alex Vindman here.
The team at VoteVets emailed yesterday to let you know that we’re going up on television across the country with a television ad.
The objective here is to continue pressing Republicans in Congress and the Senate until they pass aid for Ukraine. The stakes are extremely high. The situation in Ukraine will become very dire if aid doesn’t start flowing back.
But there’s another element to what’s going on in Congress. The GOP is trying to force draconian immigration measures as their “compromise” on doing the right thing for Ukraine. Unacceptable!
I’m an immigrant. My family escaped communism. My father brought us to the United States seeking a better life. Much the same story for most of our ancestors coming to America.
And doing the right thing to support Ukraine in their fight to defend democracy against a murderous dictator must not come at the expense of compromising the American dream; ending the hopes of migrants seeking freedom and security in the United States.
So please, take a look at this ad. And if you can, make a donation to help us keep it on the air.
**[Fight For Our Allies, Don’t Attack Immigrants** [](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-allies-ad.IkO_iL&refcode=em231216-1-30&t=2&akid=22722%2E3013755%2EJdiFJ7) **[Make a donation to VoteVets today, keep this aid on the air, and help us get aid for Ukraine across the finish line.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-allies-ad.IkO_iL&refcode=em231216-1-30&t=3&akid=22722%2E3013755%2EJdiFJ7) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-allies-ad.397zjU&refcode=em231216-1-30&t=22&akid=22722%2E3013755%2EJdiFJ7)**
