name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: What you need to know about Josh Hawley’s mission to criminalize abortion nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is what corruption looks like.
#
Peter,
From overturning Roe to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. **Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)**
**IN 2017:** Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court.
His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future.
So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**IN 2019:** Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge.
Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)
**APRIL 2023:** Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
**This was the first time a judge has _ever_ unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.**
Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.
**AND THIS WEEK: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case (led by Hawley’s wife) is being reviewed by the Supreme Court.**
But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made it all the way to the Supreme Court:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)
**This is what corruption looks like — and in 2024, we’re going to make Hawley own it.[So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40213?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40213?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40213?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40213?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40213?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40213?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)
---
Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a _hint_ of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.
When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore Roe v. Wade. But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by:
1. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns.

2. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative.

**Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.**
**[If you’re with me, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40212?refcode=em20231216-4398&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=15&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)**
Thank you,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231216-4398-footer&t=16&refcode2=4398_614464_Y2ICrI&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=4398%2E614464%2EY2ICrI). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Katie Porter
subject: I used to teach the uniform commercial code to law students. It helped prepare me for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Congressional Hearings can be pretty boring.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34869%2E3422442%2EvIWfbQ)
Derek, before being elected to Congress, I was a law professor and consumer advocate.
I loved teaching—but I’ll be honest, I didn’t always teach the sexiest subjects. I taught the uniform commercial code, often at 8 am.
I quickly realized that to get my students to learn the subject matter, I had to make it engaging. I came up with all sorts of acronyms, and was a big fan of the visuals I could draw on the whiteboards that line UC Irvine classrooms.
When I got to Congress, I realized I was being presented with a similar challenge. **Congressional Hearings were often boring.** They were being treated as these perfunctory things.
I realized as a new Member, I didn’t have a ton of power or sway. But I did have a few minutes in Congressional Hearings—and I could meticulously prepare for them, bring engaging props (like the whiteboard), and enact real change through those hearings.
**It was through my questioning of a Trump Administration official in a hearing in March 2020 that we secured free COVID testing for every American.**
Through hearings, I’ve been able to show how corporate greed has driven inflation, how the Pentagon is full of waste, and the widening gap between CEO and worker pay.
[**Now, I’m running in my toughest race yet. My whiteboard and I are only just getting started—can you pitch in $5, $15, or $50 today to help send me to the U.S. Senate so I can continue holding power to account?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231216-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_BRD_20231216_V1_F&refcode2=34869_3422442_vIWfbQ&akid=34869%2E3422442%2EvIWfbQ)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231216-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_BRD_20231216_V1_F&refcode2=34869_3422442_vIWfbQ&akid=34869%2E3422442%2EvIWfbQ)
–KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_BRD_20231216_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34869_3422442_vIWfbQ&akid=34869%2E3422442%2EvIWfbQ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=34869%2E3422442%2EvIWfbQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=34869%2E3422442%2EvIWfbQ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego’s campaign in Arizona? Help us get to 20,000 signers before the end of the year.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
There are only a few true toss-up races in 2024, and Arizona is one of them.
#

More than 17,000 people have added their names as personal endorsers of Ruben Gallego’s campaign. We’re hoping to get to 20,000 by the end of the year. Can you add your name today?
Please add your name to endorse Ruben Gallego for U.S. Senate in Arizona.
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_dec23/?source=em231216-1&refcode2=1564.734936.uEi-2T&akid=1564%2E734936%2EuEi-2T)

Peter:
In this campaign, we are taking on election denier Kari Lake, insurrectionist Mark Lamb, “independent” Kyrsten Sinema, and what’s sure to be millions and millions of dollars in outside spending from the MAGA-right.
There are only a few true toss-up races in 2024, and Arizona is one of them. Beating Ruben Gallego is the top priority of the Republican establishment, and they’re doing a ton of work to make it happen.
But so are we. And the first step in that process is getting AS MANY PEOPLE AS POSSIBLE to say they stand with Ruben.
So we’re building a list of personal endorsers, and we’d love to get your name on the list:
[**Can you please add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben’s campaign for Senate in Arizona? Help us get to 20,000 signers before the end of the year.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_dec23/?source=em231216-1&refcode2=1564.734936.uEi-2T&akid=1564%2E734936%2EuEi-2T)

Something as simple as adding your name makes a big difference. So thank you in advance for doing it today.
Team Gallego
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_dec23/?source=em231216-1&refcode2=1564.734936.uEi-2T&akid=1564%2E734936%2EuEi-2T)

We’re hoping to get to 20,000 by the end of the year. Can you add your name today? Please add your name to endorse Ruben Gallego for U.S. Senate in Arizona. Peter: In this campaign, we are taking on election denier Kari Lake, insurrectionist Mark Lamb, “independent” Kyrsten Sinema, and what’s sure to be millions and millions of dollars in outside spending from the MAGA-right. There are only a few true toss-up races in 2024, and Arizona is one of them. Beating Ruben Gallego is the top priority of the Republican establishment, and they’re doing a ton of work to make it happen. But so are we. And the first step in that process is getting AS MANY PEOPLE AS POSSIBLE to say they stand with Ruben. So we’re building a list of personal endorsers, and we’d love to get your name on the list: Something as simple as adding your name makes a big difference. So thank you in advance for doing it today. Team Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jasmine Smith, Emerge
subject: did you see Sandra's birthday request?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Hi Peter,
---
Did you see Sandra’s email? We’re thrilled that she dedicated her birthday to Emerge, but we’re still counting on supporters like you to help reach our mid-month goal!
Right now, we’re falling $6,305 short of what we need to raise by midnight. So I’m personally asking you to chip in now and help us get back on track. **Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Emerge2023](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284691/444205766/-1657939538?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)**
Thank you for fueling our women-led movement to transform politics in every state.
Jasmine Smith
Development Manager, Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sandra Bishop, Emerge**
Date: Thu, Dec 14, 2023
Subject: My birthday ask
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284692/444205767/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)
---
Peter – today is my birthday, and there’s nothing I want more than to see Democratic women succeed. **So I’m dedicating my birthday to Emerge and all of our amazing Emerge alums, and I need your help to make the biggest impact possible. **
**We’ve set a goal to raise $23,000 before our mid-month deadline in honor of all we’ve accomplished in 2023. Every dollar is crucial to building our women-led movement and helping bold, new leaders shatter glass ceilings at every level of our government.

[Will you join me by donating $10 or more to Emerge now, before midnight tomorrow, to help hit our goal?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284693/444205768/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)**
| | [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284694/444205769/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)
---
I’m so passionate about Emerge’s programs because our work is truly unique, Peter. We’re laser-focused on transforming politics and building a real representative democracy for the FIRST time in our country’s history. That means we work year in and year out to recruit and train Democratic women and seize opportunities for change.
When the GOP attacks our school boards, Emerge women are ready to run. When local laws leave our communities behind, Emerge women are ready to run. When state legislatures are at risk of falling to a far-right agenda, Emerge women are ready to run.
**And our alums win in record numbers because Emerge’s strategy works. We find the right candidates for the right races at the right time, and our stunning 74 percent win rate in this year’s elections shows it. **
But we can’t slow down now ahead of the make-or-break races next year. Democratic women are the leaders we need to chart a new direction for our country and put the needs of all our communities first. So please, support Emerge now so we can make the biggest difference in 2024 and beyond.
[**Donate $10 or more now to help reach our $23,000 mid-month goal so we can recruit, train, and empower more Democratic women to run for office and win in every state.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284695/444205770/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$10](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284696/444205771/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)
---
| [$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284697/444205772/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)
---
| | [$50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284698/444205773/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)

| [$100](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75284699/444205774/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=100&express_lane=true&refcode=jtk1378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNzAwN2VmLTJjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mmGXA-F5Xn5SL-7f9UQmeo1Wj2Hlscr_C5rBGgOs5W0=)

Thank you so much for your support,

Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge

name: NextGen PAC
subject: Need a reason to keep Trump out of the White House? Here’s three
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; http://nextgenpac
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75285211/444207908/-312956818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjUyMmZjNi0yZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BhL2paAlij4uUKTjaultw86mmCfnkb-VOfDEWzmAw1I=&emci=a1854a0c-999a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=4f522fc6-2d9c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) Health care. Abortion rights. The future of our democracy. Team, those are just three of the reasons why we have to show up to the polls in 2024 and keep Trump and his dangerous policies out of the White House. Every time he’s on a microphone, Trump promises to **use a second term in office to completely overrun our democratic system**. He’s sworn to his crowds of followers that **he’s ready and willing to cut the Affordable Care Act** , putting the 2 million young Americans who’ve benefited from the program at risk of losing their coverage. And you know that **abortion rights across the country would be wiped out** if he got his hands on more presidential power. And that’s just the beginning. We know for a fact the youth vote will decide our nation’s future in November. Hi Fellow American, it’s Speaker Mike Johnson and I had to email you with these two urgent updates...

1. Democrats are BEATING US at fundraising... they’ve brought in more than $44 million this cycle, and that number is climbing every single day.

2. Our razor-thin majority is SHRINKING, making it easier for Nancy Pelosi to retake the House and granting Democrats FULL control in Washington.

I know times are tough right now, but I’m incredibly concerned about the state of our country... and if we don’t see a surge in donations before the year is up, we’ll be giving Democrats the momentum they need to beat us BIG in 2024. [**So, I’m humbly asking for your gift of any amount you can spare in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=57f11f080c5a496c91dbc019aaf5c97c&_e=pnrU3i19yFZcNjncc_LJtgum6WFCLcY6noT_xoX7bADTwfdMUud0YNNnUQB-JN-sIhNV7yhRwJD5LzvfBfvD5ASGi3pKKju10kxncUtleHU9zKZlqOeUopBpC_DiNRPT8_SIFQRADDeC9wtkl8BznZVIyv-N-_V4Md55f0oLKcUxkzRRLwBCVl3HSObT5Yv2SEAv77LMB3Uu4-YfHGctUv5IhwsF8awSYfsjLZfN7pHK1gcd4oX1EFdHFg9vN2WHQhQ-hte7RGW-rW8nqlkB1jyfg-AThcdwn9rYcGrdZWUHSHxsCfVmD8JwKPEWUcmXimEGyfbPS-TPFYSpGu4RIxWWcYbRNuhlEgnFjP8uTZ6caFH0_wMdlD5nCdGBBH81B3xwX_lmKFByPgD2DUv3RvQ5qwxpoQzsU67tj9u5G2I%3D)

[** STEP UP IMMEDIATELY **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=57f11f080c5a496c91dbc019aaf5c97c&_e=pnrU3i19yFZcNjncc_LJtgum6WFCLcY6noT_xoX7bADTwfdMUud0YNNnUQB-JN-sIhNV7yhRwJD5LzvfBfvD5ASGi3pKKju10kxncUtleHU9zKZlqOeUopBpC_DiNRPT8_SIFQRADDeC9wtkl8BznZVIyv-N-_V4Md55f0oLKcUxkzRRLwBCVl3HSObT5Yv2SEAv77LMB3Uu4-YfHGctUv5IhwsF8awSYfsjLZfN7pHK1gcd4oX1EFdHFg9vN2WHJsbgMhopvxNQQPkx-4GuLyaWCzgAYSv_vCtZXtW2ueI1LF9uFeYcH_6JvP0hyXsiNEyQLR4_DS9r2teJDQRnGyCC4IN9ngWaahyu_Wc0xotxUfXZNJ2K1XKgIsHjhJ-Nig43Rz2EVb3VKSdwmc3PI4J32DcUOj1fA4_a162jnAw%3D)
You already know how bad things are, Fellow American. But imagine the state of our country next year if Democrats control all three branches of government. _**They’ll have unlimited power to ram through their radical, woke agenda.**_

**Just think... OPEN borders, UNSECURED elections, Government hand-outs for ALL (including non-Americans), corruption run AMUCK, violent CRIME in our streets, woke politics in our schools... _the list goes on and ON._**

[**Which is why I’m looking for every conservative across the country to step up and FIGHT back against the Democratic fundraising surge and ensure we have the resources to GROW the majority.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=57f11f080c5a496c91dbc019aaf5c97c&_e=pnrU3i19yFZcNjncc_LJtgum6WFCLcY6noT_xoX7bADTwfdMUud0YNNnUQB-JN-sIhNV7yhRwJD5LzvfBfvD5ASGi3pKKju10kxncUtleHU9zKZlqOeUopBpC_DiNRPT8_SIFQRADDeC9wtkl8BznZVIyv-N-_V4Md55f0oLKcUxkzRRLwBCVl3HSObT5Yv2SEAv77LMB3Uu4-YfHGctUv5IhwsF8awSYfsjLZfN7pHK1gcd4oX1EFdHFg9vN2WH5czB7YwtY0bab2IphkW-9T-4jQnA3QQB9VCb2EsafnCRQQ8gn2Ya8J9q6oADS6o-R4icUepwbxwHsBKyAHiV6TLZxcZi1pIP4t6w0LrUunyJwZgEc59zeIGAkl-ibFXzaYyqBqw60GV_GzJ-2x4xRQ7sdt2na4zopr4-U8LzWiY%3D)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: An update on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Hi Derek, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update on our campaign:

The past few weeks have been really tough for our campaign. Fewer folks are opening and donating to messages like this one, and as we prepare for the holiday fundraising slump, my team is worried we won’t be able to make up for lost ground before our important public fundraising deadline on December 31st.

That’s a problem because while our fundraising slows down, Republicans are making plans to spend a fortune on Wisconsin’s Senate race. As we speak, **the GOP is recruiting a right-wing megamillionaire willing to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me.**

That’s why I’m reaching out with an important request. I know that these emails can be a bit pesky sometimes — and trust me, the last thing I want to do is ask you for your hard-earned money. But the truth is, these emails make a huge difference for our team.

If we’re going to protect my seat from right-wing self-funders, then we need to catch up on our goals — and quickly. But we can’t do it without you, so I’m humbly asking:

[Will you split a donation between Tony Evers and my campaign today to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat and our Democratic Senate majority?](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2209?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231216_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_mmfr.1.7&t=5&akid=6529%2E1827488%2EHf5Ye3)

Thanks for everything, Derek. I’m so grateful that we can always count on this incredible team.

— Tammy
---
| [Support Tony](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/3?t=4&akid=6529%2E1827488%2EHf5Ye3)
---
Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin.
---

name: Latinos for America First
subject: El Luchador: How Trump Became the Champion of the People and the Economy
body:
DONATE TODAY READ ALL ABOUT IT * * * ========== BY BIANCA GRACIA, PRESIDENT In the arena of American politics, there is one combatant who has con
| |
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/15469?id=107240.116.1.4bc12a6a223d795f88e9ea288a9b3c68) |
---
| | [ DONATE TODAY ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/15469?id=107240.117.1.e0796b7ddd6709bc6cae7ee881813025)
---
READ ALL ABOUT IT
* * *
========== BY BIANCA GRACIA, PRESIDENT
In the arena of American politics, there is one combatant who has consistently stood out as the people’s champion, the luchador who has entered the ring ready to fight for the jobs, security, and prosperity of our nation. That man is Donald J. Trump. While the GOP may have faltered in its messaging to minority communities, Trump’s appeal has cut through the noise, resonating powerfully within the Hispanic community. His unyielding stance on border security and his track record on the economy speak to the heart of the American dream – a dream that is built on the foundation of safety and opportunity. The current state of our economy is not just a talking point; it is the pulse of the nation. Under the previous administration, we witnessed a rejuvenation of American industry and a significant drop in unemployment rates. Jobs were brought back to American soil, and minority communities saw unprecedented economic uplift. The policies that drove this revival were not borne out of soft-hearted idealism but from hard-nosed realism and the unapologetic pursuit of American interests first. Let's speak plainly: The GOP needs to do more than just acknowledge the failures in reaching out to minority communities; it must actively engage with them, understand their concerns, and articulate a clear, persuasive message of economic empowerment. Trump did not just pay lip service to these communities; he acted. He became 'El Luchador' not by mere words, but through decisive actions that fortified the borders and invigorated the economy. It's no wonder that Hispanics are gravitating towards Trump. They recognize a fighter when they see one – a leader who does not merely promise but delivers. They see the strength of his convictions on border security not as a divisive issue, but as a necessary measure to protect the community's welfare and the integrity of the nation's laws. The GOP must learn from Trump – the man who has battled against the political establishment and emerged as a defender of the people. His actions have demonstrated a clear blueprint for success: unyielding commitment to the security and prosperity of the nation will win the hearts and votes of Americans from all backgrounds. As we look ahead, it is clear that if the GOP wishes to truly represent and fight for the interests of all Americans, it must adopt the indomitable spirit of 'El Luchador' Trump. It must champion the causes that matter most to the people: a robust economy, secure borders, and the promise of the American dream, unfettered by overreaching government interference. The call to action is clear. The GOP must rise to the occasion and fight for the soul of America with the same fervor as Trump. Only then can it reclaim its place as the party of the people, for the people. And only then will it deserve to win their trust and their votes. In Trump, the people have found more than a president; they have found 'El Luchador' – the fighter they need for such a time as this.
---

Trump did not just pay lip service to these communities; he acted. He became 'El Luchador' not by mere words, but through decisive actions that fortified the borders and invigorated the economy. It's no wonder that Hispanics are gravitating towards Trump. They recognize a fighter when they see one – a leader who does not merely promise but delivers. They see the strength of his convictions on border security not as a divisive issue, but as a necessary measure to protect the community's welfare and the integrity of the nation's laws. The GOP must learn from Trump – the man who has battled against the political establishment and emerged as a defender of the people. His actions have demonstrated a clear blueprint for success: unyielding commitment to the security and prosperity of the nation will win the hearts and votes of Americans from all backgrounds. As we look ahead, it is clear that if the GOP wishes to truly represent and fight for the interests of all Americans, it must adopt the indomitable spirit of 'El Luchador' Trump. It must champion the causes that matter most to the people: a robust economy, secure borders, and the promise of the American dream, unfettered by overreaching government interference. The call to action is clear. The GOP must rise to the occasion and fight for the soul of America with the same fervor as Trump. Only then can it reclaim its place as the party of the people, for the people. And only then will it deserve to win their trust and their votes. In Trump, the people have found more than a president; they have found 'El Luchador' – the fighter they need for such a time as this. | | | | "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" ©2023 Latinos for America First | 6443 Fairmont Pkwy 140-102 Pasadena TX 77505 | = "Web Version" = "Preferences" = "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Reproductive freedom is non-negotiable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Texas’ extreme abortion ban is putting lives at risk. No one should have to petition a court to receive life-saving medical care. **Today, I am thinking about Kate Cox and how our state's courts put her life in danger by denying her a medically necessary abortion.**

**This should have been between her, her family, and her doctor — not the courts and politicians.** The denial of reproductive health rights held by Texas women for nearly 50 years is one of the most dire threats our state faces. Women should have the right to make decisions about their health without the interference of politicians.

Over the years, I’ve operated on women facing death from reproductive emergencies, and it's unacceptable any person would be denied life-saving care. I trust women to make their own healthcare decisions, and it’s unacceptable that Texas women no longer have the freedom to make their own reproductive choices.

[**As a doctor, I oppose any restrictions on healthcare, and as a member of Congress, I will defend the rights of Texas women to make decisions about their reproductive healthcare–including abortion. I ask you to join me in the fight for reproductive rights by making a donation to my campaign >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75286236/444211520/1416552317?refcode=em23_231216_abrtn_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231216_abrtn_fndd_gq_act___dbw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cc0b9603-309c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MwYjk2MDMtMzA5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6bB_B61MCc8Z_22O7NJmkXSB_saXnKoO3YDBawtG9ss=) clean_body: | | Peter, Texas’ extreme abortion ban is putting lives at risk. No one should have to petition a court to receive life-saving medical care. Today, I am thinking about Kate Cox and how our state's courts put her life in danger by denying her a medically necessary abortion. This should have been between her, her family, and her doctor — not the courts and politicians. The denial of reproductive health rights held by Texas women for nearly 50 years is one of the most dire threats our state faces. Women should have the right to make decisions about their health without the interference of politicians. Over the years, I’ve operated on women facing death from reproductive emergencies, and it's unacceptable any person would be denied life-saving care. I trust women to make their own healthcare decisions, and it’s unacceptable that Texas women no longer have the freedom to make their own reproductive choices. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Onward, Dr. Brian Williams = &recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MwYjk2MDMtMzA5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6bBB61MCc8Z22O7NJmkXSBsaXnKoO3YDBawtG9ss= | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. name: Tara McGowan (via COURIER)
subject: Will you sponsor our newsrooms?
body:
I’ve been worried about the information ecosystem in our country for a long time.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75286462/444212306/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViZmM2NmQtMzA5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PzVxJYtYe1m2aUpUNd9fYQnbTm-6KrnDEOQOS0rNfDQ=&emci=8958d250-719b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=debfc66d-309c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
**I’ve been worried about the information crisis in this country for a _long time._** In the 1990s, conservatives built Fox News and talk radio in direct opposition to what they called the “liberal mainstream media,” opening the door to the flood of bad information we’re dealing with today.
Too many traditional news outlets shifted into a defensive posture, deciding to treat “both sides” of every political argument as equally credible to prove their neutrality — even when one side was saying demonstrably false things.
This naturally led to _even more_ widespread distrust. And when combined with the shuttering of local and regional newsrooms, it’s no wonder why more than 185 million Americans don’t trust the news.
But only recently have we started to truly feel the consequences this is having on our democracy. Democracy relies on journalists who are willing to ask tough questions, hold power accountable, and call out disinformation for what it is, especially when it’s coming from powerful politicians. **And it relies on newsrooms that are supportive of that mission.**
**That’s why I founded COURIER, Peter.** And with our network of online newsrooms now serving ten battleground states, we’re making a big impact. Our journalists in states like Arizona and Wisconsin have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local news can play in state and local elections.
[**But we need your help to continue providing the communities we serve with quality journalism. Unfortunately, we fell short of meeting our mid-month fundraising deadline yesterday which is why I’m reaching out to ask you to become a sponsor of our newsrooms today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75286465/444212308/230009875?refcode=em20231216&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViZmM2NmQtMzA5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PzVxJYtYe1m2aUpUNd9fYQnbTm-6KrnDEOQOS0rNfDQ=)
You've been chosen to sponsor our newsrooms! Your donation will go towards powering the high-quality journalism from each of our newsrooms located across ten battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Wisconsin. And that's not all — COURIER is making plans to open a newsroom in Texas ahead of the 2024 election! **Can we count on you to chip in now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states?** **[Chip in ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75286466/444212311/230009875?refcode=em20231216&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViZmM2NmQtMzA5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PzVxJYtYe1m2aUpUNd9fYQnbTm-6KrnDEOQOS0rNfDQ=)**
---
We’ve watched the mainstream media normalize and propagate Trump’s blatant lies ever since his first campaign in 2016, and we saw the consequences when his supporters attacked the Capitol on January 6th. For the sake of our democracy, we need to do our part to inform voters and make sure it doesn’t happen again in 2024.
Peter, none of our newsrooms rely on subscription fees or paywalls to keep the lights on. _**All**_**of our stories are completely free to read,** and instead, we rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you to help us keep up our work.
[**Yesterday, we fell short of reaching our $7,500 mid-month fundraising goal. clean_body: I’ve been worried about the information ecosystem in our country for a long time. Peter, I’ve been worried about the information crisis in this country for a long time. In the 1990s, conservatives built Fox News and talk radio in direct opposition to what they called the “liberal mainstream media,” opening the door to the flood of bad information we’re dealing with today. Too many traditional news outlets shifted into a defensive posture, deciding to treat “both sides” of every political argument as equally credible to prove their neutrality — even when one side was saying demonstrably false things. This naturally led to even more widespread distrust. And when combined with the shuttering of local and regional newsrooms, it’s no wonder why more than 185 million Americans don’t trust the news. But only recently have we started to truly feel the consequences this is having on our democracy. Democracy relies on journalists who are willing to ask tough questions, hold power accountable, and call out disinformation for what it is, especially when it’s coming from powerful politicians. And it relies on newsrooms that are supportive of that mission. That’s why I founded COURIER, Peter. And with our network of online newsrooms now serving ten battleground states, we’re making a big impact. Our journalists in states like Arizona and Wisconsin have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local news can play in state and local elections. = You've been chosen to sponsor our newsrooms! Your donation will go towards powering the high-quality journalism from each of our newsrooms located across ten battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Wisconsin. And that's not all — COURIER is making plans to open a newsroom in Texas ahead of the 2024 election! Can we count on you to chip in now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states? = We’ve watched the mainstream media normalize and propagate Trump’s blatant lies ever since his first campaign in 2016, and we saw the consequences when his supporters attacked the Capitol on January 6th. For the sake of our democracy, we need to do our part to inform voters and make sure it doesn’t happen again in 2024. Peter, none of our newsrooms rely on subscription fees or paywalls to keep the lights on. Allof our stories are completely free to read, and instead, we rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you to help us keep up our work. = = Thanks so much for your support, Tara McGowan Founder & Publisher COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ea8634d2150e487b858146f9eeb09823&_e=KycHcvV1tO-x37JXMSXckiVA1VoJS6nSyKcRkVXxxElJamT9wRdclgDTp7AR3zpXJGpUIQBAQrCTzMzN2lJOB90rInGHYELKQTUuEVmRq1HFZOgU9yUHKcSFZyYRdwPP6dOHeOgx3VGf-sXnaces_8V7MQpcgzc1px2dg6MkH5807mKm3Oj758bywFIbEsLdWw4Gojjfqx-LIAarJ29lb7Hi0tI4c-pl7SqcDhooYPhVOIUnGWfBk3wSKZDGpqnDC8LEcZqQOE4f9TuKIWB3rHpFUJvMM16Dveqiy8fs5EMmbJpe1wxTVmY-O9Zu2_BYJ5pXo4AcjzvSy_fxctosarijro3ki555_G0uGZVBXsIaWAztwDbY3Jmj_0NTHtRBqQrVYEhYkb9LUiWU0qT-SA%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Never eat almonds, spinach and peanut butter (Here's why)
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

If you've been led to believe
that peanut butter, almonds and spinach are good for you, today's
email might shock you and is important to read, because these 3
healthy foods could be contributing to health problems in your
body.

Let's take a quick look at why...

1. Peanut butter

While peanut butter does contain
a small amount of protein and vitamins/minerals, the cons
outweigh the pros on this food.

First of all, peanuts contain one
of the highest concentrations of aflatoxin, which is a mold toxin
that is created in peanuts due to storage in moist conditions.

Peanut butter is also very high
in inflammatory omega-6 fats and due to the processing of peanut
butter, those omega 6 fats are in a harmful oxidized state.

Most people already get too much
omega 6 fats from vegetable oils (soy, corn, canola, etc), and
this contributes to insulin resistance, heart disease, brain
inflammation, cancer, and lots more health problems, since most
people are currently eating 5-10x more omega-6 fats than we
should be eating in a healthy diet.

Lastly, peanut butter also
contains medium amounts of oxalates, which are plant-based
antinutrients that when consumed in excess can contribute to
kidney stones, thyroid and gut problems, joint problems and more.

We'll talk more about oxalates in
the next food...

2. Spinach

Spinach is promoted as a healthy
green, but contains FAR more downsides than good sides. Spinach
is one of the highest oxalate foods that's commonly eaten by
modern humans (in addition to beet greens, beets, almonds, and
other veggies and nuts).

The amount of oxalates in a
serving of spinach is extremely high, up to 600 mg in a normal
sized bowl.

The "safe" amount of oxalates in
a daily diet according to world renowned oxalate expert Sally
Norton should be between 100-200 mg per day total to avoid a lot
of the health problems caused by high oxalate plants.

So, you can see how concerning
spinach is with the extremely high oxalate levels.

As mentioned above, eating too
much oxalates too frequently can cause serious issues such as
kidney stones, thyroid problems, gut damage, skin issues, and
joint pain.

In fact, some people have even
gotten "oxalate poisoning" by eating green smoothies too often
and had to go to the ER for kidney failure.

3. Almonds

Although almonds and almond milk
are marketed as healthy, they also contain many downsides,
including all of the negatives mentioned above about too much
omega 6 fats and too much oxalates.

They're probably ok in your diet
occasionally, but I personally avoid eating almonds too often
because of these issues with excess oxalates and omega 6 fats.

Now let's take a look at a fun
little quiz below and a few more foods...

Bananas vs oranges vs apples...
(the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones. Both sapping you of energy and forcing
your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned
off" with normal diet and exercise.

Do you know the fruit I'm talking
about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it
is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

subject: The Hill just named Martin a “Changemaker.” Here’s what that means:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

We wanted to make sure you saw this. We wanted to make sure you saw this: _The Hill_ just named Martin a Changemaker for his work raising awareness of the implications of artificial intelligence (AI). This is a no-brainer for Martin: We need to think critically about how this technology fits into our lives while making sure we protect privacy, jobs and workers, and civil rights. Martin has a natural interest in AI as an engineer and helped found the Senate AI Caucus. He's committed to informing his colleagues on responsible AI policy and regulation so we can balance innovation with the valid ethical and security concerns that come with it. He even recently joined George R.R. Martin — yes, _Game of Thrones_ author George R.R. Martin! — to discuss how AI should support (but never replace) writers, artists, and other creatives. This is just one of the key issues Martin is working on — **while he also fights to preserve our wildlife, protect our public lands, and boost our economy.** **[While Martin focuses on being a Changemaker, will you help him catch up on fundraising before tonight’s last mid-month deadline of the year by pitching in $10 or more? It shouldn’t be controversial to say: Stop the killing! Let’s save lives! But rather than work for a ceasefire, rather than acknowledge our shared humanity, many of our elected leaders are trying to help Israel’s government massacre even more Palestinians.

The American people have been clear: The vast majority of us do not want our tax dollars to fund ethnic cleansing. The vast majority of us want a real ceasefire.
And many people are losing their faith in our democracy. For too long, marginalized people have been unheard by our government. I ran for the Michigan House of Representatives and then the U.S. House of Representatives to change that.
We didn’t send people to Congress or send President Biden to the White House to have them supply bombs for a genocide. We must keep making clear that we are paying attention, and we will not forget the actions of our elected leaders.
[**Please sign to demand President Biden and Congress call for a ceasefire now, rather than send more U.S. weapons or billions of our taxpayer dollars to massacre Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKuP-hd3yTLHGUBvk3m08lAYVHaixTFeCnlbr2MB72nbd6HPdUb_3A4SoN1BdpKXCOo412Ctfk-QdYapBPOevfGtZWeftt-SHrk8-SNtrQ_y_HJpBs6a6Mx4OjAVNsr63obIfbaPjx69hBInL_Ga4DXMVGgDdUqMLqhhTQ9yB9wIe2g-wCaCGzV3wrAKQ3ZRyWY97g_KJraGKiuy3CMNg7gQWpDUt8zXK6UG7BfqMPtoj1wbEfIS_RwUWy5ieS6SXawnxDDy79r7R64WwRgz09_wWVxZfyA5WqcJM4WHeHFfIAAWXky2F-v5UgC3oPR0RJDAZMesBEAW8BzdoOu6pTLO-OUyxJbV9o7grKxFC5bmNkcBiyw50fXzIctnMfnJRHECVBWsSlR89xgWVnrQP0BJJFtUfLPO34Q72NzFjvhS5JuNf_cm63ec6o92nLQed7x2SpSH7wJsaRGdzOfunVlBRoeig9jxnbSCM3sobO09kbQqoDHqCj-L1ybypwp-GgAxDQzDcronsyQMYs5glguewUmT00bq34JsvoZVjs57Ow/426/gObWTaNBRbyY7crDmP8kPg/h3/HLzrpND9MDo7GI2Qpf7tKuWRIJj2Wx4Xta2_ulVh5Go)

Friend,

Over the past week, the Biden administration vetoed a UN Security Council resolution calling for a ceasefire, and bypassed Congress to send more weapons to Israel’s military as it slaughters Palestinians.
The American people want a ceasefire, and they don’t want their tax dollars funding ethnic cleansing. But they’re not being heard by President Biden nor their representatives in Congress.
Last week, all Senate Democrats voted to send billions to Israel’s military without conditions, enabling more violence. The Senate Republicans voted against it only because they wanted additional funding to target immigrants coming to the United States.
Now the Biden administration may bargain away the rights and safety of asylum seekers and immigrants—in order to secure more money for the Israeli military for bombs, weapons, and war crimes.
[**Please sign now to tell President Biden and Congress: Instead of committing genocide with U.S. weapons and taxpayer dollars, we demand you call for a ceasefire now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl2H9B0DhwRwZfHOc0LjKKuP-hd3yTLHGUBvk3m08lAYVHaixTFeCnlbr2MB72nbd6HPdUb_3A4SoN1BdpKXCOo412Ctfk-QdYapBPOevfGtZWeftt-SHrk8-SNtrQ_y_HJpBs6a6Mx4OjAVNsr63obIfbaPjx69hBInL_Ga4DXMVGgDdUqMLqhhTQ9yB9wIe0fWfx-nawkgJq7uN0N3_EGLrS0hUWN97CgxE2qc_OwdMzFQwkMWkmKkeGtQRV68e-gWXeVO_E2DgkZug3U1HmeBpqLAsC79dUmO9-Kgc1kkDpCjTh_zL6pqGW37y0BCY5SHGfh1vqa-ouXP2-dKkAm_0GYxChrruuKRfPsHbf1EBofwIMRWyTtTXVpOFXWyPVt0tXvDw0nO4AGdXDueRSx84p9nFES6P23BcmfO_C7jpUiTeAZk8HEn3OuQfnnxbYEdQV30uZ__NvD3q5XuglusqYLGZZmf7uG4s57a8NtPBy8scs5naQMEf2HJXfqec14xj1oFvOZIlSZt3qgZCi8_GzKLF2CnDqh6aKnRFSQ9NcmyQUJ-2xv26tfyTQLc1M/426/gObWTaNBRbyY7crDmP8kPg/h4/R5ZcjgJe-Hmt49Pl0d-gQzc2RXe2LJRXdNpV97he3Ss)

President Biden and my colleagues in Congress have seen dead Palestinian children pulled from the rubble in their pajamas. They’ve seen refugee camps, UN schools, and hospitals bombed with U.S. bombs. They’re watching now as people in Gaza are dying from disease and starving, without enough food or water.
Israel’s government has already massacred over 18,000 Palestinians, and our federal government is egging on even more bloodshed.
It shouldn’t be controversial to say: Stop the killing! Let’s save lives! But rather than work for a ceasefire, rather than acknowledge the humanity of Palestinians or stop the genocide, our elected leaders are supporting more violence.
We cannot lose our shared humanity. We must stay in the streets and on the phones, demanding our elected leaders act now. We must keep crying out that everyone deserves to live.

clean_body: The American people want a ceasefire, and they don’t want their tax dollars funding ethnic cleansing. | | | Friend, Last week, all Senate Democrats voted to send billions to Israel’s military without conditions. (They were blocked by Senate Republicans, who are demanding more money in the funding package to harm immigrants and asylum seekers seeking refuge in the U.S.) The Biden administration just vetoed a UN Security Council resolution calling for a ceasefire, and bypassed Congress to send more weapons to Israel’s military as it commits war crimes. | It shouldn’t be controversial to say: Stop the killing! Let’s save lives! But rather than work for a ceasefire, rather than acknowledge our shared humanity, many of our elected leaders are trying to help Israel’s government massacre even more Palestinians. The American people have been clear: The vast majority of us do not want our tax dollars to fund ethnic cleansing. The vast majority of us want a real ceasefire. And many people are losing their faith in our democracy. For too long, marginalized people have been unheard by our government. I ran for the Michigan House of Representatives and then the U.S. House of Representatives to change that. We didn’t send people to Congress or send President Biden to the White House to have them supply bombs for a genocide. We must keep making clear that we are paying attention, and we will not forget the actions of our elected leaders. Thank you for continuing to see and advocate for our shared humanity. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Thu, Dec 14, 2023 Subject: Sign to tell Biden and Congress: Don’t commit genocide with U.S. weapons and taxpayer dollars To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Over the past week, the Biden administration vetoed a UN Security Council resolution calling for a ceasefire, and bypassed Congress to send more weapons to Israel’s military as it slaughters Palestinians. The American people want a ceasefire, and they don’t want their tax dollars funding ethnic cleansing. But they’re not being heard by President Biden nor their representatives in Congress. Last week, all Senate Democrats voted to send billions to Israel’s military without conditions, enabling more violence. The Senate Republicans voted against it only because they wanted additional funding to target immigrants coming to the United States. Now the Biden administration may bargain away the rights and safety of asylum seekers and immigrants—in order to secure more money for the Israeli military for bombs, weapons, and war crimes. President Biden and my colleagues in Congress have seen dead Palestinian children pulled from the rubble in their pajamas. They’ve seen refugee camps, UN schools, and hospitals bombed with U.S. bombs. They’re watching now as people in Gaza are dying from disease and starving, without enough food or water. Israel’s government has already massacred over 18,000 Palestinians, and our federal government is egging on even more bloodshed. It shouldn’t be controversial to say: Stop the killing! Let’s save lives! But rather than work for a ceasefire, rather than acknowledge the humanity of Palestinians or stop the genocide, our elected leaders are supporting more violence. We cannot lose our shared humanity. We must stay in the streets and on the phones, demanding our elected leaders act now. We must keep crying out that everyone deserves to live. Thank you for being part of our growing movement to save lives. Together, we will keep demanding not only a ceasefire, but also an end to the blockade on Gaza, an end to the dehumanizing system of apartheid, and the return of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained. We will keep advocating for human rights and freedom for all people around the world. name: Martha at United We Dream Action
subject: Everyone has a role to play
body:
I’ve seen firsthand how organizations like United We Dream Action can make a difference in the lives of immigrants like me. | | | Peter, I was first introduced to United We Dream Action’s work when I was trying to understand my rights as a DACA recipient. I didn’t know what I could and couldn’t do with my DACA status, and during my research I found the UWD website. As a DACA recipient, I’ve seen firsthand how much organizations like United We Dream Action can make a difference in the lives of immigrants like me. It was organizations like UWDA that fought for and won DACA protections in the first place, which allowed me to work and live in the United States without the threat of deportation looming overhead. I decided to get involved in this community to empower other immigrants like me who don’t always know where to turn. I’ve always said: **_If I don’t do it, then who will?_** I see the same energy in United We Dream. I see members volunteering and expecting nothing in return. I see leaders organizing their communities to advocate for change. I see our organization coming together to plan big actions that support the immigrant rights movement. **United We Dream Action’s work would not be possible without the help from supporters like you. We all have a role to play in the movement, and grassroots supporters like you, chipping in $10 or $25 at a time, play one of the most essential parts. clean_body: I’ve seen firsthand how organizations like United We Dream Action can make a difference in the lives of immigrants like me. | | | Peter, I was first introduced to United We Dream Action’s work when I was trying to understand my rights as a DACA recipient. I didn’t know what I could and couldn’t do with my DACA status, and during my research I found the UWD website. As a DACA recipient, I’ve seen firsthand how much organizations like United We Dream Action can make a difference in the lives of immigrants like me. It was organizations like UWDA that fought for and won DACA protections in the first place, which allowed me to work and live in the United States without the threat of deportation looming overhead. I decided to get involved in this community to empower other immigrants like me who don’t always know where to turn. I’ve always said: If I don’t do it, then who will? I see the same energy in United We Dream. I see members volunteering and expecting nothing in return. I see leaders organizing their communities to advocate for change. I see our organization coming together to plan big actions that support the immigrant rights movement. United We Dream Action’s work would not be possible without the help from supporters like you. We all have a role to play in the movement, and grassroots supporters like you, chipping in $10 or $25 at a time, play one of the most essential parts. Will you pitch in today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I am proud to be a member of United We Dream Action, and I hope you’ll consider supporting our work with a donation of any amount today. Thanks for listening, Martha, United We Dream Action

| | Movement Labs and our signature project, Contest Every Race, are on a mission to get names on ballots and candidates in seats before waves of local filing deadlines hit us in February. That means researching, recruiting, and navigating a lot of red tape and yes, some bureaucratic confusion, to make sure every candidate in every municipality, ward, district, and county has the right information to launch their campaign. It can be daunting and confusing for first-time candidates, but it's our job to make the process easy! [**Help get a first-timer ready to run for local office by making a quick $3 contribution right now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75290739/444218024/-327605227?refcode=2023-12-16-filing-deadline&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=55cce057-349c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWNjZTA1Ny0zNDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqeXnu7CWwU3YKK21MAnR1IiCsAI2RRI9XpDkHGxv1o=) It's one of the busiest times of the year for us as we count down to candidate filing deadlines. If we don't have good, local folks filed to run for office, entrenched Republicans get to keep making the laws and policies that affect our daily lives. [**Your dollar means we can recruit thousands of candidates to run for thousands of local offices. Chip in $3 and join the wave of local and rural candidates breaking supermajorities and putting power back into the hands of people like you!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75290740/444218025/-327605227?refcode=2023-12-16-filing-deadline&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=55cce057-349c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWNjZTA1Ny0zNDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqeXnu7CWwU3YKK21MAnR1IiCsAI2RRI9XpDkHGxv1o=) Thanks for making change in towns and cities across the country! _Yoni_ Yoni Landau

clean_body: | | | | Movement Labs and our signature project, Contest Every Race, are on a mission to get names on ballots and candidates in seats before waves of local filing deadlines hit us in February. That means researching, recruiting, and navigating a lot of red tape and yes, some bureaucratic confusion, to make sure every candidate in every municipality, ward, district, and county has the right information to launch their campaign. It can be daunting and confusing for first-time candidates, but it's our job to make the process easy! = It's one of the busiest times of the year for us as we count down to candidate filing deadlines. If we don't have good, local folks filed to run for office, entrenched Republicans get to keep making the laws and policies that affect our daily lives. = Thanks for making change in towns and cities across the country! Yoni Yoni Landau CEO Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

name: HillHarper.com
subject: A slower week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231216&t=1&akid=702%2E62735%2EwYnUXG)
Peter,
We’d love to relax this weekend — but unfortunately we’ve had a slower fundraising week so we’re still working hard to close the gap.
[**Can you chip in a couple dollars right now to help us out?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231216?amount=5&refcode=em20231216-702&refcode2=702_62735_wYnUXG&akid=702%2E62735%2EwYnUXG)
One slower week may not seem like a big deal, but a few slower weeks in a row can really set our campaign back. And that’s why we have to work so hard to make sure that doesn’t happen.
We’re up against an establishment opponent who has the backing of major donor millions and a war chest of corporate + PAC funds.
On the other hand we’re running our campaign the right way: with grassroots small-dollar donations so that we’re only beholden to the constituents that we’re fighting for.
**By doing the right thing and refusing their money, we’ve made our campaign a target.**
[**That’s why we need your help today**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231216?amount=5&refcode=em20231216-702&refcode2=702_62735_wYnUXG&akid=702%2E62735%2EwYnUXG)**[, Peter. Can you chip in anything you can right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231216?amount=5&refcode=em20231216-702&refcode2=702_62735_wYnUXG&akid=702%2E62735%2EwYnUXG) **
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231216?amount=5&refcode=em20231216-702&refcode2=702_62735_wYnUXG&akid=702%2E62735%2EwYnUXG)**
Have a great weekend,
Team Hill

Hi Fellow American, it’s Speaker Mike Johnson and I had to email you with these two urgent updates...

1. Democrats are BEATING US at fundraising... they’ve brought in more than $44 million this cycle, and that number is climbing every single day.

2. Our razor-thin majority is SHRINKING, making it easier for Nancy Pelosi to retake the House and granting Democrats FULL control in Washington.

I know times are tough right now, but I’m incredibly concerned about the state of our country... and if we don’t see a surge in donations before the year is up, we’ll be giving Democrats the momentum they need to beat us BIG in 2024. [**So, I’m humbly asking for your gift of any amount you can spare in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c99259109d46069995e38347df303d&_e=61xI3NbvyV-j5Nq4SU8pEsz5coRvwMRQPjbOg54AgFiR-JGzBobxBA6sbPS3ugslg_hUcufRL8fo-EzO_h_QVfBkKuuzj8bN5FI4mjwNR8WDE9mcjgxsu44nEddLmrsiXOp4wwScBPKfrUCk1ME-GAX6o_aMwoTh-cjIjAi__-oshpEEO1kJ9b5A3uWuyGHGhKxxHioXAEH_bQxxe-X0uypB68bcA9cguTMJwd_tbTviP_yZtiQS9vXWLpjkZ_CWxCvQnVg7qFHQmCqb-DGIKBfMBjTa_tHdaVX-icfWQTV5SmvADHGWUBIKFA6p-sjpcNjv4x41iksG0slSBWnX0ON7GKgT4FtGcj96ZeV0P_qT3yRWMuTfin-vp1hpLu7bFzryiD81r9AzvarGDaPOUwkrkOuxEZMKSZ8TWZLyzuA%3D)

[** STEP UP IMMEDIATELY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c99259109d46069995e38347df303d&_e=61xI3NbvyV-j5Nq4SU8pEsz5coRvwMRQPjbOg54AgFiR-JGzBobxBA6sbPS3ugslg_hUcufRL8fo-EzO_h_QVfBkKuuzj8bN5FI4mjwNR8WDE9mcjgxsu44nEddLmrsiXOp4wwScBPKfrUCk1ME-GAX6o_aMwoTh-cjIjAi__-oshpEEO1kJ9b5A3uWuyGHGhKxxHioXAEH_bQxxe-X0uypB68bcA9cguTMJwd_tbTviP_yZtiQS9vXWLpjkZ_CWBKrEulzQdTvrHuUyfAVbgvPkenetjxpmS8QIAz3w7YEt_aEjmHruIl1VPIXVd4uxdxBhleGBtR8RD-9U1Q5yJSVC_MzZIAvL1ksb_PlHD5XoouGMtTz81uCqiasmJH5JImK0u23P_FKuN27QZebEk6ZX7TH59XC7_yu1Olrss2E%3D)
You already know how bad things are, Fellow American. But imagine the state of our country next year if Democrats control all three branches of government. _**They’ll have unlimited power to ram through their radical, woke agenda.**_

**Just think... OPEN borders, UNSECURED elections, Government hand-outs for ALL (including non-Americans), corruption run AMUCK, violent CRIME in our streets, woke politics in our schools... _the list goes on and ON._**

[**Which is why I’m looking for every conservative across the country to step up and FIGHT back against the Democratic fundraising surge and ensure we have the resources to GROW the majority.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c99259109d46069995e38347df303d&_e=61xI3NbvyV-j5Nq4SU8pEsz5coRvwMRQPjbOg54AgFiR-JGzBobxBA6sbPS3ugslg_hUcufRL8fo-EzO_h_QVfBkKuuzj8bN5FI4mjwNR8WDE9mcjgxsu44nEddLmrsiXOp4wwScBPKfrUCk1ME-GAX6o_aMwoTh-cjIjAi__-oshpEEO1kJ9b5A3uWuyGHGhKxxHioXAEH_bQxxe-X0uypB68bcA9cguTMJwd_tbTviP_yZtiQS9vXWLpjkZ_CWdGicc282FIp3463Lw0VYWkx6exrzflf0l55It91pjz8Gp-1EU9_L0RwLO7-4pYRh9tkdWQK9OmZqGNUalYjVTaZPe7cctku-w2DRk_5y_3ADQaAP9z13y2oYVjfzQFgPlH3xc8u4i6ZhUMQP2lgFq0OL-qci5AtXO4IzjzGPE74%3D)

I hope I can rely on you.

In service,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c99259109d46069995e38347df303d&_e=61xI3NbvyV-j5Nq4SU8pEv91rcacIDFbAGOiwjBwpmN7i8y5GPrhrllbPpNCY1JCkHhX5in20UBXYDpMSfAUv3t15CrkY7h8UQbxiNTf8frQ0wzIxEXT2iZRA14_HGHO0EedpANvIEqk_Y3v9RrxJdcDTVAvFQa9jj8VlOERY6o6zTXQ3hm2rACODvJiSx-2gWsxhNL8TIe45YvRt1nlai3ylFqsM5NM_SczoanJ8qInCHiWRWOj-w_iTM1vl2PKL4BjacnLYJc36ANLgkTvJOpVSwcLY8EqyV8nV796DbWGWescXVvGk389n9Nw4YQ5SRApiPm7oBL5J_4hLL3N3d_4eLj_5sTVAU_g2WmTMN4GIHyzexntJ73DhJ-FXZcvZ02mTvlZiSBBuTeLvRTYHYB6jkDrndj80mi47f2e5QDmBkKPOZaGn3Jynceb3xSb02kx1ByTpF0GVt8wXXQhNWFcYfEMZtMtgK8nELrHMG15nzqRpmKJwzJiqGZQRJixHnaWBPZvBLQ0skALHRA6diE_YVeKaUnaqcm7RLzO9-D0gOgps0c-3LTrpvuxpnWkk_KFRcxL4JoFwphKgLMb3A%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=44c99259109d46069995e38347df303d&_e=61xI3NbvyV-j5Nq4SU8pEsz5coRvwMRQPjbOg54AgFiR-JGzBobxBA6sbPS3ugslg_hUcufRL8fo-EzO_h_QVfBkKuuzj8bN5FI4mjwNR8WDE9mcjgxsu44nEddLmrsiXOp4wwScBPKfrUCk1ME-GAX6o_aMwoTh-cjIjAi__-oshpEEO1kJ9b5A3uWuyGHGhKxxHioXAEH_bQxxe-X0uypB68bcA9cguTMJwd_tbTviP_yZtiQS9vXWLpjkZ_CW7GyDO4PfhVSx26rKTjwTdN0uMA-MeHetwG-4jHyVHZsYU2zD2mt1JMYZvv_Z-chC85PKiRMADI1hQZAsLP5do2wJZN7CHvFqxkVStuxFXjjBQ-5-cxw_h836eW_zIAfYtUOfp1zcjWsyi1S2IhfnGhTIQNVhdu45zZYSUnVTPG8%3D)

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: 12 pieces of good news on the economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

clean_body: [] Peter, Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross. More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most. Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [] CONTRIBUTE [] Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas. I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue. Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thanks, Kurt [] Paid for by Kroemer for Congress Kroemer for Congress PO Box 9413 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [] Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Republican David Schweikert, please unsubscribe:

body:
Their impeachment inquiry of President Biden is in direct alignment with the most extreme elements of their party, in particular, Donald Trump.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75291464/444219503/803312106?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2023-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMTllOS0zNDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bePwslZM568-M7ohEkUiyl_VzCNZsTv765lNjwWHuMM=)

| Peter,

_**House Republicans, led by my opponent Anthony D'Esposito, have abandoned our community's priorities.**_ Instead of tackling crucial issues like lowering costs for everyday Americans and safeguarding women's rights, they've chosen to prioritize political theatrics. Their impeachment inquiry of President Biden is in direct alignment with the most extreme elements of their party, in particular, Donald Trump.
---
| [HELP US FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75291468/444219505/549506458?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2023-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMTllOS0zNDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bePwslZM568-M7ohEkUiyl_VzCNZsTv765lNjwWHuMM=)
