I entered this race with a clear goal: to restore civility and common sense to the US House of Representatives. It's disheartening to witness my opponent and their party continue to sow partisanship and chaos, neglecting the needs of the people they serve.

Enough is enough. The extremism and allegiance to Trump's agenda have gone too far. Our district deserves better—a representative focused on our community's well-being, not political games.

Our seat is pivotal in shaping the future of our nation's priorities. Together, we can reclaim it, take back the House, and restore order in Congress.

[_**If you believe in combating extremism and prioritizing our community's needs, I ask for your support today. Let's stand together against the politics of division and work towards a future that genuinely serves us all.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75291472/444219507/549506458?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2023-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIzMTllOS0zNDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bePwslZM568-M7ohEkUiyl_VzCNZsTv765lNjwWHuMM=)

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Laura

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Holding Ukraine hostage to force cruel demands: GOP's plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We did not spend years fighting this agenda under Trump only to give in to Senate Republicans’ extreme demands now.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20231216-3281-footer&t=1&akid=3281%2E420207%2ElsdWor)
Peter,
Republicans are on the verge of pushing through the most extreme and restrictive immigration legislation in generations this week —**and they are holding Ukraine funding hostage to force these cruel and ineffective immigration policy demands.**
**I won't stand for this brinkmanship and chaos from MAGA Republicans, so I’m raising the alarm in Congress. I’ve called on my Senate colleagues to reject this ransom demand for Ukraine aid and pass thoughtful, humane reforms.**
**The GOP is fighting for policies that are so extreme they would be the most restrictive immigration legislation since the racial quota laws of the 1920s. They are the foundation of Donald Trump’s vision of ‘sweeping raids, giant camps, and mass deportations’ in a potential second term.**
**We did not spend years fighting this agenda under Trump only to give in to Republicans’ extreme demands now. We must enact humane, bipartisan reforms to our broken immigration system. We need to expand lawful pathways and provide funding to cities welcoming new asylum seekers.**
**Destroying the asylum system will not fix the southern border. Reports have shown this Republican proposal would not reduce unauthorized border crossings. It’ll only sow chaos and cruelty.**
[**If you stand with our fight, please chip in to support our stand for immigration justice and reform.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231216.A8XNHr&refcode=em20231216-3281&t=2&akid=3281%2E420207%2ElsdWor)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231216.A8XNHr&refcode=em20231216-3281&t=21&akid=3281%2E420207%2ElsdWor)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231216-3281-footer&t=22&refcode2=3281_420207_lsdWor&akid=3281%2E420207%2ElsdWor)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Whether you’ve already taken one of our member surveys this year or you’re making your voice heard for the first time, we want to hear your thoughts on this political moment. Since our **last** survey, we’ve seen major news stories about possible right-wing shifts in immigration policy, a woman in Texas who had to flee the state to receive life saving abortion care, and a start and an end to a ceasefire in Gaza. **We want to know how you think President Biden and Congress have been handling these issues and more, what issues you’d like our movement to focus on, and which local leaders you think we should be paying attention to next year and beyond.** **[Can you take a few minutes right now to fill out the December WFP pulse survey and tell us how you’re feeling clean_body: | | | Peter, The world is changing every day, and as a grassroots political party for the many, we want to make sure that we’re as responsive as possible to our members and their concerns. Can you take our short WFP pulse survey to let us know how you’re feeling and what you want us to focus on as we head into 2024? Answer the first question now: Whether you’ve already taken one of our member surveys this year or you’re making your voice heard for the first time, we want to hear your thoughts on this political moment. Since our last survey, we’ve seen major news stories about possible right-wing shifts in immigration policy, a woman in Texas who had to flee the state to receive life saving abortion care, and a start and an end to a ceasefire in Gaza. We want to know how you think President Biden and Congress have been handling these issues and more, what issues you’d like our movement to focus on, and which local leaders you think we should be paying attention to next year and beyond. In solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Jon Tester
subject: not taking anything for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Mitch McConnell has me in his sights, and I know national Republicans will spend just about anything to try and beat me. |
#
Hey, folks. This is Jon Tester. I’m humbled by this team and the support our campaign has received. Thanks to you, TV ads are up and running across Montana to share my story and what I’m fighting for. But unfortunately, we’re not the only ones picking up the pace. Mitch McConnell has me in his sights, and I know national Republicans will spend just about anything to try and beat me. Just last month, a super PAC flooded the airwaves in Montana to support one of my potential opponents. **They’re spending so much money to try and turn me into someone I’m not because they know they can’t beat who I am.** But we’re not taking anything for granted. Here’s what I know about my team—we won’t be outworked, but we might be outspent. **If we continue to have the resources to reach and turn out Montana voters, we’ll win this election. It’s that simple—and I’m asking you to help:** **[Will you split a contribution of any amount right now between Tina Smith and my campaign to help us build the strongest team we can? name: Nikki Haley
subject: My reason
body:
Let me explain
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/leGNz1bBbBdfk_qhsIzFhA~~/AARclAA~-vWVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
| | My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/leGNz1bBbBdfk_qhsIzFhA~~/AARclAA~-vWVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**
My very best,

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Billion$
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s the deal.
#
Here's the deal, Derek:
The new year is just a few weeks away, and here on Team Fetterman, we’re already planning out everything we have to get done in 2024.
John is hard at work in the Senate fighting for PA. But this whole time, John’s faced non-stop attacks from the far right and from Fox News. That will only pick up next year, when **Republicans will use their super PAC million$ to flip PA red next year — and with it, the Senate.**
GOP Super PACs spent billion$ in 2022, and their power is growing. 🤢 We have to be ready for anything. To fight back, we need your grassroots support.
**[So what do you say, Derek? Will you chip in to continue powering our movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231216-1?refcode=em20231216-1-8715&refcode2=8715_434096_71hrOv&akid=8715%2E434096%2E71hrOv)**

We're so glad you're on this team -- together, we'll keep John fighting for PA + all of us in the Senate.
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231216-8715-footer&t=1&refcode2=8715_434096_71hrOv&akid=8715%2E434096%2E71hrOv)**

The Minnesota Court of Appeals ruled in our favor and reaffirmed one of the biggest wins from this year’s historic legislative session. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75297108/444230364/1351318166?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTJkYTRjZS0zYjljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3m-Z9VS4WVSFOAMFtomB5ZfurERxlTn8c-6QR8OUOaE=)
---
[**“Judge dismisses challenge to Minnesota law that allows some felons to vote”** _– KSTP_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75297109/444230365/1351318166?refcode=head&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTJkYTRjZS0zYjljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3m-Z9VS4WVSFOAMFtomB5ZfurERxlTn8c-6QR8OUOaE=)
Peter,
When a judge in Mille Lacs County was attempting to rule the Restore the Vote Act unconstitutional last month, I stepped in to defend it. The Minnesota Court of Appeals ruled in our favor and reaffirmed one of the biggest wins from this year’s historic legislative session.
**Today, I’m proud to announce that yet another effort to undermine the voting rights of 50,000 formerly incarcerated Minnesotans has been soundly rejected in court. **
This ruling makes two things clear: The legislature has the ability to decide when voting rights are restored to Minnesotans, and the Restore the Vote Act is constitutional. It’s a victory for democracy when we need it more than ever.
Republican lawmakers continue to seize on Trump's Big Lie and use his false claims as cover to flood state legislatures across the country with voter suppression bills. Many have already passed.**I will always fight to protect your fundamental democratic rights from those who seek to suppress the vote. But I can’t do it alone. **
Your support truly powers all of my work. And with our first and only public deadline of the year coming up on December 31, I’m asking you to help us prove that we’re more than ready to defend our values up and down the ballot next year and beyond.
According to our records, you’re still eligible to use your PCR. That means you can donate up to $50 (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State.
[**Peter, will you take advantage of your refundable $50 donation today to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-year goal and continue working together to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75297112/444230368/1157846490?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTJkYTRjZS0zYjljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3m-Z9VS4WVSFOAMFtomB5ZfurERxlTn8c-6QR8OUOaE=)

clean_body: Peter, When a judge in Mille Lacs County was attempting to rule the Restore the Vote Act unconstitutional last month, I stepped in to defend it. The Minnesota Court of Appeals ruled in our favor and reaffirmed one of the biggest wins from this year’s historic legislative session. | = = Peter, When a judge in Mille Lacs County was attempting to rule the Restore the Vote Act unconstitutional last month, I stepped in to defend it. The Minnesota Court of Appeals ruled in our favor and reaffirmed one of the biggest wins from this year’s historic legislative session. Today, I’m proud to announce that yet another effort to undermine the voting rights of 50,000 formerly incarcerated Minnesotans has been soundly rejected in court. This ruling makes two things clear: The legislature has the ability to decide when voting rights are restored to Minnesotans, and the Restore the Vote Act is constitutional. It’s a victory for democracy when we need it more than ever. Republican lawmakers continue to seize on Trump's Big Lie and use his false claims as cover to flood state legislatures across the country with voter suppression bills. Many have already passed.I will always fight to protect your fundamental democratic rights from those who seek to suppress the vote. But I can’t do it alone. Your support truly powers all of my work. And with our first and only public deadline of the year coming up on December 31, I’m asking you to help us prove that we’re more than ready to defend our values up and down the ballot next year and beyond. According to our records, you’re still eligible to use your PCR. That means you can donate up to $50 (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Keith Ellison Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. | | | Fellow American,

When my family came to America, they were seeking freedom. They didn’t want to take advantage of this country, they wanted to do everything they could to succeed and give back. They taught me to revere the principles that make this nation great. **Sadly, human trafficking, drug smuggling and instability at the border is threatening our nation’s security.** That’s why Joe Biden’s open border policy infuriates me. **[I’m working tirelessly to secure our border, but if we’re going to make America safe again, we need to expand our razor-thin House majority. I've got some news to share with you, both good and bad. **Let's start with the bad news:** Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson and the GOP’s ultra-rich donors are pledging to flood millions into New York to support vulnerable House Republicans in districts won by President Biden. Yes, this includes my opponent, Anthony D'Esposito, **who happens to be the most vulnerable House Republican in the country.** If we don't secure at least 475 more grassroots donations before our mid-December deadline tonight, we'll fall behind on our last and most critical quarterly campaign deadline of the year. **[This setback could jeopardize our momentum to take on the GOP machine and defeat D’Esposito. Click here to rush a donation ASAP>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75297588/444232352/1307708269?refcode=ea.7db94803-3d9c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.7db94803-3d9c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGI5NDgwMy0zZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o9mqGKvkmsZFyYUk5Xx0dQ0KeTuM5VEV09rVJ8e1js=)** **Now, onto the good news:** Believe it or not, election forecasters are calling this race one of the most competitive of the 2024 election. We are in a true toss-up race, and if we continue to build on our momentum, we _will_ flip this seat next year. **[That's why I am counting on your donation to help us reach tonight’s deadline and derail the GOP’s plan to take over New York. I know you’re getting a lot of emails this month (I am, too) but I promise – I wouldn’t bother you unless it were reallllyyyyy important. I've got some news to share with you, both good and bad. Let's start with the bad news: Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson and the GOP’s ultra-rich donors are pledging to flood millions into New York to support vulnerable House Republicans in districts won by President Biden. Yes, this includes my opponent, Anthony D'Esposito, who happens to be the most vulnerable House Republican in the country. If we don't secure at least 475 more grassroots donations before our mid-December deadline tonight, we'll fall behind on our last and most critical quarterly campaign deadline of the year. = Now, onto the good news: Believe it or not, election forecasters are calling this race one of the most competitive of the 2024 election. We are in a true toss-up race, and if we continue to build on our momentum, we will flip this seat next year. = | = I’m so glad I can count on your support. \- Kevin Thomas = | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. name: American Briefing
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi2d6morkteh9gooub8ft3mdgdbt7omo1alucbgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cthmeor2cdh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbr640p68ptc458rk5s2n47at9sg8s1hsmotg5to_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cthmeor2cdh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk23v89kk4khju83q0p67b808lulhcro9o6j8368_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cthmeor2cdh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm7gt03hqcim2vs8ql34kb31ob57b0di3dh0vvm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cthmeor2cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3jm8t5rk8j2kv1g53m4ildo2udnjs6urov998vo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9i6epb0sjh238h1e8he4937c1h6eor7cdh66oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7j0pefsm31ivppc9fmbq9fkh4bpbm9pjhss80a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cthmeor2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z53fnc72d10sdpp96a2jhslss4gir5ain7n51i68_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cthmeor2cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Costello for Senate Newsletter
subject: Costello for Senate Campaign Update
body:
Dear Friend,

2024 is fast approaching and while the race for the U.S. Senate in Maine is
thus far garnering little attention, we are continuing to engage voters and
activists via email, phone calls, in-person and Zoom meetings, DEM Party
events, and social media. Political party candidates must collect
signatures from registered party voters between January and March to be
placed on the State’s June 2024 primary ballot.

Aside from continued voter and activist outreach, collecting ballot
placement signatures from registered Democrats will be a focused task of
our campaign beginning in January. If this is something that you would be
willing to help with, please let us know by emailing us at:
campaign@costelloforsenate.com.

To get a sense of some of what we’ve been up to from a messaging/media
perspective, check out the sampling of social media posts below. Social
media is a big part of what we intend to exploit even further going
forward. To help please consider following us on Instagram and “X”
(formerly Twitter) and sharing and reposting any posts that you agree with
and find compelling.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/costelloforsenate/

Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/costello4senate/
<https://www.twitter.com/costello4senate/>

Additionally, please get back to us with any questions or concerns and, if
you are able, please consider a campaign donation. A contribution, no
matter the amount, will help in ensuring that our message of reform, REAL
change, and progress is heard.

Thank you,

Costello For Senate Team

DONATE HERE >> <https://secure.actblue.com/entity/fundraisers/145994>

*Sample Posts:*

*Americans are crying out for meaningful political change and its well past
time the U.S House and Senate delivered. Washington’s long-standing
dysfunction only serves to maintain the status quo which predominantly
benefits the powerful and wealthy few over the many. #RealChange

*Washington is broken. Gridlock and dysfunction abound, and our imperfect
democracy and government are in danger of becoming even more flawed. To fix
Washington, we need to do more than simply change who we elect every two or
six years. We need to elect politicians whose public policy and service
ambitions are greater than their self-centered political aspirations and
are committed to substantially reforming our governing practices and
institutions.

*Join us in helping to fix Washington by advancing long-overdue legislative
and constitutional reforms that will not only aid in strengthening our
democracy and government, but also help in better protecting our rights and
freedoms and assist in more effectively addressing such pressing problems
as climate change, escalating gun violence, affordable health care and
housing, economic inequality, shoddy infrastructure, underperforming
schools, and insufficient retirement security.

*To truly tackle our most pressing problems, like climate change and
escalating gun violence, we need to substantially reform our governing
practices and institutions. Simply replacing status quo elected officials
with other “don’t rock the boat” politicians isn’t working.

Note: Future posts will mention that Maine’s current senators (King and
Collins) haven’t supported the kind of reforms that are needed to truly fix
Washington and at ages 80+ and 77+ are unlikely to do so going forward.

*The authors of the U.S. Constitution expected their work to be improved
upon over time. In response to changing times. Unfortunately, amending our
Constitution has proven near impossible. To make it easier to strengthen
our democracy and government, we should make it easier to amend our
Constitution. Practical solution: It should neither be too easy, nor too
difficult, as is the case now, to amend the U.S. Constitution. Why not
simply require 60% approval of proposed amendments from both houses of
Congress and ratifying support from states representing 60% (or more) of
our nation's population. #FixingWashington
<https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=fixingwashington&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7136009722201059328>
#AMorePerfectUnion
<https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=amoreperfectunion&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7136009722201059328>

*Fixing Washington: To strengthen the legitimacy, popularity, and authority
of presidents we should abolish the Electoral College and establish a
system of directly electing presidents and include ranked choice voting
(RCV) when there are more than two candidates.

*U.S. Senate is detrimentally dysfunctional and obscenely undemocratic!
Time to end the filibuster and nominee holds and restructure its allocation
of political power to be more in-line with a state’s population and the
principle of one person one equal vote.

*Congress is unquestionably broken! The fix: restructure the House so that
it is comprised of 200+ non-gerrymandered, multi-member districts, with
600+ proportionally elected multi-party representatives. More democratic,
accountable, and effective!

*Democracies are stronger when citizens are amply informed and engaged.
Increased funding for civics ed, national service, nonprofit press, and
public broadcasting could aid in markedly strengthening our imperfect and
increasingly under threat democracy. #Democracy #CivicsEdVital

*News Media spend too much on polling and unserious political stunts, and
not enough on objectively evaluating candidate experience and policy
positions. Democracy requires a press less beholden to the “holy dollar”
and more committed to ensuring effective government!

#FreePress

*Sen. King’s and Sen. Heinrich’s proposed bill to diminish the
functionality of military assault weapons is a step in the right direction
and is worth pursuing, however it doesn’t obviate the need for, nor equal
the superior usefulness of an outright ban on the sale of such weapons. As
noted in the Portland Press Herald news article, it takes mere seconds to
reload an assault weapon. More importantly, this bill, other more
comprehensive gun safety bills, and bills to adequately address other
pressing problems like climate change and insufficient retirement security
are unlikely to pass until we address the fact that both houses of Congress
are insufficiently democratic and accountable and in need of substantial
structural overhaul. Until we do so, detrimental gridlock and dysfunction
in Washington will continue to abound.

*The U.S. should continue to fully support Ukraine’s efforts to combat
Vladimir Putin. Too much is at stake for the U.S. not to be fully engaged
in helping Ukraine. Republicans in Congress and elsewhere should stop
playing politics with Ukraine’s survival.

*Those attending COP 28 in Dubai know that climate change is an existential
threat to many of the Earth’s ecosystems, communities, farms, and
livelihoods. It is well past time we enacted stronger regulations, not
just incentives to address climate change. #ClimateActionNow

name: Team Foushee
subject: Wasting taxpayer money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
The only thing standing in the way of Congress working for the people is the GOP's political games.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75298081/444233701/-329851188?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2023-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDkzYWM0OS0zZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7J7f35cj4ZRXLktmJpZHIbUa1vT-alcpVG6GaKRjUSg=)

| Peter,

_This is unbelievable._

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75298087/444233708/-329851188?&refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2023-12-16_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDkzYWM0OS0zZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7J7f35cj4ZRXLktmJpZHIbUa1vT-alcpVG6GaKRjUSg=)
---
At a time when American families need their government to be working for them, the GOP has hijacked the Congressional agenda and forced it through a baseless impeachment inquiry. **Make no mistake, this is a game of political theater meant to derail progressive policies.**

>From abortion rights to affordable healthcare, good-paying union jobs, and more, the Democratic agenda is popular and has a proven track record of success. **_The only thing standing in the way of Congress working for the people is the GOP's political games._ [_That's why we need your help, Peter, can you chip in $5 or $10 to help Valerie as she fights back against Republican extremism and prepares for the 2024 election? clean_body: We can help! | | | Hello Peter. We’re glad that you’ve connected with us, and we’re hoping this is the start (or continuation!) of your amazing redwoods adventure. To that end, we thought we share some fun things to fuel your enjoying of these incredible treasures. Looking to plan your next trip to the redwoods? Don’t know where to start? Let us help you! We have a bunch of free guides to get you going. We wanted to share a little extra love for one of our muses, the great giant sequoia. Its size and the impact it has on our well-being is, well, larger than life. Need a quick dose of redwood awesomeness? We’ve got you covered. Answer a few questions and learn whether you are more like a Northern Spotted Owl or a Banana Slug! | Connect with us on social media: We’re constantly sharing videos, photos, and news about the redwoods. Don’t miss it. | | | ---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League has been working to protect, restore and connect people to the coast redwood and giant sequoia forests for more than 100 years. to learn more about what we’re doing. Thanks so much, Peter, for loving the redwoods like we do. Save the Redwoods League | | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Medicare for All, now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We are the richest nation in the world, and health care should be a right — not a privilege.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4773%2E5257348%2EXUhRfC)
Derek, like so many Americans, I know from experience that when you’re dealing with a family health care emergency, the _last_ thing you need to be worrying about is the insurance bill or how you’re going to pay for it.
You see, when my daughter Lexi was only five, she had her tonsils removed.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231216-medicare-for-all.jq2S_Y&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231216_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4773%2E5257348%2EXUhRfC)
I remember the doctor telling us that there was a small chance that she could begin bleeding profusely from the mouth _(which is how children can die when having their tonsils removed)_ , but not to worry, it wasn't gonna happen to our kid.
**Well, it did happen.**
I remember taking Lexi to the emergency room and standing there with her bleeding from the mouth when they told us they didn't have the staff and couldn't look after her right away.
We eventually went to the Children's Hospital and they took good care of her — and she was fine.
**We were lucky to have quality care that night — and that I had quality health insurance so that we wouldn’t have to worry about medical bills. But unfortunately, that’s not the reality for millions of families across our country.**
We are the richest nation in the world, and health care should be a right — not a privilege.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for Medicare for All to ensure that every family can seek the care they need when they need it.**
I need to know you’re with me in the fight to make sure every American has affordable, quality health care. [**Will you add your name to my petition so that when I make it to the Senate, I can count on your support to pass Medicare for All?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231216-medicare-for-all.jq2S_Y&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231216_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4773%2E5257348%2EXUhRfC)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231216-medicare-for-all.jq2S_Y&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231216_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4773%2E5257348%2EXUhRfC)
---
Thanks,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3294?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231216_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4773%2E5257348%2EXUhRfC)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: We don’t host fancy cocktail fundraisers with wealthy donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We want to give you a peek into our fundraising:
With just a $15.77 average contribution this year, we’re building a powerful small-dollar, grassroots movement for real, systemic change.
In 2023 alone, this movement has raised hundreds of thousands for emergency efforts across the country, progressive allies in electoral races, and community organizers on the ground, building the better world Alexandria is fighting for in Congress.
**And all of this comes from ads and emails just like this one, from supporters just like you.** Alexandria doesn’t spend hours calling corporate donors with deep pockets. She doesn’t curry favor with billionaires or host fancy cocktail fundraisers with wealthy donors.
We came _just_ short of reaching our mid-month fundraising goal to keep pace with what we need to raise for December, which is why we're emailing you today.
[We aren’t a traditional campaign, and we know that’s part of why you’re here. Will you make a $5 contribution right now to help keep our campaign going strong? Every dollar goes to this movement for real progress. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231216.iRaiwo&refcode=em20231216-5490-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231216.iRaiwo&refcode=em20231216-5490-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th)**
Whether or not you are able to make a contribution today, thank you for being a part of this movement for real change.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231216?refcode=em20231216-5490-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5490_2526796_2xD3Th&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231216-5490-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=22&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=5490%2E2526796%2E2xD3Th)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

Hey there — Our final mid-month deadline of the year expired last night and my team asked me to reach out to you because we fell a little short of our goal. With the holidays quickly approaching, we expect grassroots donations to slow down quite a bit in the next couple of weeks. That’s why it’s so important that we make up ground so we’re in a good position to send a strong report to the FEC at the end of the month. clean_body: | Hey there — Our final mid-month deadline of the year expired last night and my team asked me to reach out to you because we fell a little short of our goal. With the holidays quickly approaching, we expect grassroots donations to slow down quite a bit in the next couple of weeks. That’s why it’s so important that we make up ground so we’re in a good position to send a strong report to the FEC at the end of the month. Republicans are gearing up to expand their House majority and have been attacking vulnerable Democrats left and right, so we can’t afford to come up short and look weak right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = Thanks in advance for your help. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

| | Peter — In 2024 we have the opportunity of a lifetime to elect **_Barbara Lee to the US Senate — and we refuse to let it slip past us._**

Barbara Lee has fought for what’s right her entire life — and it’s earned her some of the most coveted endorsements in the country. [Can you rush $10 right away to help us elect champions like Barbara Lee?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-hSuQcT1AVjZkfa8zH5j2d0Xbq7chGujNG3zDGNUsMkANEXZ83ATpgnlR21UDKmmwZyiSpvKSTrwotbHLPhzsnOySI2aXLSnq1e1j5saYRPhjvAWSjJv5S3Zv7ZcX4PHUeava4Ih4MGMmUvYnuzZ6bnj-eW0fGqHCYohjznnNVELqB6nQiBgpqMjjkYyOzR7JVKKymwbyifRbzQukuMgNi6bX5k1Xd5gAdG2Ev6OgwHy_FBRmudff3O0PfwvkoGUeftskmuFveDFj9bN7SvTT8-ph42u2WAZPGggDTStiQc-fK0Inc4z4qYZHPE76GDQr/426/109Xk6DjQFGYFUSdWMgXEA/h1/tahCWvYbjC0dOS_lC8uTenW7qUbrsGNzCNHg9gBu_Xo) [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-hSuQcT1AVjZkfa8zH5j2d0Xbq7chGujNG3zDGNUsMkBgrZ-3hLmpn_jXif0ylLPNlbaguqOhPMCc4nQcv48pkg2Rpvt9XP5HXTA7JzWsdwhrGF5ikrl4G2Y25pAGpOCXJ_B-n3Ipz3bVkmhU89AWzwp320oELdERigr4m24RVbXjQQkXfyDdwExRrQAYYYWBPBUTBZj7YghzhgiSggVcGuIXsznLGIdQrfYemOVpyi4GlMQv9EVHSPfSUEPC1t3MIPKvA7RJTR7zN9NzcoBcVmQX8xSVhRnHqyCmnA1l8heG-2QldCF8IgvnDS00IAz-/426/109Xk6DjQFGYFUSdWMgXEA/h2/zgScaJ_drZc6ycbLIi0C46m15bKUd1S1DDUpqJ1FNbc) Barbara is a trailblazing civil rights icon who has worked with the NAACP, authored the California Schools Hate Crimes Prevention Act, and been at the forefront of defending **_abortion rights across the country._**

We’re doing everything in our power to fight for Barbara Lee and send her to the Senate to **_fight back against Mitch McConnell and radical MAGA Republicans_** — but we can’t do it alone.

[That’s why we’re calling on you to join the fight with us by making a donation to the Collective PAC so we can fight for Progressive Black Champions like Barbara Lee >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-hSuQcT1AVjZkfa8zH5j2d0Xbq7chGujNG3zDGNUsMkAREJLCwTcfVawBDVfGPRzF52INfPjcGBfjhFkC3DI97TP4jTAb-U70_QAfXAB3kKgQqndMdwxzYnEySAwYGOHSCKS3_z1kVuZmejG5I3VD4XppKHWMgPh6wx8M1tBKoimu_uCZSmG-2fYwy7r3uGAnWcH8zeY3LZVxNkPp2HKgSvysKp9JgC1uiEs6ibOLXtn-Gy2ZlYRH-Dys0oIbUzu6s9wEkukX_j4HLBSt00uDLfA2CLTIkShMbry7bdRLwmXMZNKM5jRtaF-Por6sMXht/426/109Xk6DjQFGYFUSdWMgXEA/h3/iGKQUwOp6N3IUOqV-_iG_9cMHX2RsUTvJNj7OTch2mU) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLg2u6bMo3P2vvJX6w7A-21zyXBjnxldhuINayihCUf9SymO2Y6kqqGwxWTZ4p5hZYqfLKYtAkCig9D9xWwTmVJurCDTFFCi-lNHiOJsEdURjRcwjwFEmU_GsuU7M0V2cltyNa-5k0sTclWu5yaCQYadcgeQfljFIaAR_9ImMws_OLpEPrQedQ04G7_cMZrKbkuDUl9CQZqns9NPCU9JHzqH7DJyy_8xLhrGPTKRk2joqfnaV8kTo57E1C_iVKe_UsSRFeUv5DC-MBByFqG_djnBwxZGNsb4dlfHaEWJb1wjRL2JgPjOizGJKRsIBGH29uY/426/109Xk6DjQFGYFUSdWMgXEA/h10/ls-Bv2eteoa02Ly2T7mD8G5RaAGcePW3fuoa2UOpUl4) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Barbara Lee has fought for what’s right her entire life — and it’s earned her some of the most coveted endorsements in the country. Barbara is a trailblazing civil rights icon who has worked with the NAACP, authored the California Schools Hate Crimes Prevention Act, and been at the forefront of defending abortion rights across the country. We’re doing everything in our power to fight for Barbara Lee and send her to the Senate to fight back against Mitch McConnell and radical MAGA Republicans — but we can’t do it alone. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Together, — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. subject: Safer than viagra
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75299227/444237927/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231216_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk3YTU5OGYtNDA5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=abfPnFgq0D4bAuFfikRtiB5M3m9f50KuyHcaiL1aEbE=)

name: Diane Sare
subject: Today is the 250th Anniversary of the Boston Tea Party -- Celebrate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=1)
---
Friend Here is the statement I released for distribution in Boston (and everywhere else) on this special day of a significant defeat of British colonial rule. [The PDF is available here.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/anniversary_boston_tea_party_pdf?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=2) Below, the second Symposium on the unknown history of the American Revolution was held in Manhattan last night, with my husband Christopher Sare, and good friend Fred Haight. Everyone needs to see this! Finally, December 16 is also the birthday of the world's greatest musical genius ever, Ludwig van Beethoven. Please be sure to listen to some of his music. It will strengthen you for the battles ahead. [Here is one of my favorites.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYohbch930DXnUiXE1nA3v6&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=3)
## For the 250th anniversary of the Boston Tea Party Celebrate the American Revolution by Completing It!
December 15, 2023—On December 16, 1773, thousands of American colonists executed a bold plan to stop the British Empire and its East India Company from imposing its tea and tea tax on the people of the American colony. The ships delivering the tea had tried unsuccessfully to land at Philadelphia and New York, only to be repelled by local militias who refused to allow them to disembark. At Massachusetts it was determined to end the policy once and for all. The issue was much more significant than the silly “taxation without representation” phrase which gets tossed around today, as if that’s why our Republic was founded. Would it have been acceptable to allow the British to flood North America with finished goods, thus preventing our development and keeping us impoverished even if we did have representatives in the British Parliament? Of course not! The issue was, that nowhere on the planet had human beings been able to establish a government built on the principles to be later expressed in our own Declaration of Independence—namely that each of us is born equal before God, and therefore the most appropriate form of government is one which derives its authority from the “consent of the governed” in such a way as to best “effect their Safety and Happiness.” These conceptions were developed most explicitly in the writings of Nicholas of Cusa in the 1400’s. This was the mission of the earliest settlers, which can be clearly seen from the Mayflower Compact, and in the Essays to do Good, written by Cotton Mather in 1710. As is painfully clear to the world, the United States has abandoned our founding mission and has become a brutal enforcer of British Imperial policy. This is most horrific in two of the ongoing wars of the Biden Administration which has urged Ukraine to keep fighting a losing war against Russia, sending billions of dollars to American weapons manufacturers so that Ukrainian soldiers can die in the hundreds of thousands for no purpose, and now in Gaza, where Netanyahu’s Israeli Defense Forces are committing a textbook case of genocide against Palestinian civilians, supposedly in response to the bloody Hamas attack of October 7. Had the United States continued on the path to ending the colonial system, as President Franklin Roosevelt had intended to do at the end of World Ware II when he told a red-faced Winston Churchill that “eighteenth century methods” (ie. colonialism) had to be brought to an end, Americans would be rejoicing at the expansion of the BRICS (Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa), and the more than 20,000 projects being constructed in 165 nations of China’s Belt and Road initiative. We would recognize a process reminiscent of our own liberation from the British Empire—except that we are no longer liberated, or liberators, but we are oppressors and, as a result of going against the natural condition of man, we, too, are oppressed. I have decided to run an independent campaign for United States Senate in the State of New York (the seat formerly occupied by Hillary Clinton) in order to lead a movement of patriotic Americans to take back our republic from the British scourge which has lately infested all of our intelligence agencies, news media outlets, and our congress. We must return to the principles of Alexander Hamilton and John Quincy Adams, as understood and developed by my late mentor Lyndon LaRouche, who served five years in federal prison under the George H.W. Bush Administration because of his commitment to this mission. In 2026, if we haven’t destroyed the planet in a nuclear war, we should celebrate (as opposed to regret or merely commemorate) the 250th anniversary of our Declaration of Independence from the British Empire, having recaptured that revolutionary identity. Join my nationwide campaign to make sure that every American knows what that means!
### [NY Symposium, Friday, December 15, 8:00 pm: The Massachusetts Bay Colony: What the British Don't Want You to Know About America's Founders](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzTi8UriTopV6aXqz_1a46BnMXpYW8JOoFDiueyQR1tEHPixFOznL3QxqkhGyTgf9A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=4)
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzTi8UriTopV6aXqz_1a46BnMXpYW8JOoFDiueyQR1tEHPixFOznL3QxqkhGyTgf9A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=5) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=6 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231216_boston_tea_party&n=6)

\--Diane

Hi Fellow American, it’s Speaker Mike Johnson and I had to email you with these two urgent updates...

1. Democrats are BEATING US at fundraising... they’ve brought in more than $44 million this cycle, and that number is climbing every single day.

2. Our razor-thin majority is SHRINKING, making it easier for Nancy Pelosi to retake the House and granting Democrats FULL control in Washington.

I know times are tough right now, but I’m incredibly concerned about the state of our country... and if we don’t see a surge in donations before the year is up, we’ll be giving Democrats the momentum they need to beat us BIG in 2024. [**So, I’m humbly asking for your gift of any amount you can spare in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fd2332c97f2e4b308205e231bab5b669&_e=C5xY9fYFXw7aHRd-eGZvN2NCMlTMRUVgGscWFi_8ZQVmP3peCve3fTxURlX9DpMhXZcVcDIZDBdklxHGEttxI_CnLDfmcccVYlZSCEi9WdfoTUPf3X-Xh1CG58r0S0LyeLC4yHQMNFynq62VM0lECXB34xTmWgy_UKFEna8dd0R5uijOaXxeFdnDtFfAzBaZxkh2aACOrQ6W9xpXcKcOtHKm-dx5jXzo__RBcTxsmCc0cZZmocRPO6ZMg-QaMWY2IbE9DA6qqzX2NS1UeZ5fIs0IQP7-8M_qDT-alJZpB5hsmLdLYrdPyGwLA4bTuimoQHyp19kvAuX2Vx9OW5rhq8vQprQRgsHEKLCMD4rUW5-11iWtiruesD5_dzmm9BffNgFKwPalpr8hQ-x1MHc1GlY1Pk1mP7sRlps3m5PQ9Dc%3D)

[** STEP UP IMMEDIATELY **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fd2332c97f2e4b308205e231bab5b669&_e=C5xY9fYFXw7aHRd-eGZvN2NCMlTMRUVgGscWFi_8ZQVmP3peCve3fTxURlX9DpMhXZcVcDIZDBdklxHGEttxI_CnLDfmcccVYlZSCEi9WdfoTUPf3X-Xh1CG58r0S0LyeLC4yHQMNFynq62VM0lECXB34xTmWgy_UKFEna8dd0R5uijOaXxeFdnDtFfAzBaZxkh2aACOrQ6W9xpXcKcOtHKm-dx5jXzo__RBcTxsmCc0cZZmocRPO6ZMg-QaMWY2kq6pSK655v5PStKPpprKcvxakVip9JXiLh4LTPPYB7kXIOQ-SA0gxngMgkLevj6mzBB7djivPiuTnIz-jA8IoCV1An-EJTws86D3OOOTDgqu4dNZQ90Uz2CdsyN7AfBCBJOvLyYCTwiT7xv0vvbTincwWz-9F2QSQMKoOVjpOuw%3D)
You already know how bad things are, Fellow American. But imagine the state of our country next year if Democrats control all three branches of government. _**They’ll have unlimited power to ram through their radical, woke agenda.**_

**Just think... OPEN borders, UNSECURED elections, Government hand-outs for ALL (including non-Americans), corruption run AMUCK, violent CRIME in our streets, woke politics in our schools... _the list goes on and ON._**

[**Which is why I’m looking for every conservative across the country to step up and FIGHT back against the Democratic fundraising surge and ensure we have the resources to GROW the majority.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fd2332c97f2e4b308205e231bab5b669&_e=C5xY9fYFXw7aHRd-eGZvN2NCMlTMRUVgGscWFi_8ZQVmP3peCve3fTxURlX9DpMhXZcVcDIZDBdklxHGEttxI_CnLDfmcccVYlZSCEi9WdfoTUPf3X-Xh1CG58r0S0LyeLC4yHQMNFynq62VM0lECXB34xTmWgy_UKFEna8dd0R5uijOaXxeFdnDtFfAzBaZxkh2aACOrQ6W9xpXcKcOtHKm-dx5jXzo__RBcTxsmCc0cZZmocRPO6ZMg-QaMWY2okbXonlOFUob3v2esV4XOWam8cU0QTaiTn3Zk9-r4YRP3iIDD9RSmUiMD00DM-onD-4CLV5Ro9HABHIhE18tQhmOFq_Ok8ts6aIoBT5D2Adeve9HBlc6Ge8oBk1azgXArf2ACnZp16wlNsLT3R52VKRYt_tXvIkNe-1FlWTZAV4%3D)

I hope I can rely on you.

In service,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Is there anything I can say to convince you to contribute to my reelection campaign today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75299418/444238972/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODUwMjAzNS00MTljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9a793VoE01hyLGrsfGM2SsbusiBxUASRDD89_9eD1g=)
Friend,
It’s Robert. Is there anything I can say to convince you to contribute to my reelection campaign today?
Give me a chance to try.
The holiday season is a difficult time for political fundraising and this has proved to be true for our fundraising program. But with a critical FEC deadline at the end of this month — our final one before our primary election — the far-right will be watching to see if our support slows so they can find someone to challenge this seat.
**Why? Because I have a large target on my back from the far-right.**
When I was the first to force a House vote to expel George Santos from Congress earlier this year, the far-right learned that I wouldn't sit back and watch them lie and defraud their constituents.
When I called Marjorie Taylor Greene out for disrespecting mothers by marriage and adoption in a House hearing, the far-right learned that I won’t let them say whatever they want and get away with it.
And now, as I continue to call out and expose Republicans for their unjustified and politically motivated impeachment inquiry against President Biden, they’ve learned once again that I will continue to hold them publicly accountable.
I’ve made myself clear. I will take on every single bully, every single liar, every single fraud, and call them out — all the time.
So the far right would love to see me pay a price at the ballot box, and the only way I can fight back is with a grassroots team behind me.
**[So I am asking: Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to my reelection campaign today so we can continue to fight against GOP lies? We are halfway through the month today and need your unwavering support to finish this quarter off strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75299419/444238973/-801280688?refcode2=d8502035-419c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&refcode=em231216-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODUwMjAzNS00MTljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9a793VoE01hyLGrsfGM2SsbusiBxUASRDD89_9eD1g=)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75299420/444238974/-801280688?refcode2=d8502035-419c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&refcode=em231216-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODUwMjAzNS00MTljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9a793VoE01hyLGrsfGM2SsbusiBxUASRDD89_9eD1g=)
Thank you in advance for your contribution and continued support.
Robert

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

Long Beach, CA 90802

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Can I count on you to use this link to split a $3 contribution directly between Senators Baldwin, Casey and Klobuchar's re-election campaigns today? I would not ask if it were not so critically important. - Gavin Newsom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Here's the truth:

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a donation directly between Senators Baldwin, Casey, and Klobuchar's re-election campaigns.
But if you already know how important these swing races are in ensuring Democrats keep control of the Senate please use this link to make that contribution today:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Dem-Senate**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-sen-24?refcode=em231217&refcode2=1722_4767699_qJcati&akid=1722%2E4767699%2EqJcati)
Otherwise, please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here's the truth:
Democrats’ control of the Senate is razor thin, and Joe Manchin's retirement gives Republicans a likely pick-up in West Virginia.
That means we simply cannot afford to lose another seat currently held by a Democrat.
Senators Baldwin, Casey, and Klobuchar are running in what should be close races against well-funded Republicans and they are all happening in swing states needed for the presidential campaign, as well.
They all have an FEC fundraising deadline that ends this month, and when it does they are legally required to report what they've raised, and how many donations they've received will be public as well.
All these campaigns have goals to hit — and they are not arbitrary, they are what they need to win. But they can't do it alone, and they are asking for our help. So please:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to split a $3 contribution directly between Senators Baldwin, Casey and Klobuchar's re-election campaigns today? I would not ask if it were not so critically important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-sen-24?refcode=em231217&refcode2=1722_4767699_qJcati&akid=1722%2E4767699%2EqJcati)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your contribution between each of the campaigns:_

subject: the GOP’s new top target to seize the Senate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’re freaking out
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58199?t=6&akid=12110%2E878179%2ElVDO7l) | [**WE ARE SOUNDING THE ALARM: CHIP IN $7 TO OUR SAVE ARIZONA FUND BY MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58200?t=7&akid=12110%2E878179%2ElVDO7l)
---
We were already TERRIFIED enough when we saw that MAGA Kari Lake was polling ahead of Democrat Ruben Gallego in battleground Arizona.

But now, Mitch McConnell’s crooked allies are DUMPING dark money into the race — _it’s now their #1 target to flip the Senate red in 2024!_

**Election experts say their plot will WORK if Democrats don’t take immediate action to stop them.** [**Please, Democrats like Gallego NEED you: Rush $7 NOW to stop a MAGA takeover in toss-up states like Arizona »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58199?t=8&akid=12110%2E878179%2ElVDO7l)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12110%2E878179%2ElVDO7l). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12110%2E878179%2ElVDO7l).**

| [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=657e3c0cab04e86a9582241d&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F12%2F07%2Felection-commission-rejects-ranked-choice-groups-attempt-to-halt-signature-gathering-campaign-to-repeal-rcv%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_657e3a95e6926a5a8a3e2b50&l=en-US&s=wmLNkMFrzTbgjoT776KTbr8KKF8%3D)
---
**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=657e3c0cab04e86a9582241d&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_657e3a95e6926a5a8a3e2b50&l=en-US&s=6dlty7pI7151xn_LbakRMPFtAqE%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75301224/444245700/1436736915?refcode=em-12.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVjZmJmNTctNDc5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_ehTN1r_m9Zgo1koALuMYIMjc0Yaz7IZaMXr_jE4NWg=)

Peter, this is important:

**Abortion is on the ballot in 2024.**

The Supreme Court just announced they will be hearing a case that will determine whether to limit access to mifepristone – a safe and effective medication used in over half of abortions nationwide.

This news comes at the heels of the harrowing story out of Texas of a woman who was denied an abortion despite her fetus being diagnosed with a fatal condition. A lower court granted her an abortion, but the Texas Supreme Court overruled and denied her request – forcing her to travel out of state for the sake of her health and future fertility.

It has never been more urgent to keep CA-47 blue so we can protect our reproductive rights. As a reminder, our likely GOP opponent Scott Baugh is in favor of a nationwide abortion ban with zero exceptions for rape or incest.

Our team is hard at work preparing to launch our first TV ads and build our on-the-ground voter turn out program to win this seat and protect our fundamental rights. **[Will you chip in $3 before midnight to power our work forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75301225/444245701/1436736915?refcode=em-12.16.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVjZmJmNTctNDc5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_ehTN1r_m9Zgo1koALuMYIMjc0Yaz7IZaMXr_jE4NWg=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, this is important: Abortion is on the ballot in 2024. The Supreme Court just announced they will be hearing a case that will determine whether to limit access to mifepristone – a safe and effective medication used in over half of abortions nationwide. This news comes at the heels of the harrowing story out of Texas of a woman who was denied an abortion despite her fetus being diagnosed with a fatal condition. A lower court granted her an abortion, but the Texas Supreme Court overruled and denied her request – forcing her to travel out of state for the sake of her health and future fertility. It has never been more urgent to keep CA-47 blue so we can protect our reproductive rights. As a reminder, our likely GOP opponent Scott Baugh is in favor of a nationwide abortion ban with zero exceptions for rape or incest. Our team is hard at work preparing to launch our first TV ads and build our on-the-ground voter turn out program to win this seat and protect our fundamental rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Can you please pitch in a split donation of $15 between Seth Moulton and my campaign today? You can use this link to chip in: secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-adam [] Thank you so much. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: the *two* most vulnerable senators in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
Jon Tester and I are counting on your support.

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302126/444249090/-1346134463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=)** Peter, I won't beat around the bush. I'm about to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and my friend Jon Tester's (D-MT) – but first, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this is so important. _[**Or, if you're already convinced, you can click here to rush your support!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302127/444249091/-1234928215?&refcode=E5608-20231216-ThreeWaySplit2-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=)_ Jon and I are running in the two most competitive and important Senate races in the entire country. _CNN_ says we're two of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and Mitch McConnell has _personally_ named us top targets for defeat. And with Joe Manchin retiring, Republicans are virtually guaranteed to pick up a seat, which means losing either Ohio OR Montana could cost Democrats our Senate majority. **Dark money is already flooding into our states to flip the Senate red. So to make sure we have the resources to fight back and win, Jon and I have launched the "Big Sky Buckeye Fund." If you're as committed as we are to protecting the Senate and fighting for progress, we need you to help us raise $75,000 by midnight tonight.** [**So please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – split between my campaign and Jon's – so we can win our battleground races in Ohio and Montana and keep fighting for working families across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302128/444249092/-1234928215?&refcode=E5608-20231216-ThreeWaySplit2-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=) [CONTRIBUTE $5 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302129/444249093/-1234928215?&refcode=E5608-20231216-ThreeWaySplit2-SB-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=) [CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302130/444249094/-1234928215?&refcode=E5608-20231216-ThreeWaySplit2-SB-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=) [CONTRIBUTE $45 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302131/444249095/-1234928215?&refcode=E5608-20231216-ThreeWaySplit2-SB-Surrogate&amount=45&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=) [OTHER AMOUNT NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75302132/444249096/-1234928215?&refcode=E5608-20231216-ThreeWaySplit2-SB-Surrogate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGM3NzgzLTRjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZqdDMlBnbRhzUKiR0HvWkaBlqE5LQLzpcolJydMMnfQ=) Look, this isn't just about defending the Senate – it's about continuing to deliver for working families. I've worked alongside Jon for years, and he's as committed as I am to protecting workers' rights, protecting Social Security, expanding affordable health care, and making sure our economy works for every American – not just wealthy corporations. **But there is so much more work to do, and Jon and I simply can't keep fighting in the Senate without your help.** [**Jon and I urgently need your support before tonight's midnight deadline, so please, Peter, will you chip in $5, $25, whatever you can spare, to power us both to victory? clean_body: Jon Tester and I are counting on your support. = Peter, I won't beat around the bush. I'm about to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and my friend Jon Tester's (D-MT) – but first, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this is so important. = Jon and I are running in the two most competitive and important Senate races in the entire country. CNN says we're two of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and Mitch McConnell has personally named us top targets for defeat. And with Joe Manchin retiring, Republicans are virtually guaranteed to pick up a seat, which means losing either Ohio OR Montana could cost Democrats our Senate majority. Dark money is already flooding into our states to flip the Senate red. So to make sure we have the resources to fight back and win, Jon and I have launched the "Big Sky Buckeye Fund." If you're as committed as we are to protecting the Senate and fighting for progress, we need you to help us raise $75,000 by midnight tonight. = = = = = Look, this isn't just about defending the Senate – it's about continuing to deliver for working families. I've worked alongside Jon for years, and he's as committed as I am to protecting workers' rights, protecting Social Security, expanding affordable health care, and making sure our economy works for every American – not just wealthy corporations. But there is so much more work to do, and Jon and I simply can't keep fighting in the Senate without your help. = = Thank you so much! = | Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =
