clean_body: | | | Filing has closed, and Derek Marshall is the only Democratic candidate against MAGA Republican Rep. Jay Obernolte. Now that Derek Marshall is officially on the ballot for Congress in California’s 23rd District, the hard work really begins. Our democracy is under threat. The Republican Party is marching us toward fascism. Their disregard for democracy, climate change, marginalized communities, and our reproductive freedoms are a threat to America as we know it. Derek is a proven champion for reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, labor rights, climate justice, and democracy. We need him in Congress. It has never been more important to elect Derek and FLIP THE HOUSE so Derek and the Democrats can restore our reproductive rights and fight for a livable planet and a fair and just future! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Imagine two futures: The Democratic future restores the right to choose when and where to start a family, protects clean air and water and creates lots of good paying green jobs. Or...a Republican dystopia where our planet becomes unlivable, wages stagnate and unions are busted, our freedoms are are stripped away, and our democracy dies. Derek’s opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte voted to overturn the 2020 election results, voted against LGBTQ+ equality and a person’s right to choose.** He has disregarded democratic norms to protect the interests of his corporate funders and 4 times indicted Donald Trump! moves us forward, R takes us back. \- Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ec46f406e7ec44afa141f8f107e3f117&_e=wTbB3ioe6kT_g2vWZuSkoE11UUDX2qV9bo2eLv0sveqMa-4XQfhf_eXDxCxZNtAiUcDHuAmbtDZpvS25kAQOydqs0R6pz7kSxXxr_-m5vl9xUEWCI1X9TZ2iBMv7-gClx7Xcev_u6rkgjZnlTb_caSjn6bdavfkvARN9SeqwNoO-0B1AHg_fp4i4718kPa061713Has9KrD4NS6_aE8zkH40gJEEhnn10hLNqpNkLA7mVkFDkyUwm7KABoGnkSWRQY1swIjd8WFts_LyD2JPLpvvT5Sb6qMbTWVHeXXoZapeR0XGrDHBKp3On3tQ6b6r0pKg3IAlPxwsclQUb9zhsS57c0Xbnoy0obzD5zvLArcdri5ABkNIG8Dp6kW2L9FqU0LbrV5unjA_aVwSGhq44Q%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Tim Sheehy-former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate in Montana.

If you have a few minutes to spare right now, **[I cannot tell you how valuable your input](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a995c49bf4994e9b9f5dc0dd7dbb6bdd&_e=dbVZSkq-mqeFo1P7ANqzOToBDVXcGhVEHrj4rj3kwGSQvzuQVu7W23ZHykBiy3usGQxc4KmdvAfivXK1h5T7WM92micYu-U8HZZj04hXC6UIipMIyk0UC97pVQVmHiRFnITLy2_EkTa7Kt0RLWYjmIhTR7EkNApPoP5RTkbGjjqOaE0OoKe_uAaQFpa2tu0TlYC5nfjmqgzKZtqQ__XGU8IY-SsHtN1B463BXyUCJ0oVUBclms75IpoFhj6olcI4DM9K51c1Ai_14dYmw1eYBP9_QewOL2GGuR2zCRdqwhh4Q9F2QgOgB-cyVXq6u0yedMoEAnlm964w1t7Eztz2TC0T_sMy52mzjIQtODk-8kdK0-DCC9I66upGDII9qKKr4rYjoBO1dI0bsc3I69WLOXYzoNLSSzfcRV8FwR9FHoc%3D)** would be to me and my team as we work to finalize our January playbook and hit the ground running in 2024. But first, please let me tell you why it’s critically important to my campaign that you participate.

_**Why Montana Matters:**_ With Joe Manchin out of the race in West Virginia, Montana is the #1 pickup seat in the country for Republicans to take control of the Senate.

_**What Manchin’s exit means:**_ All of the money Chuck Schumer had set aside to defend Manchin in West Virginia will now go to my Democrat opponent here in Montana.

_**Why your participation today matters:**_ This will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, per vote. You may not hear about my race in the news much now, but give it a few months, and my name and my opponent's name will be hard to miss.

If you’re interested in helping me flip the Senate - **[I’m asking you to spare another 60 seconds to answer five questions for me right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a995c49bf4994e9b9f5dc0dd7dbb6bdd&_e=dbVZSkq-mqeFo1P7ANqzOToBDVXcGhVEHrj4rj3kwGSQvzuQVu7W23ZHykBiy3usGQxc4KmdvAfivXK1h5T7WM92micYu-U8HZZj04hXC6UIipMIyk0UC97pVQVmHiRFnITLy2_EkTa7Kt0RLWYjmIhTR7EkNApPoP5RTkbGjjqOaE0OoKe_uAaQFpa2tu0TlYC5nfjmqgzKZtqQ__XGU8IY-SsHtN1B463BXyUCJ0oVUBclms75IpoFhj6olcI4CZ83lQqo-OEVNXy5DD36pPN_hMBNiDdr44p0mFYyn9vZdEfyReRwg0wODKc3J2fhlAgCTuRbUBkAYB2_owpFmO7Lzo776x12Cekd_z0VKlS-_ZDTuD-n8WaY9ArC3sWEp5w6fHIM3Ji7V2jIBQlxRYiM3CKg27g206vJRWOCDqM%3D)**. For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Are you on Team Chrissy in 2024?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75302494/444250434/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U3NmNjMy00ZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=By2HipzYQQG5DJrknIox9NTmi2S9vD7r1-63d3GtuKE=&emci=717ee7e5-b79a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=d7e76cc3-4d9c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, I’m a lot of things. I’m a third-generation military veteran. I’m an engineer. I’m an entrepreneur, a former high school chemistry teacher, and a nonprofit leader.

**But, more than any other thing, I’m****your representative to Congress – and it’s a duty I take very seriously. **
I’ve worked tirelessly with my colleagues to deliver real change for you and your family – like investments in STEM education for underrepresented students, empowering our small businesses, good health care for our region’s veterans, and standing up for the rights of our LGBTQ neighbors. Every day, we help constituents solve frustrating issues with the IRS, passports, lost mail, and getting home after being stuck overseas.

I’m running for reelection, and my name will be on the ballot next November. This means **Republicans will stop at nothing to derail my campaign, since they're looking for any chance they can find to dial back all of the progress we’ve made.**
To continue my fight for progress, it’s critical that I start the new year strong. That’s why I need to know if you’re standing with me. **Will you take a moment and endorse me as your representative for 2024? I need 10,000 responses by midnight to hit my goal.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75302495/444250435/130481535?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk925-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U3NmNjMy00ZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=By2HipzYQQG5DJrknIox9NTmi2S9vD7r1-63d3GtuKE=&emci=717ee7e5-b79a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=d7e76cc3-4d9c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=21278485)
With your help, I know that we can continue to build a progressive future for all of PA-06.

There’s work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75302496/444250436/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U3NmNjMy00ZDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=By2HipzYQQG5DJrknIox9NTmi2S9vD7r1-63d3GtuKE=&emci=717ee7e5-b79a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=d7e76cc3-4d9c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=21278485). # Join us on Monday for an Iowa Zoom Update with Ryan Binkley.
On January 15, the Iowa Caucus will be the first presidential primary of 2024. Iowa plays a pivotal role in election year politics, and can change the course of the primary race, literally overnight!

Ryan and the Binkley 2024 team will be on Zoom this Monday, December 18, to discuss the Caucus and how you can be involved. The meeting starts at 7pm CT / 8pm ET.

Be sure to register at the link below. See you soon!
---
| **Date: Monday, December 18
Time: 7:00 pm CT / 8:00 pm ET**

---
| [Register for Zoom Meeting](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=4a37fad6dd&e=c1403f41d3 "Register for Zoom Meeting")

| Thank you again for your prayers and support. We are so excited to see you on Zoom.

God Bless,

Team Binkley 2024

The Democrat judge in my sham _“corporate death penalty”_ trial in New York has made crystal clear that he could care less about evidence _– especially evidence that PROVES my innocence! _
---
In fact, before my attorneys even had the opportunity to present the mountain of evidence and testimony, this judge had _already_ presumed me guilty of “fraud.”
---
But now, after demonstrating my INNOCENCE in court – and that this is nothing more than another one of the Left’s vicious witch hunts – **my attorneys have requested a directed verdict to wrap up this trial IMMEDIATELY and CLEAR me of these phony charges**.
---
But what did this judge _(who’s donated to Democrats, I might add!)_ have to say **__before__** even reading the motion?...
---
_**“There's _no_ _way_ I’m going to grant that.”**_
---
This is a slap in the face of _true_ justice!

**When you enter the courtroom PRESUMED GUILTY – __and are still presumed guilty after PROVING YOUR INNOCENCE__ – then we’re no longer living in America, Patriot.**
---
We might as well be living in Maoist China or Stalinist Russia, for that matter! And under Crooked Joe’s _regime_ , that’s _exactly_ what we’ve got.
---

---
But, as I’ve said time and again, they can attack me all they want, strip me of my constitutional rights, threaten me with life in prison, force me to take a mugshot, and seek the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, but there’s ONE THING they will _NEVER_ get away with...
---
_...Robbing _YOU_ of your country!_
---
Because __WE__ will **NEVER** ,**_EVER_ SURRENDER** to their tyranny!
---
With YOU at my side, we will counter their lies, attacks, and vicious witch hunts at every turn. We will prevail just as we always have.
---
And come November 5, 2024, we will receive the ultimate vindication – and the ultimate prize: **_an America made GREAT AGAIN!_**
---
_If you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t donate at this time. I only wanted to update you on this grave injustice of a “trial.”_
---

name: Build. The. Wall
subject: Trump was right. Biden was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vern Buchanan For Congress
body:
Biden’s border is a DISASTER for our country | | | Friend, President Trump knows that high fences make good neighbors. But when Joe Biden got elected, he promised that he wouldn't build **ONE MORE INCH** of border wall. Now, with millions of people, including drug dealers, potential terrorists, and even possible spies, illegally crossing into our country **every single year,** it couldn't be more clear. **[President Trump was RIGHT and Joe Biden is DANGEROUSLY WRONG.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=129cfd12dc374a73871f63dfb9a9e4cd&_e=7r0n3lWCAbcSaMZdpJVNzt-24l0Ym4zxe15LvpDDSU7yJA7fARDDSvveN0POw8iMMR4X-wHfaG1S8ZdTTzGy5ptsIHHeW-5jvUJZGLWhdL7TZRUcqBJ6zb4MTWZonGcAOkKSdlMaQA0jLk-L-P0J-BzVOqDSTvSi7HYS7n4McAGNtKeKfMLgjD8DscXagTqI3j9-Clsq5yCyvt8avpWzZXGwO8dsoLUQg06LTM2ZjA3xtmbP83ayFwFpXddSJUC9xTzpEeynBY-VPWFGmXH74AA1_4EO1w553KdpyJUa3xdC1t3vPrKzpY2nHt34Egn6smF_fPhnPHfkaKx5Hc4ZZwjCByos4w9XSa5j2G44iDDiSSjpKTKouOm-tTBwFamAAYEQDpm2O2ijGqBluHcA7qodlwapE0sZofvEAzCCM0AYUP3kXoJTtY0R4fTD4Ys_)** When Donald Trump was President, he took drastic action to secure the border and build the wall. Can you **[contribute today](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=129cfd12dc374a73871f63dfb9a9e4cd&_e=7r0n3lWCAbcSaMZdpJVNzt-24l0Ym4zxe15LvpDDSU7yJA7fARDDSvveN0POw8iMMR4X-wHfaG1S8ZdTTzGy5ptsIHHeW-5jvUJZGLWhdL7TZRUcqBJ6zb4MTWZonGcAOkKSdlMaQA0jLk-L-P0J-BzVOqDSTvSi7HYS7n4McAGNtKeKfMLgjD8DscXagTqI3j9-Clsq5yCyvt8avpWzZXGwO8dsoLUQg06LTM2ZjA3xtmbP83ayFwFpXddSJUC9xTzpEeynBY-VPWFGmXH74AA1_4EO1w553KdpyJUa3xd6gultGzKy0h3fR7DYRD6sMnv8N__a03KlxN0mqJNb-hZkrSb4IODj6fJLfv_4qC0ZtwtHxYqcXVEpfO62ZZOrxJJPUKGkRTJTpG9wyd_D38dF7-zs6ObAFpRXqnfA5Q8K9GkcUBVGgIOuXey8Izj_)** so that I can keep fighting for Trump's agenda? I’ll make this quick. I wanted to reach out because a couple of things have been on my mind as we head into 2024. So I wanted to ask you:

→ Are you tired of MAGA Republicans choosing chaos instead of the American people?

→ Are you worried that MAGA Republicans will continue to try and take away the rights of you or someone you know?

subject: All eyes on Tammy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek — Just
recently, Senator Joe Manchin announced he’s NOT seeking reelection in
West Virginia. Let me tell you what that means for Tammy Baldwin and
Wisconsin.

Now look here: Tammy was already one of Mitch McConnell’s TOP targets to
defeat.

But now, national Republicans can flood Wisconsin with millions more than

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: “The Supreme Court will hear a case that could effectively legalize automatic weapons”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
“The Supreme Court will hear a case that could effectively legalize automatic weapons”
– Vox, Nov. 2023
Team, the Supreme Court announced that it will hear a challenge to the existing federal ban on bump stocks.
Add your name to call on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-12-bumpstocks]
ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-12-bumpstocks]

Team -

The Supreme Court just agreed to review the federal ban on bump stocks. Let us explain why this is a big deal.

Bump stocks are a device that turns a semi-automatic weapon into a machine gun - something that’s been banned since 1934.

A semi-automatic weapon fires one shot for every trigger pulled.

An automatic weapon fires continually until the trigger is released.

Attaching a bump stock effectively allows people to bypass the ban on automatic weapons and fire more shots with just one trigger.

Bump stocks were used during the 2017 Las Vegas shooting, which killed 58 people and wounded hundreds more. In response, bump stocks were rightfully reclassified and outlawed as a machine gun.

Keeping this ban in place will keep our communities safe while still honoring the Constitution.

Sign onto our petition today to call on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks in place. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-12-bumpstocks]

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-12-bumpstocks]

Jason will keep fighting to protect Coloradans and end the gun violence epidemic.

Thank you for standing with him.

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2023]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] “The Supreme Court will hear a case that could effectively legalize automatic weapons” – Vox, Nov. 2023 Team, the Supreme Court announced that it will hear a challenge to the existing federal ban on bump stocks. Add your name to call on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks. [] ADD MY NAME [] Team - The Supreme Court just agreed to review the federal ban on bump stocks. Let us explain why this is a big deal. Bump stocks are a device that turns a semi-automatic weapon into a machine gun - something that’s been banned since 1934. A semi-automatic weapon fires one shot for every trigger pulled. An automatic weapon fires continually until the trigger is released. Attaching a bump stock effectively allows people to bypass the ban on automatic weapons and fire more shots with just one trigger. Bump stocks were used during the 2017 Las Vegas shooting, which killed 58 people and wounded hundreds more. In response, bump stocks were rightfully reclassified and outlawed as a machine gun. Keeping this ban in place will keep our communities safe while still honoring the Constitution. Sign onto our petition today to call on the Supreme Court to keep the federal ban on bump stocks in place. [] ADD MY NAME [] Jason will keep fighting to protect Coloradans and end the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with him. — Team Crow Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Your action today could save innocent gray wolves from violent trophy hunters
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202175?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Soft, fresh, powdery snow blankets the quiet landscape. Icicles dangle elegantly from delicate branches. The tree tops look like they’re covered in frosting. _**But wait! -- what’s this?!**_ _**A BLOODY CARCASS?! GUTS SCATTERED ON THE FOREST FLOOR?! HELPLESS CRIES OF YOUNG WOLF PUPS?!**_ _Not exactly the**winter wonderland** you had pictured, is it, Friend?_ The holiday season is a cheerful time for many, but for gray wolves, it is one of the most vulnerable times. In the heart of winter, it’s critical that _wolf packs stick together_ to increase their chances of finding scarce food, staying warm, and surviving the cold, harsh season. Nursing mama wolves must fiercely _protect and provide for their precious pups_ who are too young and weak to leave the den. But one _**FATAL THREAT**_ that even a wolf’s instinct can’t win against is **brutal trophy hunters.** These vicious killers will murder innocent gray wolves for sport, using some of the most **_disgustingly inhumane methods_** that you can imagine, Friend. Trophy hunters are **violently massacring innocent gray wolves in droves** , and we must do more if we’re going to _**SAVE THEM FROM EXTINCTION.**_ _**Please, Friend, it’s getting cold out there for helpless wolves struggling to survive the winter:**_ **[Will you extend your warmth today and sign our petition now to help keep these beloved canines safe? Demand stronger federal protections for gray wolves now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202176?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202177?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Although the holiday season might feel a lot different for us than for gray wolves, there is one common thread we share during these winter months: _**it’s a time for family.**_
Wolves are already social creatures, and scientists have confirmed they develop deep emotional bonds. Their pack is their family, and their chances of survival significantly increase as a pack. _Wolf packs are even known to raise pups together!_
**But these tight-knit families can also be ripped apart violently in an INSTANT, Friend.** Ruthless trophy hunters are preparing for winter by loading up on ammo, firearms, and other deadly weapons. They’re devising cruel ways to _**bait, lure, choke, injure, trap, shoot, pulverize, and slaughter**_ innocent gray wolves. _That includes running these weak and tired animals over with snowmobiles -- and blowing up defenseless wolf pups with dynamite while they sleep in their dens._
If the gray wolf population is wiped out by brutal trophy hunters, it will not only be devastating to our planet’s ecosystem, but it will be simply heartbreaking to lose one of North America's most treasured native mammals. _That’s why we’re calling on the Biden administration to urgently strengthen Endangered Species Act (ESA) protections for these special animals._
**[But in order to have an impact, we still need 3,429 more activists like you to step up by signing our petition before the _DEADLINE TONIGHT at 11:59pm._ Can we count on you to speak up right now in defense of voiceless gray wolves before it’s too late?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202178?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2202177?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thanks for using your voice to protect our precious gray wolves,
Friends of the Earth
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D279529&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)
---
© 2021, Friends of the Earth. All Rights Reserved.
---

**TO:** President Joe and First Lady Jill Biden
**FROM:** Your Name Here
**Subject:** I’M THANKFUL FOR YOU THIS HOLIDAY SEASON!
Dear President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden,

This Holiday season is filled with joy, hope, and good tidings all because of your hard work and dedication to serving the American people.

**For that, I would like to personally say THANK YOU!**
[**_Despite the relentless attacks you face from MAGA Republicans, you continue to prioritize unity, protecting our freedoms, and putting people over politics. So I’m signing this card and chipping in $7 to Fight for Reform to continue to invest in critical state and local battleground races across the nation. »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34476?t=9&akid=20525%2E4449941%2EgxPmPb)

**President Biden:** You led our country out of a pandemic and strengthened our economy all while passing a historic agenda – _giving the American people a light in the darkness amidst ongoing MAGA Republican chaos!_

**Dr. Biden,** you continue to set an example of what leadership looks like, confronting every challenge with dignity and grace!

**The major wins we’ve witnessed for Democrats across the board in November’s elections are a testimony that voters are beyond pleased with your historic agenda and leadership.**

And although we anticipate the challenges awaiting us in the new year, we are ready to face them head-on knowing that your empowering and unwavering leadership will help us overcome anything.
[**_Happy Holidays to you both, and THANK YOU for how you continue to show up for the American people!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34476?t=11&akid=20525%2E4449941%2EgxPmPb)

subject: goat on roller blades

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: I just signed major legislation into law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
This is a big win for Pennsylvania.

Derek Willis, this is great news:

**Earlier this week, I signed major bipartisan bills into law that make historic investments in Pennsylvania’s schools, families and communities.**

We invested in student mental health care, school repairs, public defenders (for the first time!), and expanded the child care tax credit for more than 200,000 Pennsylvania families.

This just continues some of the incredible work we’ve already done this year to provide universal free breakfast to Pennsylvania’s public school students, make Pennsylvania an automatic voter registration state, and invest in vocational training and apprenticeship programs, so every Pennsylvanian has the opportunity to succeed.

**These are big wins for Pennsylvania.** We’ve shown that when we come together, we can get things done for the good people of this Commonwealth and deliver real, tangible solutions to the issues people face every day.

But we have more work to do to continue bringing real freedom and real opportunity to every corner of our Commonwealth. **[So Derek Willis, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us keep up the fight for every single Pennsylvanian?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75304467/444257215/396869819?refcode=email_121623_budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjNjMjlmMy01YTljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9A-shd5FXxRNwk0v150eeuj9oPt0SpTxp_IWDQbSOI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75304468/444257216/396869819?refcode=email_121623_budget&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjNjMjlmMy01YTljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9A-shd5FXxRNwk0v150eeuj9oPt0SpTxp_IWDQbSOI=)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Bernie Sanders is bravely calling for President Biden to withhold $10 billion in military support for Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13083?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231216_PT_bernieaidRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_bernieaidRS&t=1011&akid=5070%2E5885482%2EFfsjVL

STAND WITH BERNIE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13083?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231216_PT_bernieaidRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_bernieaidRS&t=1012&akid=5070%2E5885482%2EFfsjVL)

Peter Willis,

Thanks to your surge of support in the face of big money opposition like AIPAC, Bernie’s demands on President Biden to stop supporting Israel’s indiscriminate bombing in Gaza are starting to break through.

For the first time this week, Biden echoed Bernie’s language critiquing Netanyahu, but with so many innocent civilians at risk, we still have a long way to go.

That’s why Bernie is demanding that President Biden not give Israel $10 billion in military aid to carry out their illegal and murderous bombing campaign of innocent civilians. Add your name to join him! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13083?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231216_PT_bernieaidRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_bernieaidRS&t=1013&akid=5070%2E5885482%2EFfsjVL)

STAND WITH BERNIE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13083?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231216_PT_bernieaidRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_bernieaidRS&t=1014&akid=5070%2E5885482%2EFfsjVL)

Giving Israel unconditional aid while it terrorizes innocent civilians would be a moral failing of the United States and would be counterproductive toward Israel’s stated goal of eliminating Hamas.

We can win here and guarantee a blue Senate
| | |

Friend, the path to a blue Senate runs directly through Florida.
Now that Sen. Manchin is retiring, defending our seat in West Virginia will be almost impossible. That means that even if we win every other Democratic seat on the ballot in 2024, which is already a tough task, _we could STILL wake up to a red Senate the morning after Election Day._
**The only viable path to guarantee that Mitch McConnell does not retake power is flipping a red seat blue in 2024. And polling data shows that my race is already a statistical tie. [We can win here and _guarantee_ a blue Senate, but I need your help to defeat Rick Scott's millions. Please, will you rush a donation right now to help me save our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75304612/444257799/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk430-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzYxNjg3ZDgtNWQ5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=udAxpRYmVia6PcsApBdooPIyr3m6KrePsd88BmJiXOo=)**

Rick Scott is seriously vulnerable, friend.
He's never won an election by much more than one point — last time around he only clinched victory by a mere 10,033 votes! And he had to pour $64 MILLION of his own fortune into his campaign to do it. **When the polls closed, he had outspent his Democratic rival by $50 million to win by just 0.12%.**
In the years since then, he's pushed a radical agenda that's way out of touch with voters here. He spread Trump's Big Lie and refused to certify the 2020 election. He wants to raise taxes on working families. He wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare. And he even supports passing a nationwide ban on abortions.
**While Rick Scott pushes his radical agenda and schmoozes with other mega-millionaires in Washington, families here in Florida are being left behind.** Housing prices are rising, higher education is getting further and further out of reach, parents working two jobs are still struggling to pay the bills, and climate change is threatening our coastal communities.
Florida voters have had it with Rick Scott. That's why a recent poll shows that this race is already a statistical tie.
Our campaign has a winning message — and with Senate control at stake here, we cannot afford to waste this incredible opportunity. **But Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION on attack ads to drown out our message**. **[So please, will you make a donation now to help me fight back against Rick Scott's millions and stop him from buying this seat again? Winning here is the only way to make sure that Republicans do not win the Senate in 2024!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75304617/444257804/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk430-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzYxNjg3ZDgtNWQ5Yy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=udAxpRYmVia6PcsApBdooPIyr3m6KrePsd88BmJiXOo=)**

Debbie

name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: These numbers tell the whole story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=918%2E135344%2E74MJJf)

Friend - there are three important numbers we'd like to share with you today that draw a real contrast between Elissa and the Republican candidates in this race. Take a look:
**$120,000.** That’s how much PAC money former Congressman Mike Rogers received in the first 24 days of his campaign – from other Republicans supporting his race to corporate PACs of a private prison company and Elon Musk’s SpaceX PAC. We know that more is on the way: During his time in Congress, Rogers accepted nearly $5 million (!!) from corporate PACs.
**Over $5,000,000.** That's how much our newest Republican opponent, businessman Sandy Pensler, spent to self-fund his primary campaign for Senate in 2018. He is again prepared to spend millions of his own money, particularly on early TV ads. He’s not alone either. One of our other opponents, Peter Meijer, gave his campaigns for Congress $1.6 million and he and his billionaire family has the ability to throw even more at this Senate race.
**$0** : That's how much corporate PAC money Elissa has taken since she first ran for Congress in 2018. That's right – $0. Because she wants her constituents to know that she is fighting for their interests, not for the interests of large corporations or to self-fund a position of grandeur. And unlike some, she has stuck to the pledge – even after getting elected. Based on estimates, Elissa has forfeited hundreds of thousands in corporate PAC money during her years in Congress.
Despite not taking any corporate PAC money, Elissa has gone against corporate-backed GOP opponents and won. How? By relying on lots and lots of normal people giving what they can, when they can. And a surprisingly large portion of the small-dollar contributions to our campaign come in response to emails like this one.
**So if we're going to successfully fight back against the flood of corporate PAC money that will pour into this race, it's going to be because people like you helped Elissa when it mattered most.**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate in Michigan? Your support is so fundamental to the success of this campaign.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231216-2-tt&t=2&akid=918%2E135344%2E74MJJf)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: This is a bit weird
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34885%2E3422442%2E0VHOPs)
Derek, have you seen this headline from the _Los Angeles Times_?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231216-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_LAT_20231216_V1_F&refcode2=34885_3422442_0VHOPs&akid=34885%2E3422442%2E0VHOPs)
Katie could be on the ballot four times next year. 😱
The ballot in March will be different than in previous years because voters will see two “elections” for U.S. Senator: the regular term that runs January 2025 through 2031, and a separate election to vote for someone to serve out the remainder of Senator Feinstein’s term, from November 2024 through January 2025.
This could cause confusion for voters, and primary elections typically have lower voter turnout than general elections. So, it’s crucial we have the resources to reach the voters who will decide the outcome of March’s primary election (and make sure they know they have to vote TWICE!).
_And with about 1⁄3 of voters still undecided, whether or not we progress through the primary election could be determined by how many voters we reach in these next 80 days._
**[Derek, will you help us catch up on our recent fundraising slowdown by making a $5 contribution right now? Every single donation will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231216-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_LAT_20231216_V1_F&refcode2=34885_3422442_0VHOPs&akid=34885%2E3422442%2E0VHOPs)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231216-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_LAT_20231216_V1_F&refcode2=34885_3422442_0VHOPs&akid=34885%2E3422442%2E0VHOPs)
Thank you,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_2_LAT_20231216_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34885_3422442_0VHOPs&akid=34885%2E3422442%2E0VHOPs)**

name: Barbara Grassley
subject: ICYMI: Are you baking this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
|
---
Every year, Chuck and I look forward to celebrating special traditions during the holiday season.

Before we worship in church and gather around the tree on Christmas morning, there's important business to get to first: baking cookies!

The wonderful smells, tastes (and kitchen mess!) bring up wonderful memories. I remember baking with my mother and it's wonderful to see this tradition continue with our grandkids. I bet your family hands down recipes from one generation to the next, as well.

**If you're looking for a tried and true sugar cookie recipe, I've got one to share with you today. It's a great one for cookie exchanges, too!
**

clean_body: The Democrat judge in my SHAM TRIAL just said... | | | Friend, The Democrat judge in my sham “corporate death penalty” trial in New York has made crystal clear that he could care less about evidence – especially evidence that PROVES my innocence! In fact, before my attorneys even had the opportunity to present the mountain of evidence and testimony, this judge had already presumed me guilty of “fraud.” But now, after demonstrating my INNOCENCE in court – and that this is nothing more than another one of the Left’s vicious witch hunts – my attorneys have requested a directed verdict to wrap up this trial IMMEDIATELY and CLEAR me of these phony charges. But what did this judge (who’s donated to Democrats, I might add!) have to say before even reading the motion?... “There's no way I’m going to grant that.” This is a slap in the face of true justice! When you enter the courtroom PRESUMED GUILTY – and are still presumed guilty after PROVING YOUR INNOCENCE – then we’re no longer living in America, Friend. We might as well be living in Maoist China or Stalinist Russia, for that matter! And under Crooked Joe’s regime, that’s exactly what we’ve got. A sitting president and ruling party who have weaponized our justice system to try and destroy their leading opponent and the ONE and ONLY MAN who can defeat them in 2024. But, as I’ve said time and again, they can attack me all they want, strip me of my constitutional rights, threaten me with life in prison, force me to take a mugshot, and seek the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, but there’s ONE THING they will NEVER get away with... ...Robbing YOU of your country! Because WE will NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to their tyranny! With YOU at my side, we will counter their lies, attacks, and vicious witch hunts at every turn. We will prevail just as we always have. And come November 5, 2024, we will receive the ultimate vindication – and the ultimate prize: an America made GREAT AGAIN! If you’re struggling right now due to the crooks, thugs, and fools currently running our country, then please don’t donate at this time. I only wanted to update you on this grave injustice of a “trial.” Thank you, | Donald J. When I ran for Congress against Lauren Boebert last year, one of the greatest gifts was being able to meet and listen to so many people on the campaign trail.
My son Felix and I traveled over 24,000 miles in our red pick-up truck across the entire district – meeting people in diners, bars, living rooms, and backyards. We’re already racking up even more miles this time.
You can learn a lot when you stop and take the time to truly listen. It’s something more people in Washington should be doing frankly, instead of only meeting with big-pocketed donors and corporate lobbyists.
**Now, I’m running against Boebert again, and my team created a short survey.[Will you take just a few quick minutes to tell me what you’re concerned about right now and what issues are most important to you and your family?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75305347/444260446/1135828181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGU4YzhkOS02NDljLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7gBx0XvHrJz5eVPEY4jjhr10wRiJrBj47f59FCFtuo=&emci=ade6e743-649c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=00e8c8d9-649c-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=19445147)**
I’m looking forward to hearing what you have to say.
Thank you for being such a critical part of this campaign.
With gratitude -
Adam

As a result, my attorneys have been notified that we have a FIRM DEADLINE of 12/20 to respond. Just like many predicted it would, the D.C. Witch Hunt has officially turned into a Supreme Court SHOWDOWN. And as my defense team prepares our legal response, I'd like to show the country another response... ... THE PEOPLE'S RESPONSE: " WE WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR COUNTRY!" Remember, Patriot, our movement will never be judged by the amount our supporters give, but rather, by the sheer number (the MILLIONS) of grassroots patriots who stand with us. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: I'm proud of this.

body:
This is what we've achieved together.
| | | [ ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| | Derek, It's no surprise the Democrats _**hate**_ what we're doing in New Hampshire. We're expanding educational freedom. We're fighting for parent's rights. We're standing by our law enforcement. We're protecting our Second Amendment. We're lowering taxes for all. ....and we're _**just**_ getting started. New Hampshire's recent successes aren't by accident. They're all due to Republican leadership that has paved the way in our state for great success. **We're the freest state in the nation. Charter School enrollment has gone up by over 30% in the last three years. Educational Freedom Accounts are wildly successful and keep growing by leaps and bounds. And the more we cut taxes, the greater our economy grows.** Can you help us keep up the momentum here? [By donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today you can help us](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) win big in New Hampshire next year, expand our majorities in Concord, and deliver on even more promises to the people. It's not going to be easy, but nothing worth doing ever is. **Democrats will flood New Hampshire with millions of dollars in out-of-state special interest funds.** [We need the resources to fight back here in New Hampshire.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Can you please contribute $5 for the kids of Guadalupe?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter-
If you’ve never heard of Guadalupe, Arizona, it’s a small town in the Phoenix area — population of about 5,000 people.
You may remember it as the place racist sheriff Joe Arpaio brought officers on horseback to terrorize a largely Yaqui and Mexican community, including harassing a confirmation ceremony at the Our Lady of Guadalupe church.
It’s a proud community. But they need our help.
A large portion of the Guadalupe community is young children, and we’d like to do something nice for them this Christmas.
Every dollar we raise at this link, we are going to use to buy movie tickets for the children of Guadalupe and their families. Every penny. So please:
[**Can you make a $5 contribution for the kids of Guadalupe? Use this link and we will use every penny to make sure all the families in Guadalupe have a magical holiday.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23-guadalupe.fkRQEk&refcode=em231216-2-30&t=1&akid=1565%2E734936%2EjYjj-x)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Paul Begala
subject: As PA goes, so goes the US
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter:
For decades, I have worked in politics electing Democrats in tough races across the country. I’ve been on both the winning and losing side, and here’s what I know for sure: **As PA goes, so goes the nation.**
Just look at the numbers: In 2016, 44,292 votes in PA propelled Donald Trump to his unexpected victory. Then, in 2020, Joe Biden clinched Pennsylvania’s 20 electoral votes by a narrow 1.17% margin, helping him secure the White House.
**Mark my words, 2024 will be no different, and Pennsylvania will once again be THE tipping point.**
So here’s a piece of expert advice for grassroots donors like you, Peter: **[If we’re going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we must prioritize supporting Bob Casey in Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?refcode=em20231216-3&recurring=1&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy)**
National Republicans know that if they flip this seat, they can flip the Senate, and they’re going to spend whatever it takes to do just that. Bob is already up against a mega-millionaire who can self-fund his campaign. So we need the resources to fight back.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Bob Casey’s re-election campaign. Whatever you can pitch in will make a big difference in a race this competitive.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?refcode=em20231216-3&recurring=1&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231216-3-el&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231216-3-el&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231216-3-el&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231216-3-el&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231216-3-el&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20231216-3&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy)
---
Support from grassroots donors like you really is going to make all the difference in this battleground race.
– Paul Begala
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?refcode=em20231216-3&recurring=1&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy)
Paul Begala is a longtime political strategist and former advisor to President Bill Clinton. He has decades of experience electing Democrats in tough races across the country, including President Barack Obama in 2012. **[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231216-3?refcode=em20231216-3&recurring=1&refcode2=1402_552475_-UEYyy&akid=1402%2E552475%2E-UEYyy)**

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate

name: Jon Tester
subject: They’re trying to turn me into someone I’m not, because they can’t beat who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Hey, Peter.

I’m humbled by this team and the support our campaign has received. Thanks to you, TV ads are up and running across Montana to share my story and what I’m fighting for.

But unfortunately, we’re not the only ones picking up the pace.

Mitch McConnell has me set in his sights, and I know national Republicans will spend just about anything to try and beat me. Just last month, a super PAC flooded the airwaves in Montana to support one of my potential opponents.

**They’re spending so much money to try and turn me into someone I’m not because they know they can’t beat who I am.**

But we’re not taking anything for granted. Here’s what I know about my team—we won’t be outworked, but we might be outspent.

**If we continue to have the resources to reach and turn out Montana voters, we’ll win this election. It’s that simple—and I’m asking you to help:**

[Will you split a contribution any amount right now between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help us build the strongest team we can? This is a battleground race, and every dollar makes a difference. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75306198/444263350/1605252622?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231216_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjZTU3YmViLTZjOWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yCLSDBzCZFykSDuIWq-icITF5pcQ9O4MqCo0CPil2UY=)
